# Thread: Vitamin D levels and COVID
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/vitamin-d-levels-and-covid.25943/>
**Subforum:** Optimal Labs
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Aussie Chris — 2021-06-01T08:45:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/vitamin-d-levels-and-covid.25943/post-299243>

Hi All,

I know this is well known, but nice to see it consistently validated.

Recent (30 May) article in The Hindu (Indian media) discussing a recent study, published in Nature, on the impact of vitamin D levels on COVID infection:

[https://www.thehindu.com/news/citie...ovid-infection-nims-study/article34684271.ece](https://www.thehindu.com/news/cities/Hyderabad/high-vitamin-d-levels-reduce-covid-infection-nims-study/article34684271.ece)

_"**Dr. Maheshwar also observed that less than 5% of people contracted the COVID-19 if the Vitamin D level was more than 55 ng/ml in them.** The mortality of COVID patients is almost zero if Vitamin D level was 60 ng/ml and it is very high if the levels are less than 30 ng/ml."_ (emphasis mine)_.
_
Here is a link to the study at [www.nature.com](http://www.nature.com):

[https://www.nature.com/articles/s41598-021-90189-4](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41598-021-90189-4)

### Seth Nelson — 2021-08-30T15:52:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/vitamin-d-levels-and-covid.25943/post-303095>

I would like to know more about this too. On a recent interview, on YouTube I think, Dr. Kruse said something to the effect that “if your Vitamin D levels are above 60 ng/ml, you could kiss COVID and still not get it.”

Was that hyperbole? My wife and I both have VitD levels over 80 (mine’s over 100, without pill supplementation), so I’m curious. I wonder how to confirm his claim. I suppose it would only take one case to disprove it. I imagine that has been done; I’m just not aware. Are D levels routinely tested among COVID cases?

### DrEttinger — 2021-08-30T16:36:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/vitamin-d-levels-and-covid.25943/post-303096>

Observational report: I treat 75 patients per week with no mask. My office has never changed its schedule since COVID. I have traveled outside the States twice and in the states 4x, all flying. I have been exposed to active COVID and newly vaccinated patients. I have not had a sniffle. My Vitamin D is always between 47 (Winter)-90 (Summer) from Surfing. I also Take NAC w/selenium, which I have for 25+ years. Also, none of my patients taking one or more of NAC, zinc, vitamin D, vitamin C, quercetin, and colostrum contracted COVID, where non-supplemented family members did.

### OliviaBlake — 2022-08-11T17:28:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/vitamin-d-levels-and-covid.25943/post-314995>

I've also heard that the higher the vitamin D level, the easier it is for the body to tolerate Covid. In fact, those who have it go well are lucky because this virus usually negatively affects the body, muscles, and activity. It is especially bad for athletes who need to recover quickly and well. In this case, the drug [Ligandrol for sale](https://purerawz.co/product/ligandrol-lgd-4033/) was created, which can improve muscle protein synthesis, accelerate glycogen replenishment in the muscles and increase the efficiency of oxidative reactions. By replenishing glycogen stores in muscles, bone strength will increase, and muscle tissue will be strengthened. Interested to hear your opinion. Maybe someone has already used it?

### Warren Canavan — 2022-10-31T12:58:08+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/vitamin-d-levels-and-covid.25943/post-317124>

I take it that good vitamin D levels are associated with general good overall health, i.e. Dr Kruse's quilt. I think Dr Ardis is on to something with the snake venom stuff. If your organs are already damaged by modern day disease: diabetes, cardio and cancer; venom would see of the rest off of your vital organs. I just don't see a virus causing sudden death syndrome(one minute healthy and the next minute gone, no fever), and "fish out of water" syndrome. The shakes seem to me some sort of attack on the nervous system, and venom as enzymatic poisons(which is generally what poisons are, they stop enzymes from working e.g. cyanide).

# Thread: Mega Breakfast Ideas Thread?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mega-breakfast-ideas-thread.25953/>
**Subforum:** The Leptin Rx
**Posts:** 11
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### ShellyFM — 2021-06-03T17:43:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mega-breakfast-ideas-thread.25953/post-299335>

Is there a thread of breakfast ideas that meet the requirements of the leptin rx reset for the BAB? If so, could you share the link as I've been unable to find one?

If not, could we start one? It could be a place where others come to post what they ate that morning, how much protein it had, and tips on how they had it ready in 10-15 minutes.

This could be a great resource for meal planning and for newbies like me!

### caroline — 2021-06-04T08:06:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mega-breakfast-ideas-thread.25953/post-299361>

as I mentioned before ..... put a roast in the crockpot the night before. For breakfast put a fried egg on top of hot roast beef/lamb etc.

hard boiled eggs

make bone broth and then heat up for a hot drink

you could put thin slices of raw steak in a hot mug of bone broth with some thinly sliced green onions and grated carrots and some fresh herbs

mix up a can of wild caught sockeye salmon the nite before with home made mayo and fresh herbs

sardines and scrambled eggs

precook a pound of bacon for bacon and eggs

google nom nom paleo for a ton of delicious recipes

### EWO — 2021-06-04T17:07:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mega-breakfast-ideas-thread.25953/post-299363>

Sardines, bacon and eggs, curried shrimp are staples in our house.

### ShellyFM — 2021-06-11T19:18:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mega-breakfast-ideas-thread.25953/post-299657>

So, for BAB, it needs to be minimum of 50g of protein.

For eggs and bacon, that would be 6 eggs and 6 strips of bacon. Is that how much you all eat when doing eggs and bacon?

I'm definitely not at sardines yet, but hope to be one day.

For large shrimp, it seems it would be about 34 shrimp. Does that sound right and how much you all eat?

When you make your own bone broth at home, how do you determine how much protein is in it?

With the pyramid, it seems like we should be focusing BAB on shellfish, crustaceans, and fish more than the others, right?

I know the concepts must seem so simple but to me, it's a big hurdle and I would really like to figure out 14 days worth of meals to plan out for us before we jump in as I really don't want to fall off the bandwagon due to lack of planning.

### EWO — 2021-06-11T20:17:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mega-breakfast-ideas-thread.25953/post-299661>

> [ShellyFM said:](/goto/post?id=299657)
>
> So, for BAB, it needs to be minimum of 50g of protein.
>
> For eggs and bacon, that would be 6 eggs and 6 strips of bacon. Is that how much you all eat when doing eggs and bacon?
>
> I'm definitely not at sardines yet, but hope to be one day.
>
> For large shrimp, it seems it would be about 34 shrimp. Does that sound right and how much you all eat?
>
> When you make your own bone broth at home, how do you determine how much protein is in it?
>
> With the pyramid, it seems like we should be focusing BAB on shellfish, crustaceans, and fish more than the others, right?
>
> I know the concepts must seem so simple but to me, it's a big hurdle and I would really like to figure out 14 days worth of meals to plan out for us before we jump in as I really don't want to fall off the bandwagon due to lack of planning.

It's been awhile since I did the official BAB, but I hope this helps. This morning I had about a half pound (before cooking) of Argentinian shrimp (with tumeric and black pepper and full fat coconut milk); just checked the package and that would have been 28 g protein. I had it with a couple slices of bacon (12 g). 40 grams total. If I have sardines, I usually end up with 2/3 of a can (dog gets the rest! \*smile\*) and a couple scrambled eggs. That's probably only 25 ish grams total. Some people are more precise types than me. It's possible I ate 6 eggs at one time way back when but the thought of that at this point--bleh. I will sometimes mix six yolks and heavy cream, vanilla and grass fed, low temp (very lightly processed) organic whey protein powder, with ice cubes in vitamix to make a vanilla "shake" or ice cream substitute (and split it with the kids).

I have a good idea of strategies to recommend my Mom to follow, but I was hoping to get opinions from everyone else. **To anyone that has a loved one fighting or beat their own cancer**... Same question as above.

**To everyone**... Any resources/articles you think are the most important to brush up on?

Thank you

### Penny — 2021-06-04T18:27:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/crowdcare-request-for-mom-just-diagnosed-with-stage-4-breast-cancer.25954/post-299365>

I was looking for a study I had read years ago that said methylene blue plus potassium iodide (Lugol's) killed a breast cancer cell in vitro... then I found this:
[https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0944711310002588](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0944711310002588)

Seems like green tea is a good thing...

It seems to me if you also use DMSO at the same time, it would transport it subcutaneously to the cancer cells - read this:

>
> **To everyone**... Any resources/articles you think are the most important to brush up on?
>

Understanding the nuances for an n=1 context is the most difficult bit ..... For example I would want to know if any suggested way of eating carried a risk of initiating a metastases because the cancer was being "starved." There's also the problem of cancer stem cells ... As one of my cancer prevention strategies, I've learned about foods with anti angiogenic properties and ones that can inhibit cancer stem cells, for example (referred to in William Li's book Eat to Beat Disease):

[https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/29452350/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/29452350/)
**Extra-virgin olive oil contains a metabolo-epigenetic inhibitor of cancer stem cells**

It might be worth doing an audit of current and past exposure to aluminum. In one of my books on silica rich mineral water it talks about the etiology of breast, colorectal and prostate cancers and a gene called _BRCA1_. _BRCA1 (_the gene is typed in italics_)_ when expressed produces _BRCA1 mRNA,_ which in turn produces a protein called BRCA1 (not in italics). The BRCA1 protein is responsible for error free repair of double strand breaks in DNA. There is a hereditary _BRCA1_ mutation which lowers the BRCA1 production, but there can also be environmental epigenetic decreases in the expression of _BRCA1_ which lowers BRCA1 protein production. Aluminum has the potential to be a causal factor for breast cancer because it inhibits the _BRCA1_ gene.

[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/the-silica-thread.25231/](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/the-silica-thread.25231/) has some links to articles on exposure to aluminum. Anti perspirant is the tip of the aluminium loaded iceberg, and body burden could be much higher than expected from other sources, or from poor excretion. As sweat is an elimination route I would also suspect that having a high body burden of aluminum would impact how someone would respond to sunlight on the skin, particularly the UV wavelengths, possibly from the frequencies produced when the light hits it, or excessive free radicals generated.

Are there clues I can look for that can indicate what I should do as we are in winter now in Aus. I have always had low Vit D despite never using sunscreen and being an absolute sun bunny all my life. I've only ever had one bad sunburn and for the last few summers I pretty much can't seem to burn even on a full summer's day in Australia.
My mother and grandmother were born in Northern England but they both have darkish skin- most think my mum is Italian (my dad is)...
I always thought my ability to tan came from my father's genes, at least before finding these forums.

I probably need to buy this DNA test but I would rather spend the money on something like the FIREWAVe by EMR-Tek
and then the rest of my money should go to Bitcoin...

### LillianVaughanws — 2022-04-07T11:01:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ibs-multiple-food-sensitivities-suggestions.25975/post-311865>

Since I was a child, I was sensitive to food and often had digestive issues after eating, so I was always getting some special meds to help me with digestion. When I got older, I took a food intolerance test at [intolerancelab.co.uk](https://www.intolerancelab.co.uk/food-intolerance-test/) and found that I have gluten intolerance. It explained many things, and it helped me understand what I should eat and whatnot. Usually, people who are sensitive to food can have some food intolerances for several products, so I recommend taking a food intolerance test.

### John Schumacher — 2022-04-08T19:30:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ibs-multiple-food-sensitivities-suggestions.25975/post-311900>

More evidence:
Published online 2019 Oct 24. doi: [10.3389/fmicb.2019.02410](https://dx.doi.org/10.3389%2Ffmicb.2019.02410)
PMCID: PMC6821880
PMID: [31708890](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/31708890)

Skin Exposure to Narrow Band Ultraviolet (UVB) Light Modulates the Human Intestinal Microbiome
[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6821880/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6821880/)

Intriguingly, these repeated sub-erythemal UVB skin exposures led to a _**significant increase** in the alpha and beta diversity of the gut microbiome_ in participants who had not supplemented with vitamin D prior to the study (VDS−), even though both VDS groups showed a similar increase in their serum 25(OH)D levels. This finding suggests that the modulatory effects of UVB on the microbiome were associated with the 25(OH)D insufficiency status of the VDS− group. Based on the fact that UVB light has been previously shown to modulate the immune system, we hypothesize that exposing the skin to UVB light initially leads to local changes in both innate and adaptive immune cells. These cells subsequently traffic to more systemic sites, including the gut, where their release of mediators in turn shapes the composition of the gut microbiome. Since vitamin D deficiency has been previously correlated with microbial dysbiosis in both mice and humans, this study highlights the importance of maintaining vitamin D sufficiency. Correspondingly, participants in the VDS− group started the study with a significantly lower microbial alpha diversity as compared to the VDS+ group, with UVB exposures increasing their diversity to the same level as the VDS+ group. _A diverse microbiome is thought to be more resilient against stressors and is seen as a **hallmark of health**._

# Thread: Spring water in plastic vs glass
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/spring-water-in-plastic-vs-glass.25977/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Daulatwant — 2021-06-11T11:41:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/spring-water-in-plastic-vs-glass.25977/post-299645>

I collect my spring water a few km away from my home, the spring is not the most clean but it works great for me. I mostly used plastic bottles for collecting the water, and it worked well during winter and spring. But now that the temperatures have risen, the water in the plastic bottles quickly developed a smell and taste, but the water that I collected in a big glass jar has almost no smell or taste even though it wast the last container of water that I used out of that batch.

# Thread: Glass Candle Holder

**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 7

### ShellyFM — 2021-06-11T23:06:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/glass-candle-holder.25980/post-299670>

Is it safe to assume that if using candles at night after sunset that you would not want to put them in a glass candle holder for the same reason as why glass windows cause blue light toxicity from the sun? Or do candles not emit blue light so they would not have the same effect as sunlight through glass? We have kids and dogs. So, I'm looking for the safest way to use candles and wanted to check on this before I got any.

### EWO — 2021-06-12T02:12:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/glass-candle-holder.25980/post-299674>

> [ShellyFM said:](/goto/post?id=299670)
>
> Is it safe to assume that if using candles at night after sunset that you would not want to put them in a glass candle holder for the same reason as why glass windows cause blue light toxicity from the sun? Or do candles not emit blue light so they would not have the same effect as sunlight through glass? We have kids and dogs. So, I'm looking for the safest way to use candles and wanted to check on this before I got any.

I'm not sure what others will say to this but we are using a variety. Sometimes taper, sometimes deeper glass containers. I gave up on the UCO candle lanterns for several reasons, including feeling they were not safe (heat shield gets very hot). We also use red bulb night lights placed in low sockets. Here's my favorite: a beeswax candle resting in a sturdy clay pot with handles atop a little mountain of salt (fire stopper), and with a cover for snuffing out the smoke when you blow out the candle. Hard to knock over and easy for kids to carry. No glass. { "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

Also, I was worried about the dog but he seems to know to steer clear (once he investigated and discovered they were hot).
PS...I sense that you are very detail oriented and a planner and that you want to get this "right." Just know it takes time and we are all still learning.

### ShellyFM — 2021-06-20T16:12:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/glass-candle-holder.25980/post-299985>

We found this, and so far are loving it! It's more sturdy, given the way it's made, than a separate candle on a holder, which I always worried was more likely to be knocked over. However, this has a pretty sturdy stand and holds onto the part that's lit. It also goes out when it burns down to the holder. Each inch is about 20-25 minutes of burn time. So, you can decide how long you want it to burn. We put it on top of a tall study cabinet in our family room, and it provides a decent amount of light to help facilitate the kids getting ready for bed, dressed in pjs, brushing teeth, etc. It's a beeswax candle, too. So, hopefully it's healthier.

[https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B000LWVEW0](https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B000LWVEW0)

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/theta-9-24-from-3-00-in-24-hours-coinmarketcap-mischief.25990/post-299757>

Last night, where I am in New Zealand, THETA token was not showing up on coinmarketcap website ... just came up with a blank page. Now, a few hours later, it is showing the low in 24 hours as $3,00 and the current price about $9.24. This is weird! Did the criminals push it down to 3 bucks and buy up a bunch ... and prevent anyone else from seeing this low price? I have no idea what happened but the entire thing is strange. Glad I'm old.

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/dark-chocolate-resveratrol.25996/post-299810>

Hi
I have a few questions about dark chocolate and resveratrol.

1\. How much benefit do you get from eating dark chocolate?

2\. Does resveratrol enhance the vitamin d receptor?

3\. I struggle with drinking red wine and oxalates can anyone suggest a different source of resveratrol please although I do like dark chocolate?

4\. How much of a circadian mismatch would eating dark chocolate create if you were eating it at high latitude for example in the UK during the winter/colder months or would the benefits of dark chocolate/ resveratrol outweigh the negatives?

Thank you in advance

### Sue-UK — 2021-06-25T11:34:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/dark-chocolate-resveratrol.25996/post-300236>

> [healthy2015 said:](/goto/post?id=299810)
>
> Hi
> I have a few questions about dark chocolate and resveratrol.
>
> 1\. How much benefit do you get from eating dark chocolate?
>
> 2\. Does resveratrol enhance the vitamin d receptor?
>
> 3\. I struggle with drinking red wine and oxalates can anyone suggest a different source of resveratrol please although I do like dark chocolate?
>
> 4\. How much of a circadian mismatch would eating dark chocolate create if you were eating it at high latitude for example in the UK during the winter/colder months or would the benefits of dark chocolate/ resveratrol outweigh the negatives?
>
> Thank you in advance

Unless I buy a UK wine (more like a champagne, and very expensive), all wines would technically be a year round mismatch, as would cocoa beans ..... and coffee .... and turmeric .... and coconut oil ..... etc

I don't know the figures for resveratrol but a good quality Balsamic vinegar de Modena is made from grape must, and contains it. BV becomes cheaper if its mixed with white vinegar .... 100% BV can be eye wateringly expensive, but I'd avoid any where white vinegar is the top ingredient. On a bottle where grape must is the top ingredient it could give you a reasonable amount of polyphenols, without the alcohol but with the benefits of acetic acid. (One ref is [https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/20460711/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/20460711/))

I use it in salad dressing with EVOO, and also make a spritzer of San Pellegrino and Balsamic. (Steven Gundry's recipe is 8-10 oz San Pellegrino with 1 to 2 tablespoons of balsamic vinegar de Modena).

> [healthy2015 said:](/goto/post?id=299845)
>
> Thanks Jansz But I thought Jack was not keen with supplementation?

According to William Li in his book Eat to Beat Disease, resveratrol is in such small amounts in red wines and most resveratrol containing foods (such as blueberries, pistachios, cranberries and peanuts) it would take a huge intake of red wine to match the amounts used in most research studies. Depends what you are dealing with, but he thinks this could be one of the exceptions to relying on food.

The labelling is confusing in the UK. If the top ingredient is wine vinegar, and the second ingredient is the grape musk, it could be 51% to 49%, but I don't know if they could get away with say a 90% to 10% ratio, or similar, whilst charging a premium. So I reckon if grape musk is first on the list, it hopefully has to be 51% minimum, and I can base my price decision on that. The resveratrol and polyphenols from the grape musk are one thing, and I'm going through the info on this about vinegar ....

[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6723943/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6723943/)
**The Short-Chain Fatty Acid Acetate in Body Weight Control and Insulin Sensitivity**

# Thread: Following these steps will correctly disable 5G on my modem?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/following-these-steps-will-correctly-disable-5g-on-my-modem.26008/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### BrunoB — 2021-06-18T23:15:56+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/following-these-steps-will-correctly-disable-5g-on-my-modem.26008/post-299939>

Hi, thabks so much!
**How to Disable AT&T WiFi**

AT&T is the primary provider of internet service for many communities in the United States. Unfortunately, their gateway modem is a very powerful emitter of microwave radiation and they do not allow non-AT&T modems to be used in their system. With other internet companies, such as Comcast, you can purchase your own wired modem that does not emit WiFi. I outline the low-EMF modem process for other providers in the “Update” section of [this article](https://www.emfanalysis.com/why-is-xfinity-wifi-harming-people/).

The good thing with AT&T is that you can disable the wireless functions of your modem by following some simple steps online. This will allow you to have a WiFi-free environment in your home while still enjoying fast, reliable internet service.

Here are the step-by-step instructions to disable the WiFi from your AT&T modem:

1) Enter [http://192.168.1.254](http://192.168.1.254) in browser
2) Click on ‘Home Network’
3) Click on ‘WiFi’
4) Enter ‘Device Access Code’ found on side of modem
5) Click ‘Continue’
6) Click ‘Advanced Options’
7) Select ‘Off’ under ‘Wi-Fi Operation’ on both ‘2.4 GHz Wi-Fi Radio
Configuration’ and ‘5.0 GHz Wi-Fi Radio Configuration’
8) Click ‘Save’ at bottom of screen to save the changes

As you arrow back to the ‘Home Network Status’ page you will see ‘Radio Disabled’ under both 2.4 and 5.0 GHz Radio.

The following screenshot shows where you will turn the WiFi off. Here is a [full PDF](https://www.emfanalysis.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/How-to-Disable-ATT-WiFi.pdf) of the process.

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

Here is the result showing that the WiFi is indeed disabled for both antennas:

.
Spurce
[https://www.emfanalysis.com/how-to-disable-att-wifi/](https://www.emfanalysis.com/how-to-disable-att-wifi/)

This works for all types of modems? I have a Huawet unfortunately 5G. ?? THanks!

### BrunoB — 2021-08-24T16:28:43+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/following-these-steps-will-correctly-disable-5g-on-my-modem.26008/post-302841>

# Thread: 5G Community Impact Letter - Feel free to adapt, reuse or repurpose
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/5g-community-impact-letter-feel-free-to-adapt-reuse-or-repurpose.26026/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### MichaelC — 2021-06-22T19:07:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/5g-community-impact-letter-feel-free-to-adapt-reuse-or-repurpose.26026/post-300096>

Hello all,

A couple years ago I attempted to corral support for opposition to 5G in my community and wrote a nice impact letter for my neighborhood association newsletter. I thought it would be nice to share here and encourage anyone to 'steal' it - adapt and reuse/republish it wherever you like, whether in your own newsletters, websites, etc. if it can help you in any way.

[https://austin5g.org/letter/](https://austin5g.org/letter/)

The website is also a good local resource if you know of anyone in the Austin area that you can refer to learn about the dangers of 5G if they don't know already or are skeptical.

Cheers

# Thread: Pfizer Criminal Felony RECORD - but we TRUST THEM ?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/pfizer-criminal-felony-record-but-we-trust-them.26034/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Jackie Nelson — 2021-06-24T02:20:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/pfizer-criminal-felony-record-but-we-trust-them.26034/post-300185>

**Crimes of Covid Vaccine Maker Pfizer Documented**
{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

[**Pfizer Corporate Full Rap Sheet**](https://www.mp-22.com/vax)

Here’s a brief glimpse of Pfizer’s track record for safety and ethics. This is a short list, by no means inclusive of the company’s entire rap sheet.

-   Pfizer received the biggest fine in U.S. history as part of a $2.3 Billion plea deal with federal prosecutors for mis-promoting medicines (Bextra, Celebrex) and paying kickbacks to compliant doctors. Pfizer pleaded guilty to mis-branding the painkiller Bextra by promoting the drug for uses for which it was not approved.
-   In the 1990s, Pfizer was involved in defective heart valves that lead to the deaths of more than 100 people. Pfizer had deliberately misled regulators about the hazards. The company agreed to pay $10.75 Million to settle justice department charges for misleading regulators.
-   Pfizer paid more than $60 Million to settle a lawsuit over Rezulin, a diabetes medication that caused patients to die from acute liver failure.
-   In the UK, Pfizer has been fined nearly €90 Million for overcharging the NHS, the National Health Service. Pfizxer charged the taxpayer an additional €48 Million per year for what should have cost €2 million per year.
-   Pfizer agreed to pay $430 Million in 2004 to settle criminal charges that it had bribed doctors to prescribe its epilepsy drug Neurontin for indications for which it was not approved.
-   In 2011, a jury found Pfizer committed racketeering fraud in its marketing of the drug Neurontin. Pfizer agreed to pay $142.1 Million to settle the charges.
-   Pfizer disclosed that it had paid nearly nearly 4,500 doctors and other medical professionals some $20 Million for speaking on Pfizer’s behalf.
-   In 2012, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission announced that it had reached a $45 Million settlement with Pfizer to resolve charges that its subsidiaries had bribed overseas doctors and other healthcare professionals to increase foreign sales.
-   Pfizer was sued in a U.S. federal court for using Nigerian children as human guinea pigs, without the childrens’ parents’ consent. Pfizer paid $75 Million to settle in Nigerian court for using an experimental antibiotic, Trovan, on the children. The company paid an additional undisclosed amount in the U.S. to settle charges here. Pfizer had violated international law, including the Nuremberg Convention established after WWII, due to Nazi experiments on unwilling prisoners.
-   Amid widespread criticism of gouging poor countries for drugs, Pfizer pledged to give $50 million for an AIDS drug to South Africa. Later, however, Pfizer failed to honor that promise.

Pfizer’s Covid vaccine is being rolled out with nothing but positive press from every mainstream media outlet in the country. Meanwhile, more than half of Americans surveyed have said they will not take a Covid vaccine. The plain fact is that many questions remain unanswered regarding this, or any other, Covid vaccine’s safety and efficacy.

What we do know, from legal history, is that Pfizer’s past transgressions might lead some reasonable people to question whether or not they will submit to any vaccine made by the company.

# Thread: From Meryl Nass or anthraxvaccine.com:
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/from-meryl-nass-or-anthraxvaccine-com.26094/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Penny — 2021-07-05T18:12:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/from-meryl-nass-or-anthraxvaccine-com.26094/post-300668>

[What I am seeing happening in the world of Covid now](http://feedproxy.google.com/~r/blogspot/Tqhnw/~3/2VD6xVZGT3M/what-i-am-seeing-happening-in-world-of.html?utm_source=feedburner&utm_medium=email)

Posted: 04 Jul 2021 01:16 PM PDT

1\. A case was adjudicated in Weimar, Germany regarding the necessity of pandemic measures (and the actual occurrence of a dangerous pandemic) for children several months ago. The plaintiffs won, and the Weimar government was ordered to dismantle its lockdown and school-based measures.

Next, the judge was attacked, had electronics seized, was searched and possibly jailed. This was a couple of months ago.

This week, 14 locations related to 8 people (the judge, another judge who was a friend of the first judge, the expert witnesses, the plaintiff and the plaintiff's partner were all searched and electronics were seized. The best guess is that the German government is on a fishing expedition to build a case against the judge, witnesses etc. for some illicit behavior. This is unprecedented lawlessness against the judicial system itself, in an attempt to over turn the first successful legal challenge to the pandemic response. Very important case. Consider supporting the defense of those who were attacked.

2\. The paper I wrote about earlier, published last week in the _Vaccines_ journal was retracted, with no methodologic criticism, no inaccuracy alleged, simply because it found that for every 3 lives saved by vaccination, 2 are lost due to adverse reactions to the vaccine.

3\. The CDC's ACIP meeting made clear that CDC intends to begin booster shots in the fall, even without supportive evidence that they are needed or even beneficial.

4\. The _Army Times_ and _Navy Times_ have written that vaccinations for servicemembers will become mandatory in September, after the vaccines are fully licensed. One article claims only 15% of Army soldiers have taken the vaccine.

5\. CDC and FDA have dug their heels in to cover up the adverse reactions and hide the databases they use to determine actual adverse event rates.

6\. It is said that 500 colleges are requiring vaccinations of students and usually of staff as well. Legal proceedings against these mandates have been threatened at U California, U Connecticut, U Indiana and Rutgers--interestingly, all state universities.

7\. People in Sydney, Australia went out to the parks and open areas yesterday despite instructions to stay home, enjoying the unseasonable warmth without masks. Will Australia's impossible "zero covid" policy remain standing?

8\. Governments appear to be testing the waters regarding what the population will tolerate vis a vis lockdown measures.

9\. The NEW BUSINESS ITEM #33 at the National Education Association’s (NEA) virtual assembly, which called for forced covid testing and vaccination of all students and staff to reopen schools in September, was [overwhelmingly defeated](https://ra.nea.org/business-item/2021-nbi-033/). One post on twitter said 81% of the delegates voted no. It seems the crowd is realizing there is almost no Covid in the US.

10\. Fourteen states offered lotteries up to 1 million dollars to encourage vaccinations. The NYT [reports](https://www.nytimes.com/2021/07/03/world/covid-vaccine-lottery.html?action=click&block=associated_collection_recirc&impression_id=21ff5e52-dcd9-11eb-8257-839fcd73df49&index=2&pgtype=Article&region=footer) there was a short burst in vaccinations then it ended, and at least 2 states have given up the lottery plan as it failed to continue to produce the desired increase in vaccinations.

11\. 47% of the total US population has been vaccinated. 8% more had just one dose, and most of them stopped after one. 67% of those over 18 have had at least one dose of vaccine; 58% have had both doses. It looks like this is where the numbers will stay. I think 40% of US adults are going to remained unvaccinated, or have decided to stop after one dose. How the government tries to corral this group into taking these dangerous vaccines will be interesting.

12\. In terms of estimating the magnitude of danger, Dr. Charles Hoffe had 900 vaccinated patients, and 10 became significantly ill after, and I think he said 5 became permanently disabled.

13\. The SIEU Nurse's union in the mid-Atlantic states, and the NY Nurses Association [have come out against the vaccine mandates](https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/unions-hospitals-showdown-vaccine-mandates), which a number of hospitals have announced will be enforced once Covid vaccines are licensed.

14\. [France has threatened to vaccinate everyone](https://www.thetimes.co.uk/article/france-enforcing-covid-vaccines-defeat-virus-z56b3kcc7) from age 24-59, maybe even everyone down to age 12.

15\. [Three hundred healthcare workers in Italy have lodged a legal challenge](https://vaccineimpact.com/2021/300-italian-health-workers-file-legal-challenge-to-mandatory-covid-19-shots-as-condition-for-employment/) against the requirement that they get vaccinated against coronavirus, according to media reports Saturday.

16\. Strangely, it has [suddenly become easier for Americans to travel to many countries in Europe](https://www.travelandleisure.com/travel-news/spain-waives-vaccination-requirement-us-visitors)\--at the same time that the Vaccien passport was rolled out, July 1. It was said that there was utter confusion at airports about how to deal with vaccine passports. It looks like the rollout was too precipitous. But it is such an inviting concept for the rulers of the world, I doubt it will be shelved for long.

# Thread: How to explain some 'correct' light basics?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-explain-some-correct-light-basics.26106/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Martha Ray — 2021-07-07T23:29:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-explain-some-correct-light-basics.26106/post-300789>

**When asked what is 'correct' intake of light?**
**Is this a reasonable answer?**

**"** This is complex, detailed and you should and anyone else wondering this should learn this directly from Dr. Jack Kruse MD. The physics and the biology explained make the 'why' much more clear.
As I understand a few of the basic 'correct' light intake basics are:

\-To **watch every sunrise** (rain, clouds, ie regardless of the weather) and then get as much of the next 2 hours of day light exposure that you can while grounding.

\-When you have a solar callus built up you can take in amounts of sun through out the day.

\-NEVER allow your skin to burn but do not use sunscreen or wear sunglasses.

\-You want to uncover the body parts that are normally covered up by clothes and cover the body parts that get a lot of exposure. Of course especially when getting any bight mid-day sun. Again, NEVER burn.
\-Watch daily sunsets as well. I usually go for a walk at sunset.

\-So it is about both natural light shinning on eyes and skin. This signals many functions within the human body.

\-AVOID blue light especially at night from LED's, Florescent lighting, regular light bulbs except RED, Computer, TV Screens and any device putting out artificial blue light. (including things like the fridge lights and night lights) Having Blue light shine on our eyes and skin signals the body that it is high noon and causes our circadian rhythm to malfunction causing a cascade of problems in the body's ability to maintain homeostasis.

\-Sleep in a totally dark room.

\-Red lights and Blue Blocking glasses can help but are not ideal.

**So much more than these elementary words... can explain.** See [https://jackkruse.com/](https://jackkruse.com/) **"**

### BiohackersTO — 2025-10-31T19:02:44+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/my-2030-thread.26121/post-361962>

> [DLO said:](/goto/post?id=300835)
>
> I will continue adding to this as time goes on.
> I wonder if the link between those that buy the vax are the same crowd that buy the carbon global warming narrative?
> With the lockdowns only reducing c02 by 15% that is not nearly enough for the climate nazi's.
> The goal is to create matrix style twin bodies to upload into to get rid of dirty polluting carbon based life forms.
> [https://venturebeat.com/2021/06/05/...l-twins-on-ramp-for-construction-real-estate/](https://venturebeat.com/2021/06/05/microsoft-paves-digital-twins-on-ramp-for-construction-real-estate/)
> One of the big funders no surprise.

Hello: were you the one who asked the question about digital twin in the recent member Q&A?

Digital twin, like every other human technology has both its nefarious/dystopian application and its helpful/utopian application.
With digital twin, the built infrastructure is reproduced in a 3D model. Sensors embedded in buildings can update parameters and various measures in real time. This can be useful for monitoring ground movements, wall shoring and many other factors that help maintain structural integrity. It can cut costs dramatically when renovations or building expansions are considered and implemented. The sensors can also be used to monitor the indoor environmental conditions to optimize for what's in the building. It probably would have great applications for large scale bitcoin miner facilities. Digital twin has legitimate, useful applications.

The problems you point to occur when the tech is used:
a) to track stupid and/or nefarious data points like C02 emissions and people's movements and social distancing.
b) when the society we live in continues to deny, ignore, censure and punish any mention of harms from nnEMFs. If we lived in societies that cared about these harms, much of the tech involved in digital twin could be installed using fibre optic cables and other wired, rather than wireless solutions.

The problem here isn't so much the tech, as it is the nefarious intentions of a few high ranking psychopaths, paired with legions of useful idiots who will do the bidding of high ranking psychopaths, without question or push back.

# Thread: Parkinson’s....Her Incredible Sense Of Smell Is Helping Scientists Find New Ways To Diagnose Disease
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/parkinson%E2%80%99s-her-incredible-sense-of-smell-is-helping-scientists-find-new-ways-to-diagnose-disease.26128/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### 5G Canary — 2021-07-10T21:40:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/parkinson%E2%80%99s-her-incredible-sense-of-smell-is-helping-scientists-find-new-ways-to-diagnose-disease.26128/post-300925>

Parkinson’s....Her Incredible Sense Of Smell Is Helping Scientists Find New Ways To Diagnose Disease

March 23, 20204:45 PM ET

[https://www.npr.org/sections/health...lping-scientists-find-new-ways-to-diagnose-di](https://www.npr.org/sections/health-shots/2020/03/23/820274501/her-incredible-sense-of-smell-is-helping-scientists-find-new-ways-to-diagnose-di)

From article.....
In fact, out of all the samples, Joy made only one mistake. She identified a man in the control group, the group without Parkinson's, as having the disease. But many months later, Kunath says, that man actually approached him at an event and said, "Tilo, you're going to have to put me in the Parkinson's pile because I've just been diagnosed."

Question... Do you think he had Parkinson’s and she smelled it and was right? Or could he have mirrored them and the environment?

Sodium bicarbonate?

### 5G Canary — 2021-07-11T17:35:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/parkinson%E2%80%99s-her-incredible-sense-of-smell-is-helping-scientists-find-new-ways-to-diagnose-disease.26128/post-300967>

I agree....definitely not mirroring in this case.

I thought it was interesting that she said he smelled of yeast a decade before being diagnosed. He was a doctor and probably worked in a bad light environment. We know fungus grows at 600x the rate in a bad nnEMF environment. It makes me curious if a cheap little box of baking soda could’ve made all the difference.... besides the obvious of completely changing the environment. I am just not sure how much longer we are going to be able to be like the wildebeest and migrate.

 [](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bank_for_International_Settlements)The Bank for International Settlements is an international financial institution owned by central banks that "fosters international monetary and financial cooperation and serves as a bank for central banks". Actually, the vax doorbell might be the least of our problems... starvation is going to be so rampant - then there will be no one guarding the borders - so the Chinese will be occupying the west coast and the south americans will be coming up through the south... then, with 2/3rds of the people dead, good luck with maintenance... there will be nowhere to run or hide if we do not stop this now - and we are not going to stop it because half of us don't even believe it...

The Deagle projections - what will our future look like with most of us dead?
[https://mediaarchives.gsradio.net/rense/special/rense\_070821\_hr3.mp3](https://mediaarchives.gsradio.net/rense/special/rense_070821_hr3.mp3)

# Thread: Smoked Oyster Deviled Eggs
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/smoked-oyster-deviled-eggs.26157/>
**Subforum:** Epi-Paleo Recipes
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### KyleMN — 2021-07-14T18:10:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/smoked-oyster-deviled-eggs.26157/post-301124>

Easy way to get some protein and seafood in the morning. Just eggs, can of smoked oysters, lemon juice, shallots, dijon, hot sauce, and avocado oil mayo.

1.  Take 6 eggs and hard boil. Drop them into boiling water for 11 minutes, cool in ice water. Peel
2.  Chop 1 shallot finely, add a few drops of lemon juice, and salt to mellow the flavor (let sit for 15 minutes). then chop the oysters finely, and to mixing bowl
3.  Peel eggs and cut in half and add yolks to mixing bowl.
4.  Add yolks, a teaspoon of mayo, and a dash of hot sauce to the mixing bowl, salt to taste. and top the egg whites.

### Plural — 2023-06-23T17:54:02+0300

> 3.  Peel eggs and cut in half and add yolks to mixing bowl.
> 4.  Add yolks, a teaspoon of mayo, and a dash of hot sauce to the mixing bowl, salt to taste. and top the egg whites.

Are you still doing this? Might have to give it a try. Oysters in Ohio is tricky, haha.

### Theka — 2021-07-15T10:43:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mindspace-framework.26164/post-301163>

I read this analysis of the NHS Propaganda campaign. It is the same here in Germany, constant radio and tv ads. I studied propaganda and motivation/influence because I wanted to understand how WW2 Germany happened. I don't really know how to not be affected by this behavioral change framework. I can see it, but I don't think that is enough.

This is the NHS critique:

[https://orthomolecular.activehosted...f59954.201&s=0d21bb67212a335e407f4646de0ba8f9](https://orthomolecular.activehosted.com/index.php?action=social&chash=85d8ce590ad8981ca2c8286f79f59954.201&s=0d21bb67212a335e407f4646de0ba8f9)

### DLO — 2021-07-16T01:11:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mindspace-framework.26164/post-301186>

Canada Germany Australia USA united kingdom, these were the freest of nations and must need targeted for depopulation and reeducation camps along with foreign replacement population

### Theka — 2021-07-16T20:37:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mindspace-framework.26164/post-301225>

> [Christine Renner said:](/goto/post?id=301191)
>
> What kind of enough is that?

I was thinking about how to keep from being affected by the propaganda. It is easy to think I know better, but the subconscious mind doesn't play games. I am careful about my words and self-talk, and I control that. This MINDSPACE propaganda is everywhere and I suspect people will be gradually worn down. The question changes IF I will get vaxxed to Which one do I prefer and before or after vacation or whatever.

### 5G Canary — 2021-07-16T22:10:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mindspace-framework.26164/post-301230>

> [Theka said:](/goto/post?id=301163)
>
> I can see it, but I don't think that is enough.

If our thoughts shape our reality what happens when we write them down and others read those thoughts? Do their thoughts also begin to shape our reality? Could this be why they wanted to control the media? Isn’t this the purpose of technology? To control our thoughts... to have collective consciousness? I think so.

You are right it is ludicrous to think we can control our thoughts in a 5G world. It is also insane to think we can outsmart AI. Where does that leave us?

We have to maintain a strong connection with nature. We have to know The Universe/God will provide for us. We need to write down what we want to happen... have people read those thoughts and create that reality. I believe we can win this invisible war by collectively willing it into reality.

# Thread: EMF Meter Readings Question?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/emf-meter-readings-question.26168/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Shane McClellan — 2021-07-16T04:09:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/emf-meter-readings-question.26168/post-301192>

I recently purchased a Trifield TF2 Meter. I have noticed that the meter gives a higher RF reading if you are touching the meter vs. having it sit untouched. The meter even reacts differently to different people touching it in the same spot with no other variables changed. It reads higher when anyone touches it but it shoots up to different levels depending on the person touching it. I called the company and spoke with an engineer about this phenomenon. He stated this is well known and each person acts as a capacitor in touching it and the reading you get when touching it is accurate reading for how the RF is effecting that individual. According to him, some people are more conductive to the RF.

Fast forward over time a bit. In the beginning I tested higher readings than my wife and weeks later we are noticing the inverse.

Does this have anything to do with our redox? What is this phenomenon exactly? Does anybody have any experience with this?

Part 2:

Alexander Semyonov – President of the Association – “Ecology of the Unknown” – pre-recorded video presentation discussing the important of Peace in Space
Timofey Egorov – Cosmonaut Trainer, General Director of “Ecology of the “Unknown – live video interview discussing the important of Peace in Space
Dr. Steven Greer – Discussion about counter intelligence capabilities to hoax a false flag.

Part 3:

Dr. Steven Greer – continues his discussion of a potential hoaxed “alien threat” and shows models and drawings of ARVs (alien reproduction vehicles).
Jim Goodall- Aviation writer and aerospace historian – comments on his conversations with Ben Rich, former head of Lockheed Skunkworks.
John Warner IV – author, son of Senator John Warner III – a recorded discussion with Dr. Greer about his family’s history in counter intelligence, some of the history of Nazi German involvement with ARVs (Alien Reproduction Vehicles) and his family member Chris Mellon’s involvement with Luis Elizando.
Richard Doty – former AFOSI (Air Force Office of Special Investigations) – pre-recorded video interview with Dr. Greer about ARVs and military involvement in abductions.
Paola Harris – researcher – a history of her involvement with Col Corso, J. Allen Hyneck and others and her research of a 1945 NM case that pre-dates Roswell.

Dr. Steven Greer – summary and thank you

There was a remarkable statistic in the latest _Flow Show_ report from BofA's Michael Hartnett: according to the CIO's calculations, "**the Fed is spending $336 million every 60 minutes buying bonds, while the US federal government is spending $875 million every hour this year",** a staggering amount made possible only by the recent merger between the Fed and Treasury which ushered in not only helicopter money but its socialist offshoot, MMT. It's also what so many monetarists argue is behind the recent surge in inflation, because Milton Friedman said best, _**"inflation is always and everywhere a monetary phenomenon."**_

# Thread: 23 and me
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/23-and-me.26205/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### DLO — 2021-07-24T22:59:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/23-and-me.26205/post-301491>

A man and his wife decided to test the accuracy of 23andMe’s at-home DNA testing kit by [sending in a saliva sample collected from their pet lizard](https://www.rumormillnews.com/cgi-bin/forum.cgi?read=175324). What they found is that the whole thing is a sham.

In the following video, the man explains how after three months of waiting, he received anomalous results suggesting that his pet lizard is 48 percent West Asian and 51 percent Ashkenazi Jewish. 23andMe also sent him a report explaining the lizard’s history and background, including what he supposedly likes to eat.

“We were shocked,” the man is heard stating.

_Rumor Mill News_, reporting on the results, noted the irony of the lizard basically testing positive for “serpent seed” DNA, seeing as how infamous globalist “lizard people” like George Soros and Lord Rothschild are of Ashkenazi Jewish origin.

**YouTube CEO Susan Wojcicki co-founded 23andMe**
The discovery is timely as 23andMe just made [its debut](https://web.archive.org/web/20210617182013/https://www.marketwatch.com/story/23andme-shares-surge-17-in-their-trading-debut-after-merger-with-richard-branson-backed-spac-11623953657) on the American stock market after merging with a Richard Branson SPAC.

23andMe was co-founded, it is important to note, by lizard person Susan Wojcicki, who currently holds the title of CEO over at YouTube. YouTube, as you probably know, is owned by Google, which is arguably the evilest corporation in the world.

Wojcicki admitted back in 2019 during an interview with _60 Minutes_‘ Leslie Stahl that YouTube pays at least 10,000 people to police and remove “controversial content” from the video platform, including videos about the Sandy Hook hoax and other false flag events.

More recently, YouTube has been pulling down channels and videos that talk about ivermectin and hydroxychloroquine (HCQ), two potential drug remedies for the Wuhan coronavirus (Covid-19) that the medical deep state is desperately trying to keep secret from the general public.

[](https://www.infowarsstore.com/organic-greens-fiber-caps?ims=mpfke&utm_campaign=greensfiberhero&utm_source=Infowars+Hero&utm_medium=banner&utm_content=greensfiberhero)
Wojcicki’s connection to 23andMe is curious because many have speculated as to the true purpose of these so-called DNA tests. Seeing as how Google has been trying to get into the pharmaceutical business for several years now, is 23andMe an extension of that designed to profile individuals and target them with new drugs?

And just what, exactly, is involved with its testing process that a lizard’s DNA would show up as roughly half-Asian and half-Jewish? Is 23andMe engaging in Asian hate and antisemitism, or is its testing process completely bogus, pulling up random identifiers and manufacturing a fake lineage surrounding them?

Something is very off about the whole thing and perhaps our readers can connect a few more dots. What is the connection between Google, YouTube, and 23andMe, and why are lizards testing “positive” for Jewish and Asian DNA?

Wojcicki has been on something of a [personal crusade](https://www.naturalnews.com/2019-12-17-youtube-banning-wrongthing-by-labeling-it-hate.html) against “hate speech” as well. She announced in late 2019 that YouTube’s “harassment” policy had been updated to more aggressively pursue offenders who say things that offend others on the platform.

One group that she has been pandering too is the Cult of LGBTQ, which as we all know is a protected group that consistently gets a free pass on social media to say or do whatever it wants without penalty. Anyone who criticizes an LGBTQ, meanwhile, faces deplatforming, demonetization or other punishment.

We [also reported](https://www.naturalnews.com/2021-02-02-coronavirus-testing-communist-china-collecting-american-dna.html) about the speculation that DNA testing is a front for communist China to collect the DNA profiles of Americans for some nefarious purpose.

“Wake up, everyone! They are collecting your samples in order to develop a bioweapon against Americans,” one of our commenters wrote. “They know we are a giant melting pot, so they have to collect as much as they can to develop a weapon that will kill everyone.”

### JanSz — 2021-07-24T23:18:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/23-and-me.26205/post-301493>

I had 23andme done years ago.
My remote nephew on my father's side has a son, both did 23andme.
They both show up on top of my report.
Trusting that report I was taking it as proof that I am my Father's biological son.
Now I am still sure, but the lizard is in the back of my mind.
There may be more, but so far nothing good or bad about half-Asians in my report.

..............

I have noticed, after using MMS / CDS, I dream even more than usually, and i am already quite a dreamer!
Also my friend and ex husband who tried the CDS on my suggestion, have told me he has crazy dreams when he take it. like being in a movie!!
I also noticed i can hold my breath longer when using it... one minute without issue, and this is very long for me! I have no good lungs since birth. It must do something with the oxygen levels?

My question is, why is this? What is the reason I dream even more when taking this.
I suppose it is a good sing?
I am pretty thrilled about this stuff, to me it seems like a real savior for shedding issues and if the viral loads are increasing from vaccinated people in the future.. I am so glad to have this at home. Also very cheap and simple to use.
What do you think, guys

### DLO — 2021-07-25T01:18:57+0300

### Inger — 2021-07-25T10:58:56+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mms-chlordioxide.26206/post-301508>

> [DLO said:](/goto/post?id=301495)
>
> Describe how you do them? Dose/Timing?

Well, I started with 1 drop MMS and 3 times/day and then I increased until about 10 drops during a week or so.. several times a day. I continued that for a few weeks and then I took a break. Now i take it once in a while, like one dose before bed, or one in the morning, it seems like when I take it before bed or during the day it makes this increased dreaming
I now tolerate quite large amount without getting any issues with nausea or bowel issues.
But I read that small amounts taken frequently is more effective so I sometimes just mix 10 drops or so in a waterbottle and drink it during the day at work.
I seem to have gotten immune to the shedding so far, I got issues in the beginning but now i have not had anything  Yay
I do not avoid the vaccinated because i want natural immunity. I trust my body can do this.
So I do not take MMS/CDS regularly anymore. Just when I remember and when I feel like it.
But always when I do take it, I notice this crazy dreaming pattern..it is quite amazing

The dreaming does not seem to depend on the amount I take.. Also small amounts seem to activate something in my brain? I wonder if it increases the oxygen in the brain.. At least it thins the blood, I am suire of that. Because when I was giving blood at red cross last time, I had taken the MMS several weeks.. and my blood was flowing so fast that the nurse said I had to not make this fist movement that one normally are encouraged to do to make the blood flow better. The bag filled up too fast!

I have no issues with hematomas or bleeding though, so it seems to be just fine that the blood get so thin.
It is very interesting.

No..haha.. I will never accept a vaccinated boyfriend! Ever. Not even kiss one.

I am not going to get into a situation where there are huge amounts of vaccinated close to me, like a concert or dancing floor. **Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mms-chlordioxide.26206/post-301866>

What are people stateside ordering to make CDS? Off amazon?

### Alex97232 — 2021-08-05T22:09:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mms-chlordioxide.26206/post-301965>

> [DLO said:](/goto/post?id=301863)
>
> [https://www.brighteon.com/4e0236ea-d410-4407-b51e-bb8672d93c41](https://www.brighteon.com/4e0236ea-d410-4407-b51e-bb8672d93c41)
> What do u guys think of this method?

The process to make CDS (Chlorine Dioxide Solution) is more than I want to take on at this point--I'd rather buy the CDS already mixed. I've ordered CDS from:
1) [www.healthy4life.com](http://www.healthy4life.com) (ships to U.S. from Australia--so, takes awhile)
2) [www.aquapuraCDS.com](http://www.aquapuraCDS.com) (ships free within U.S.)

From either site, you can order both the prepared CDS, the ingredients to make your own CDS, or the ingredients (sodium chlorite and HCl @4%) to make the CD according to the method developed by Jim Humble, who first called it MMS.
Andreas Kalcker has some good info. on everything related to MMS/CDS.

### DLO — 2022-03-29T19:15:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mms-chlordioxide.26206/post-311655>

Any idea about the 1:1 ratios use vs the more diluted [https://www.amazon.com/Oneness-Chlo...48569872&sprefix=cds+solution,aps,155&sr=8-11](https://www.amazon.com/Oneness-Chlorine-Dioxide-Classic-Liquid/dp/B08B7YQXJV/ref=sr_1_11?crid=25K0AUF9O2PJ2&keywords=cds+solution&qid=1648569872&sprefix=cds+solution%2Caps%2C155&sr=8-11)
Is the more diluted one meant just for water purification where as the 1:1 can deal with more nasties?

### Inger — 2022-03-30T20:12:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mms-chlordioxide.26206/post-311675>

nope, you always dilute it when drinking it. Like 1+1 drops MMS / 1-3 ml CDS in a glass of water.

Always remember, that 1 drop of MMS is the same as 1 ml CDS, I use only CDS as I make it myself, it is purer and safer to use I think. And you can use it undiluted on skin or brush teeth with it. It is close to PH neutral.
**MMS is never used pure on skin or teeth or drinking!**

I recommend doing the CDS yourself from the MMS. Andreas Kalcker have videos and book how to do it.

here is a link to the protocols
[https://andreaskalcker.com/en/cds-clo2.html](https://andreaskalcker.com/en/cds-clo2.html)

# Thread: mRNA vaccine and drug resistant fungal infections
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mrna-vaccine-and-drug-resistant-fungal-infections.26212/>
**Subforum:** Educating Doctors
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### DrEttinger — 2021-07-25T18:35:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/mrna-vaccine-and-drug-resistant-fungal-infections.26212/post-301514>

Thank God I am a researcher and engage in due diligence when it comes to my most important choices.

(Date of journal article 5/10/21). My FB post of 5/11/21 - [Research suggests Pfizer-BioNTech COVID-19 (mRNA-based vaccines) reprograms innate immune responses.](https://www.news-medical.net/news/20210510/Research-suggests-Pfizer-BioNTech-COVID-19-vaccine-reprograms-innate-immune-responses.aspx)

"...responses to the fungal pathogen Candida albicans were higher after vaccination. In addition, the production of the anti-inflammatory cytokine was reduced in response to Candida albicans. This also suggests a shift towards increased inflammatory responses to fungi following vaccination, say the researchers."

(Date of journal article 6/1/21). My FB post of 6/23/21 - [Deadly Fungi Are the Newest Emerging Microbe Threat All Over the World These pathogens already kill 1.6 million people every year, and we have few defenses against them](https://www.scientificamerican.com/article/deadly-fungi-are-the-newest-emerging-microbe-threat-all-over-the-world)

(Date of original article 7/24/21) Today's FB Post 7/25/21 - [Outbreaks of a drug-resistant superbug fungus spread in two U.S. cities, CDC reports](https://www.cbsnews.com/news/superbug-fungus-candida-auris-texas-washington-dc/)

Is it a coincidence that there is an outbreak of drug-resistant fungal infections in these (highly vaccinated) locations? I think not. Where there is smoke (clues) there is usually fire (truth). C-19 mRNA vaccine increases the severity and/or susceptibility to fungal infections. Combine this with wide-spread 5G (increases fungal growth) and the pan-unhealthiness of 2/3 of American's and we are now seeing the first, real, effects of a viral treatment that never went through a long-term trial.

# Thread: Viewing the Sunrise in Mountainous areas
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/viewing-the-sunrise-in-mountainous-areas.26242/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 14
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### TrevorHirschi — 2021-08-01T18:01:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/viewing-the-sunrise-in-mountainous-areas.26242/post-301823>

Hi everyone,
I’m new to the forum. I discovered Jack Kruse a few months ago on podcasts with Evan Brand and Luke Storey and have been listening to nothing but Jack’s other podcasts on my daily commute to/from work.

I’ve been steadily improving my health over the last several years which began with grounding that I was introduced to after “barefoot” running in Vibram FiveFingers back in 2008. It’s been all downhill (or maybe I should say uphill!) from there.

I was exposed to the idea that the sun is actually good for us by Nadine Artemis via “The Natural Lifestylist” Tony Riddle. I started getting more sun exposure, watching sunsets, and purchased blue blocking glasses in 2020. I never had much opportunity for getting the sunrise due to laziness or my work schedule. Since learning from Jack, I’ve increased my AM infrared exposure and am working on building a solar callus with the help from the patreon blogs.

My question I have is this. I was born and raised in, and still live in Northern Utah, 41.5\*N and about 4300ft elevation. I live along the beautiful Wasatch mountain range, right on the foothills to the immediate west of them. I’ve been using apps like “Sundial” and “Sunrise Sunset” to follow the exact times of sunset/sunrise. I have about 2 minutes discrepancy from a sea level horizon based time for sunset ~25 miles to the west Promontory mountains in the middle of the Great Salt Lake, which I can live with. However, I have about an hour late discrepancy for sunrise due to my proximity to the mountains.

How detrimental to my sunrise viewing benefits is this for me? I imagine it’s not good, but I’d like some further light shed (pun intended) on it.

Thanks!

### Martha Ray — 2021-08-06T01:50:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/viewing-the-sunrise-in-mountainous-areas.26242/post-301976>

I have a similar question...I live next to a beautiful mountain ridge with forest blocking my seeing the sun at the specific time of sunrise. I do not know, for sure, but it might still be useful to be up waiting at the specific sunrise time because light is still surrounding me when I am outdoors at that time.

Each month I print a [**Sunrise Sunset Calendar - USA Home Page**](https://www.sunrisesunset.com/usa/) Free, printable calendars with sunrise, sunset, moonrise, moonset and moon phase times for USA and other worldwide locations. **[https://www.sunrisesunset.com/usa/](https://www.sunrisesunset.com/usa/)**

Each day I aim to be up and out 5 to 10 min before sunrise and to stay outside for as much of the next 1 to 2 hours as I can get. I cover head and forearms (due to radiation damage) and expose as much bare skin as I can.

It is an ideal time for me to meditate on MP3 Bible Doctrine Lessons and ground unless inclement weather. Searching for a reasonable property that is environmentally and geographically better. I have a very, very long list of home specifics but I have faith that if needful I will find the _cleft in the rock_ I seek. While waiting on God and Time I am content and happy to know that one day I will be in place that will exceed all could ever think or imagine.

I am still new here myself but welcome you and hope you find Jack Kruse and this OHF as helpful as I have.

### Crimson Funk — 2021-09-13T08:37:00+0300

### TrevorHirschi — 2021-09-17T06:52:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/viewing-the-sunrise-in-mountainous-areas.26242/post-303830>

That's as much as I can do right now too, so I'll continue to do that every day. It feels less beneficial since the sun doesn't peak over my backyard mountains for anywhere from an hour to an hour and twenty minutes. I'm not sure what the longest time will be be as we reach the winter solstice, but it has been getting worse daily as the sunrise travels southward in the eastern sky, which happens to climb upward along an elevating range of peaks. I wish I would have discovered Jack Kruse last winter and I would have been able to watch the sunrise get better and record those times of my actual local rise daily.

Thanks for your input, Mr Funk.

### Crimson Funk — 2021-09-18T18:42:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/viewing-the-sunrise-in-mountainous-areas.26242/post-303901>

No worries

All whilst making longer term plans to move

### TrevorHirschi — 2021-09-26T07:04:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/viewing-the-sunrise-in-mountainous-areas.26242/post-304230>

For sure! And as long as that is all I can do right now, I will continue to do it. I've thought about the moving, and it's in the plans for the future. A BIG move southward has also been in my thoughts, but I just don't know how to work it yet. I do need to get grounded for the sunrise, so far it has been seeing the sunrise from my open back door. A few steps out is all it takes, but it's getting colder, and I've not been a fan of the cold for my whole life. I guess it is good for me to get that cold exposure too, and I have been doing cold showers a couple times a week, (which is a HUGE win! Anyone that knows me would agree!), so a few steps out onto the grass barefoot isn't going to be _that_ hard, really.

And yes! The ALAN I'm exposed to in the time before sunrise is red red red. It's not as good as it can be because a few years ago I thought I was doing the smartest thing by setting my my house with philips hue "smart" lights that I now know are more stupid lights with probably a ton of EMF that I should do without, but I'm trying to make small steps forward.

### JanSz — 2021-09-29T17:39:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/viewing-the-sunrise-in-mountainous-areas.26242/post-304373>

> [TrevorHirschi said:](/goto/post?id=304230)
>
> and I've not been a fan of the cold for my whole life.

When you are able, get
23andme
test.
Then look up your mother's haplotype.
Try to figure where she must have lived, that may be the right latitude for you.
Jack always thinks that the closer to the equator is better.
Personally I would rather look up a map indicating cancers. And stay away from high cancer areas (as my number 1 concern). Frequent hurricanes and earthquakes likely second. At my age I also worry about high skills hospitals, especially surgeons being not to far away.

In my case, I was able to figure out that my 5000 years ago grandma must have been in the Tbilisi area.
I have spent my first 30 years of life in Poland, north of that latitude. Always hating cold there.
By coincidence, I immigrated to the USA, and live at just about the same latitude as my grand grandma did, only slightly south of her.
Feel good here.
But also at one time, I was working for slightly over a year in Brazil. Tropical area.
At first, all was very happy. I could take the sunlight without any problems.
After few months I realized that what bothers me there were the short 12 hours days.
Always the same.

\---------------------------------
About haplotypes.
We have L haplotypes and others.
Someone with any of L haplotypes is practically different than anybody with non-L haplotypes.
Regardless of the color of their skin, they should live close to the equator.
L type usually has black skin, but not always, we have a totally white blonde as a member here and she is L.

..............

### JanSz — 2021-09-29T20:36:59+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/viewing-the-sunrise-in-mountainous-areas.26242/post-304378>

[@John Schumacher](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/23768/)
[@Christine Renner](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/25426/)

About the 5000 or 10000 grandmothers.
It is assumed, or at least it is my understanding, that if we could replicate the situation where those grandmothers lived that would be our desirable environment.
I think that may be quite a good assumption except that figuring it out may get complicated rather quickly.
One complication is Earth precession (about 26000 years), likely the "easiest" to figure (but not for me), because it is still under normal predictable order.
Other complications are listed by Velikovsky.
Variable earth rotation.
Electric Universe. The planet **Saturn** was once orbiting outside of the present solar system, along with the Earth, Mars and other objects as moons of **Proto-Saturn**.
Venus as a comet, transforming into the planet (time of biblical Exodus), that was a reason why took them 40 years to walk few miles between Cairo and Jerusalem. 264 miles as crow flies. 264/40/365=0.018 miles daily on average.
Others
reporting on Siberia mammoth's (tropical animals)(rather fresh meat)( good enough to feed dogs)----->> Earth axis must have been turned about 90 degrees from today's.

So figuring out great grandma's environment gets complicated rather quickly.

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alex-jones-mike-adams-interview-what-is-next-hopefully-not-this.26248/post-301894>

> [DLO said:](/goto/post?id=301878)
>
> Why not because of his 35+ year track record of being right more than most news agencies?
> Because your worried what people might think of you?
> When you have people calling him hyperbolic and making fun of him for pretty much his entire life yet he hasn't changed to cater for acceptance?
> My fault with him is that he has downplayed it for too long and kept the real truth from people.
> The people you are worry about, that arn't yet awake, they wont be the ones that change anything.
> They will be the ones that will sit back and watch as you get taken away. They will be the ones that will only realize it when they get taken away and no one is left to defend them.

# Thread: Best Bedding That Won't Break The Bank
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/best-bedding-that-wont-break-the-bank.26267/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 7
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Freebird — 2021-08-07T19:47:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/best-bedding-that-wont-break-the-bank.26267/post-302054>

Hey Everyone,

What is a healthy, simple bedding to get that is also economical?

I got rid of my mattress that had coil springs in it well over a year ago... and have been sleeping on an air mattress since then. It's comfy but they break after about 4-5 months. Then you have to get a new one -- and wait for the toxic smell to breathe off ( I put it outside). But you get it, it's a hassle and it's still not optimal for numerous reasons.

What do you think? Any good alternatives the doesn't require a big investment?

Thanks!

### DLO — 2021-08-08T22:01:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/best-bedding-that-wont-break-the-bank.26267/post-302116>

A yoga mat. Mercola used to have a grounded one. You'll get so much more done when your not rolling around in a giant cushion.

### DebraGM — 2021-08-09T02:13:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/best-bedding-that-wont-break-the-bank.26267/post-302121>

Then you have to get a new one -- and wait for the toxic smell to breathe off ( I put it outside). But you get it, it's a hassle and it's still not optimal for numerous reasons.
>
> What do you think? Any good alternatives the doesn't require a big investment?
>
> Thanks!

Get a natural latex mattress. Dunlop is less than talalay. I got mine at sleeponlatex.com

### Richard Watson — 2021-08-09T12:16:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/best-bedding-that-wont-break-the-bank.26267/post-302137>

I bought a hand made wool mattress 8 months ago, best thing Ive bought for ages, so warm on cold winter nights. Still use a sprung base though, but at least now the springs are well away from the body
