### John Schumacher — 2021-12-22T20:30:56+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/chinese-lockdowns-trigger-panic-across-supply-chains-prepare-your-self-for-shortage-of-everything.26725/post-307829>

> [Johan Lindstrøm said:](/goto/post?id=307790)
>
> Thanks. I do not understand many of your biological messages. They're flying over my head. Good for you. I'm miles behind you in biology knowledge. What have you done to get such a high and tidy level?

Now back to China & the Supply-Chain discussion,

I believe China is _playing_ us _(including the WEF's IMF)_ with the tactic called _"a cat's paw"._
[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?posts/307465](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?posts/307465)
[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?posts/306026](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?posts/306026)
[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.p...riendship-come-here.25436/page-73#post-305960](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/the-btc-thread-when-you-need-some-answers-love-advice-or-friendship-come-here.25436/page-73#post-305960)
​

China knows this planned-demic will fizzle out soon. They have in place the next set of world crises, which are posed to leverage China's advancement.

Just think for a moment - What advantage does shutting down the Supply-Chain do to help enrage the Chinese populous political distrust in capitalism?

Perhaps to engage the nation against [an evil world empire](https://ucsdmodernchinesehistory.wordpress.com/2010/01/29/confucian-china-and-its-modern-fate/)?​

Are we so naive to impose our paradigm _(thinking)_ onto ancient Chinese culture & beliefs, where honor of [the emperor is sacred](http://afe.easia.columbia.edu/cosmos/prb/heavenly.htm).

For example: [https://theconversation.com/how-chi...h-capitalism-to-create-a-new-communism-167586](https://theconversation.com/how-china-combined-authoritarianism-with-capitalism-to-create-a-new-communism-167586)
After his complaining argument, the author writes, "I fear that, after my childhood in communist Poland, I may have to live out my old age under a communist 2.0 regime of [renewed oppression](https://www.theguardian.com/books/2018/apr/15/the-road-to-unfreedom-russia-europe-america-timothy-snyder-review-tim-adams)."​

This is not the Chinese perspective on rule & order -> for the [emperor](https://www.latimes.com/world-nation/story/2020-10-22/china-xi-jinping-mao-zedong-communist-party) has foreseen it.

[https://www.theguardian.com/comment...-jinping-china-beijing-new-age-of-imperialism](https://www.theguardian.com/commentisfree/2021/dec/12/xi-jinping-china-beijing-new-age-of-imperialism)

An ancient Chinese understanding of the consequences of modernity is _Sui ji_. The “knowledge” that fate, fortune, chance and luck are powers given to the gods.

"Whoever does not understand ming cannot become a junzi. (Analects 20.3)... Deliberate conduct and good and bad deeds are matters of xing; prosperity and good and bad auspice are matters of ming."

There are three natures of ming.

1\. lu, good fortune
2\. zao yu, adverse encounters
3\. xing ou , chance and luck.
​

Contingency is knowing a future is not predictable as in quantum physics -> the uncertainty principle. This is an ancient Chinese term called: _Sui ji_, for random, stochastic.

During each rebirth incarnation, the gods endow a human with honor or disrespect.

"The way of the heart: Mencius’ understanding of justice" By Huaiyu Wang

[http://faculty.smcm.edu/jwschroeder/Web/ETHR1002/Global\_Jutice\_Readings\_files/11.wang.pdf](http://faculty.smcm.edu/jwschroeder/Web/ETHR1002/Global_Jutice_Readings_files/11.wang.pdf)​

When an emperor is empowered with wisdom, we _(Chinese mindset)_ do best to understand our place in the universe for when we show respect, the gods maybe pleased.​

So, what was the point of all that? Until we can put on the moccasins of our fellow human experience, it will be difficult to understand their perspective. And even when we try, our rose colored glasses will distort our view.

> [@caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/) I have not really focused on the blogs or the website at all to be very honest in the 3 years I have been a member. I have focused on more of the social media posts being time poor in the past, which is not good enough, this is one of the things I have begun to change, I have been guilty of not reading the blogs.
>
> If I am truly honest I have skimmed over them and put them in the too hard basket to come back to, however it is time to dive deep into them to understand properly.
>
> I have about a dozen open now ready for reading in Jan, I will get back to you.

Some blogs are really, really hard!
lots of the earlier blogs have a non geek section .....which would be me!
But some have such great information and I can get thru them no problem ...like the brain gut series.
We will have lots of time in the coming year .....once we get out of OZ!

One important thing ......We need to read the comments on the blogs. Jack answers specific questions that members ask. There is gold in the comments.

Jack has given us so much of his time - the least we can and must do is to read them. Sometimes it takes a few reads to get it tho.

### Laudy Cincotta — 2021-12-24T06:54:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/favourite-jack-kruse-blogs-over-the-years.26737/post-307876>

[@caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/) you are correct and we should all be reminded how much effort goes into everything JK does to help people. So much gratitude for it all and the way to acknowledge his tireless work and appreciate his efforts are to read the blogs, understand them, learn from them, fix my health, share & educate others - thats my journey and I see as one of the reasons I am here now!

### caroline — 2021-12-24T23:27:48+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/favourite-jack-kruse-blogs-over-the-years.26737/post-307904>

> [Laudy Cincotta said:](/goto/post?id=307876)
>
> [@caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/) you are correct and we should all be reminded how much effort goes into everything JK does to help people. So much gratitude for it all and the way to acknowledge his tireless work and appreciate his efforts are to read the blogs, understand them, learn from them, fix my health, share & educate others - thats my journey and I see as one of the reasons I am here now!

for me personally \[non geek\] I read through blogs and try my best to understand the over all gist of the blog. I then read it again and again if it is heavily scientific/medical.

After awhile we get familiar with the terminology and it gets somewhat easier

I can see with Tony - when he reads some of the blogs - he just gets really frustrated and puts it all in the "too hard basket"

So - because he doesn't understand some things in the blog. - he throws the baby out with bath water - so to speak.

Personally, as long as I can get the overall intent of what Jack is trying to teach us the first time around ...I am pretty happy.

Understanding comes with multiple reads down the track - sometimes much further down the track - when we connect other dots.

It is all a process of learning and understanding as we negotiate our daily life.

We are all a work in progress ...baby steps!

Jack has set the bar very high ...but, as he has always said - He won't come down to our level - He will drag us up to his level.

This is an amazing experience and an optimal health trip of a lifetime. We are pretty darn lucky that Jack cares enough to keep doing this.

Let's not disappoint ourselves.....I love the daily learning and growing and interaction with like minded people, even though, lots of days, it really hurts my head!

I am in this for the long haul ....are you?

Today is Christmas Eve in Australia.

Merry Christmas and thankyou to Dr. Kruse and everyone who participates here.

This is going to be a very interesting year for all of us.......

How will each of us move forward in 2022.....

Will we be proud and strong and unmanageable?

As Jack has said ....It will stop when we say it stops!

I want to make this coming year - 2022 - the year I put my big girl pants on and stand up against tyranny ...and say enough!

Have a wonderful Christmas season full of seafood of all kinds and some wonderful wine - with people in our life who get what we are all facing.

Stand strong, stand together, and be unmanageable!

### DLO — 2021-12-24T18:16:16+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-place-still-has-sunshine.26740/post-307894>

Basically CANU is fucked

### Richard Watson — 2021-12-24T20:28:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-place-still-has-sunshine.26740/post-307899>

Thinking about this topic more, I reckon its been 2-3 months since seeing a long lasting jet trail, though there was one a few evenings ago that produced a brief trail, and that was only when it was traveling through colder pockets of air. Its a winter thing here, depending on the weather sometimes we might see 10 or more per day.
Please dont think I dont believe there isn't some spraying dome somewhere round the world, yes most likely . But what I believe we see in this remote/ish part of the globe are vapor trails.

# Thread: ‘NZ Medical Council has blood on their hands’
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/%E2%80%98nz-medical-council-has-blood-on-their-hands%E2%80%99.26742/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Richard Watson — 2021-12-24T06:33:40+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/%E2%80%98nz-medical-council-has-blood-on-their-hands%E2%80%99.26742/post-307875>

[](https://waikanaewatch.files.wordpress.com/2021/11/blood-on-hands-graphic.jpg)

**Extract from a letter sent to the NZ Medical Council from a retired Doctor in Tauranga.**

“… the still birth rate has rocketed. Usually there are 114 still births per year for the entire country but in just two weeks Hastings alone had 9 still births in vaccinated mothers who were following your advice to get the vaccine. You are responsible for the death of those babies. You have blood on your hands. I suppose you are also in denial regarding the deaths of teenagers.

We have 2 siblings dead after the vaxathon in Christchurch – a girl aged 15 and a boy aged 17. Plus a 17 year old boy in Northland and a 13 year old in the South Island – both dead the day after their vaccination -and a 14 year old boy in South Auckland who died 2 hours after his vaccination. Also the 17 year old girl whose death should have stopped the roll out but was instead blamed, prior to any autopsy report, on the pill – which she had been prescribed some time prior so therefore the GP would have checked for clotting risk factors at that point in time.

I know a lot more about this case then you do as I know close family friends. I am also aware that the government has asked families involved with severe adverse reactions and deaths to sign waivers that come with financial settlements. This blatant attempt to further cover up vaccine failures is abhorrent, as is the gagging of the media at the cost of millions of dollars of tax payer money.

Why don’t you speak up against this propaganda ? Why do you sit quietly and do nothing while the government promotes a drug that should never have passed Medsafe? And to add insult to injury, in promoting the vaccine you have violated the Nuremberg Code in its entirety. You might like to look that up and familiarise yourself with your offences. You are all guilty of crimes against humanity. And if you think I am exaggerating, you are wrong.

I have all of your names and I have forwarded them – except for Dr Goodman, who I know is in her heart a very decent person – along with the names of Dr Bryan Betty and Dr Samantha Murton and the NZ board of the RANZCOG, to Dr Reiner Fuelmich. Dr Fuelmich is an international trial lawyer who has successfully sued large fraudulent corporations eg Volkswagen and Deutsche Bank. His worldwide network of lawyers has listened to over a hundred experts from every field of science and medicine relating to the current PCR / Covid fraud. In due course he intends to put a Nuremberg 2 trial through the International Criminal Court.

Finally, I do not wish to be associated with a scientifically ignorant organisation that has lost its ability to practice evidence based medicine, has banned open debate, censors its doctors, allows politicians to decide how best to treat patients, has abandoned the principal of informed consent and, worst of all, has broken its promise to first do no harm. I hold you in the utmost contempt as do many New Zealanders. I shall see you on the other side of history. My conscience will be clear but may God have mercy on you”.

Alanna Ratna, Retired GP, Tauranga

### Laudy Cincotta — 2021-12-24T07:18:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/%E2%80%98nz-medical-council-has-blood-on-their-hands%E2%80%99.26742/post-307879>

Wow! What a brilliant letter and what a brave doctor, there should be so many more applauded for their courage, thanks for sharing Richard.

### John Schumacher — 2021-12-24T16:31:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/%E2%80%98nz-medical-council-has-blood-on-their-hands%E2%80%99.26742/post-307886>

> [Richard Watson said:](/goto/post?id=307875)
>
> [](https://waikanaewatch.files.wordpress.com/2021/11/blood-on-hands-graphic.jpg)
>
> **Extract from a letter sent to the NZ Medical Council from a retired Doctor in Tauranga.**
>
> “… the still birth rate has rocketed. Usually there are 114 still births per year for the entire country but in just two weeks Hastings alone had 9 still births in vaccinated mothers who were following your advice to get the vaccine. You are responsible for the death of those babies. You have blood on your hands. I suppose you are also in denial regarding the deaths of teenagers.
>
> We have 2 siblings dead after the vaxathon in Christchurch – a girl aged 15 and a boy aged 17. Plus a 17 year old boy in Northland and a 13 year old in the South Island – both dead the day after their vaccination -and a 14 year old boy in South Auckland who died 2 hours after his vaccination. Also the 17 year old girl whose death should have stopped the roll out but was instead blamed, prior to any autopsy report, on the pill – which she had been prescribed some time prior so therefore the GP would have checked for clotting risk factors at that point in time.
>
> I know a lot more about this case then you do as I know close family friends. I am also aware that the government has asked families involved with severe adverse reactions and deaths to sign waivers that come with financial settlements. This blatant attempt to further cover up vaccine failures is abhorrent, as is the gagging of the media at the cost of millions of dollars of tax payer money.
>
> Why don’t you speak up against this propaganda ? Why do you sit quietly and do nothing while the government promotes a drug that should never have passed Medsafe? And to add insult to injury, in promoting the vaccine you have violated the Nuremberg Code in its entirety. You might like to look that up and familiarise yourself with your offences. You are all guilty of crimes against humanity. And if you think I am exaggerating, you are wrong.
>
> I have all of your names and I have forwarded them – except for Dr Goodman, who I know is in her heart a very decent person – along with the names of Dr Bryan Betty and Dr Samantha Murton and the NZ board of the RANZCOG, to Dr Reiner Fuelmich. Dr Fuelmich is an international trial lawyer who has successfully sued large fraudulent corporations eg Volkswagen and Deutsche Bank. His worldwide network of lawyers has listened to over a hundred experts from every field of science and medicine relating to the current PCR / Covid fraud. In due course he intends to put a Nuremberg 2 trial through the International Criminal Court.
>
> Finally, I do not wish to be associated with a scientifically ignorant organisation that has lost its ability to practice evidence based medicine, has banned open debate, censors its doctors, allows politicians to decide how best to treat patients, has abandoned the principal of informed consent and, worst of all, has broken its promise to first do no harm. I hold you in the utmost contempt as do many New Zealanders. I shall see you on the other side of history. My conscience will be clear but may God have mercy on you”.
>
> Alanna Ratna, Retired GP, Tauranga

Thank you for sharing this extract.

They have not used the feet to walk away from their convictions, but have used their feet to stand for what is right! _<- Thank you for the example._

_Let us each use our feet to stand upright._

# Thread: How do you fly a helicopter with no atmosphere?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-fly-a-helicopter-with-no-atmosphere.26744/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 7
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### DLO — 2021-12-25T01:43:24+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-fly-a-helicopter-with-no-atmosphere.26744/post-307910>

[https://mars.nasa.gov/technology/helicopter/](https://mars.nasa.gov/technology/helicopter/)

### Richard Watson — 2021-12-25T02:39:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-fly-a-helicopter-with-no-atmosphere.26744/post-307912>

But there is an atmosphere, its just devoid of oxygen, its still able to fly in a atmosphere of carbon dioxide, molecular nitrogen and argon.

### John Schumacher — 2021-12-25T03:12:35+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-fly-a-helicopter-with-no-atmosphere.26744/post-307913>

> [Richard Watson said:](/goto/post?id=307912)
>
> But there is an atmosphere, its just devoid of oxygen, its still able to fly in a atmosphere of carbon dioxide, molecular nitrogen and argon.

And since the Mars atmosphere is much thinner (less dense) than ours, the helicopter on Mars has to work much "harder" to get lift.

### DLO — 2021-12-25T22:48:17+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-fly-a-helicopter-with-no-atmosphere.26744/post-307927>

For the longest time i remember them saying that mars can't sustain life because it lost it's atmosphere

### John Schumacher — 2021-12-27T22:07:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-fly-a-helicopter-with-no-atmosphere.26744/post-307972>

> [DLO said:](/goto/post?id=307927)
>
> For the longest time i remember them saying that mars can't sustain life because it lost it's atmosphere

Mars atmosphere is: **95% by volume of carbon dioxide (CO2), 2.6% molecular nitrogen (N2), 1.9% argon (Ar), 0.16% molecular oxygen (O2), and 0.06% carbon monoxide (CO).**

**[https://www.nasa.gov/feature/goddar...-curiosity-serves-scientists-a-new-one-oxygen](https://www.nasa.gov/feature/goddard/2019/with-mars-methane-mystery-unsolved-curiosity-serves-scientists-a-new-one-oxygen)**

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/happy-new-years-from-oz.26753/post-308125>

**“It’s never too late to become who you want to be. I hope you live a life that you’re proud of, and if you find that you’re not, I hope you have the strength to start over.”**
_\- F. Scott Fitzgerald

This will be a big year for us .....full of uncertainty and a little fear of the unknown, but we are pretty proud of ourselves for having a go.

The important thing is to keep pushing forward, keep looking forward and be all in 150%

What will 2022 hold for all of us? Will we become who we want to be?

I want to be more, give more, get more of all those intangible things on this remarkable journey that make us feel truly alive and glow with vitality and joy.

I wish all of us, especially Dr. K., peace and joy and deep love and a desire to be more.....

Let's never stop pushing forward and learning and loving and living a remarkable life.

All of us here at jackkruse.com know better .....so we must do better.

We are so excited for this coming year.....

Happy New Years everyone!_

# Thread: Call for WiFi Router EMF Risk Fact Sheet
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/call-for-wifi-router-emf-risk-fact-sheet.26765/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### MichaelC — 2022-01-04T18:57:40+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/call-for-wifi-router-emf-risk-fact-sheet.26765/post-308322>

I'm just gonna throw this out there: I think it would be VERY helpful to have an easy way to communicate both the risks, as well as how to mitigate those risks, of home wifi routers, for anyone still living in urban or suburban environments and in proximity to the stray wifi of other homes or apartments. I am thinking of a simple, one-page hand out that you can easily give out to neighbors, such as the format of those that appear on the Environmental Health Trust resource page: [https://ehtrust.org/resources-to-share/printable-resources/](https://ehtrust.org/resources-to-share/printable-resources/)

I actually reached out to EHTrust some time ago to suggest that they add such a fact sheet to their resources but they didn't respond and never did.

I envision something that keeps to one page, and ..

\- States the main health risks of excessive wifi exposure
\- Explains by analogy that you would feel bad to aggravate your neighbors by blasting your stereo at full volume 24/7, so you shouldn't blast your WiFi which is just a different portion of the EMF spectrum.
\- Tells the basic steps to reduce the router's footprint, while not losing functionality - .e.g. how to look up your router's admin login URL, access the settings and lower the output so it doesn't extend for hundreds of feet beyond your home where it isn't needed, and/or disable one band of your dual band, etc.

If anyone else would find this useful and has any further suggestions as to the content or for how to get it from idea to execution (a ready to go printable PDF), please feel free to jump in.

If someone in the community here has the organizational and graphic design skills (which I'm hoping) and were interested and wanted to earn some money as a creative gig, I'd be more than willing to throw a bit of money at this to get it done. If it's something others will find benefit in and end up using also, and would like to contribute as well that would of course be welcomed too.

I know we should all be able to live on acres of land where this isn't a concern, but in the meantime while working to make that a reality it would be a good intermediate step to help mitigate the damage of being in a less rural environment.

### John Schumacher — 2022-01-04T19:20:07+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/call-for-wifi-router-emf-risk-fact-sheet.26765/post-308325>

> [MichaelC said:](/goto/post?id=308322)
>
> I'm just gonna throw this out there: I think it would be VERY helpful to have an easy way to communicate both the risks, as well as how to mitigate those risks, of home wifi routers, for anyone still living in urban or suburban environments and in proximity to the stray wifi of other homes or apartments. I am thinking of a simple, one-page hand out that you can easily give out to neighbors, such as the format of those that appear on the Environmental Health Trust resource page: [https://ehtrust.org/resources-to-share/printable-resources/](https://ehtrust.org/resources-to-share/printable-resources/)
>

>
> I envision something that keeps to one page, and ..
>
> \- States the main health risks of excessive wifi exposure
> \- Explains by analogy that you would feel bad to aggravate your neighbors by blasting your stereo at full volume 24/7, so you shouldn't blast your WiFi which is just a different portion of the EMF spectrum.
> \- Tells the basic steps to reduce the router's footprint, while not losing functionality - .e.g. how to look up your router's admin login URL, access the settings and lower the output so it doesn't extend for hundreds of feet beyond your home where it isn't needed, and/or disable one band of your dual band, etc.
>
> If anyone else would find this useful and has any further suggestions as to the content or for how to get it from idea to execution (a ready to go printable PDF), please feel free to jump in.
>
> If someone in the community here has the organizational and graphic design skills (which I'm hoping) and were interested and wanted to earn some money as a creative gig, I'd be more than willing to throw a bit of money at this to get it done. If it's something others will find benefit in and end up using also, and would like to contribute as well that would of course be welcomed too.
>
> I know we should all be able to live on acres of land where this isn't a concern, but in the meantime while working to make that a reality it would be a good intermediate step to help mitigate the damage of being in a less rural environment.

Teslaphoresis of Carbon Nanotubes

[https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/acsnano.6b02313](https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/acsnano.6b02313)​

Teslaphoresis - The directed motion and self-assembly of matter at a distance using the near-field energy of the Tesla coil is a phenomenon we term Teslaphoresis.
We elected to use single-walled carbon nanotubes (CNTs) for this initial study because of their high polarizability, anisotropy, and the relative ease of studying the electrokinetic behavior of both bulk powders and individualized nanotubes in suspension.
When a small mass of CNT powder is placed within the near-field of the Tesla coil, explosive self-assembly and growth of an individual CNT wire occurs within a few seconds.
If, instead, the CNTs are dispersed in solution, numerous nanotube wires begin to self-assemble rapidly and to combine into one or more larger parallel arrays.
Furthermore, while Teslaphoresis has the distinct advantage of unrestricted directed self-assembly, we also found that the near-field energy of the Tesla coil wirelessly powers and self-assembles nanotube circuits and remotely self-assembles parallel arrays of individual nanotubes from the bottom-up.

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

We have found that the physical limitations of conventional dielectrophoresis could be overcome by utilizing the near-field (≪ λ) radiofrequency (RF) energy transmitted by a Tesla coil.

TEP directed self-assembly of bulk CNTs into long macroscale wires. (a) TEP system with a Teflon dish containing ∼1 mg of CNT powder in a pool of 1% Pluronic water. The magnified region shows time-lapsed images of nanotube powder self-assembling and rapidly growing bidirectionally (<5 s) into a 10 cm long wire under a 30 W TEP field. Scale bars = 2 cm.

The 15 cm long nanotube wire rapidly self-assembled (∼40 s) 30 cm away from the antenna under a 100 W TEP field.

The toroid was capped with a 7.5 in. diameter aluminum disk to fabricate the 2 MHz Tesla coil’s antenna.
​

[https://pubs.acs.org/doi/suppl/10.1021/acsnano.6b02313/suppl\_file/nn6b02313\_si\_001.pdf](https://pubs.acs.org/doi/suppl/10.1021/acsnano.6b02313/suppl_file/nn6b02313_si_001.pdf)

​

_Self assembly uaing LED light stimuli_ - [https://pubs.acs.org/doi/suppl/10.1021/acsnano.6b02313/suppl\_file/nn6b02313\_si\_005.mpg](https://pubs.acs.org/doi/suppl/10.1021/acsnano.6b02313/suppl_file/nn6b02313_si_005.mpg)

Note:

The distance using in their experients. -> _30 cm_ just around a foot - 12 inches
The minimum power for a standard FM broadcast station which a construction permit applicant may request is _100 watts_ (0.100 kilowatts).​

We know the "warnings" of - 5G Wireless Communication and Health Effects—A Pragmatic Review Based on Available Studies Regarding 6 to 100 GHz

[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6765906/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6765906/)
Frequencies in the millimeter waves (MMW) range are used in applications such as radar, and for some medical uses.

The effects of MMW on the immune system of mice or rats, finding activation of the immune system at both the cellular and molecular levels (41.95 or 42.2 GHz, 19.5 μW/cm2, 0, 1, 31.5 mW/cm2, 20 min or intermittently over 3 days)

MMW modulates the effects of the cancer drug cyclophosamide. In particular, the T-cell system of the immune system was activated and various other immune system relevant parameters affected. <- _Question: Isn't an over reactive immune system an effect of the COVID virus?_

Pulsed MMWs were used (6–100 GHz, 100 mW/cm2, 200–10,000 ms pulse length) and the skin temperatures were modeled as the function of both pulse length and frequency. Peak skin temperature increased as a function of frequency up to 20 GHz, while above 20 GHz it proved to be dependent on “absorption hotspots”. In deeper regions (>2 mm), the temperature increases were very low and highest around 10 GHz.​

Sources:

[https://www.fcc.gov/media/radio/low-power-radio-general-information](https://www.fcc.gov/media/radio/low-power-radio-general-information)

[https://www.fcc.gov/sites/default/f...s\_-\_guidelines\_for\_cellular\_antenna\_sites.pdf](https://www.fcc.gov/sites/default/files/human_exposure_to_radio_frequency_fields_-_guidelines_for_cellular_antenna_sites.pdf)

[https://www.mintz.com/insights-center/viewpoints/2776/2021-09-01-whats-new-5g-september-2021](https://www.mintz.com/insights-center/viewpoints/2776/2021-09-01-whats-new-5g-september-2021)

The next-generation of wireless technologies – known as 5G – is here. Not only is it expected to offer network speeds that are up to 100 times faster than 4G LTE and reduce latency to nearly zero, it will allow networks to handle 100 times the number of connected devices, revolutionizing business and consumer connectivity and enabling the “Internet of Things.”​

Ok so what?

COVID "vaccine" after-market data is showing (at least) some of the batches were more toxic than others, as reported in VAERS. These batches perhaps many more contained this nano-carbon material.
Teslaphoresis techonology is included in many of the CDC COVID submitted US Patents.

[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/the-maskarade-continues.25360/page-49#post-305469](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/the-maskarade-continues.25360/page-49#post-305469)​

We know our wireless communication networks are ready.
We know Teslaphoresis assembles by the stimulus of light.​

_The question maybe: What benefit would this technology provide medically?_

I wish I could believe it was design for human benefit...

# Thread: How do you deal with disagreement? Differing political opinions?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-deal-with-disagreement-differing-political-opinions.26769/>
**Subforum:** Feedback/Suggestions
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Tfreeman — 2022-01-06T17:32:16+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-deal-with-disagreement-differing-political-opinions.26769/post-308424>

I have dealt with anxiety my whole adult life.

One form it comes in is when I have a disagreement or read something I disagree with — my body rejects me.

How do you deal with differing political opinions and keep a straight head and body?

How do you deal with the anxiety (and bouts of depression) of illness?

### Penny — 2022-01-06T22:06:53+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-deal-with-disagreement-differing-political-opinions.26769/post-308441>

> [Tfreeman said:](/goto/post?id=308424)
>
> I have dealt with anxiety my whole adult life.
>
> One form it comes in is when I have a disagreement or read something I disagree with — my body rejects me.
>
> How do you deal with differing political opinions and keep a straight head and body?
>
> How do you deal with the anxiety (and bouts of depression) of illness?

I just got a baby bunny - it has completely changed my house from a silent cold war into a happy joyful place I also keep a dozen chickens - they are a riot to watch - it helps to swim in the ocean - even a 30 second cold end of shower experience is mood altering in a positive way - I just listened to this podcast:

[https://uncoverdc.com/2022/01/05/ov...mild-vaccine-side-effects/?PageSpeed=noscript](https://uncoverdc.com/2022/01/05/over-48k-comments-on-who-facebook-post-claiming-mild-vaccine-side-effects/?PageSpeed=noscript)

The crib notes version:
[https://www.theorganicprepper.com/mass-formation-psychosis/](https://www.theorganicprepper.com/mass-formation-psychosis/)

It's down a ways past all the WHO comment section - with Peter Mcullough, Robert Malone and a psychologist talking about "mass formation" - not usually a huge fan of psychologists, but this interview blew me away - did you know 60% of people have no one at home... it leads them to wanting to join some group - any group - and the last thing they want is to go back to the "old normal" - because that is all computers and no human contact... if you want to know how all the smart people in your life can fall for this B.S. - this interview will explain it to you -

When I was young, I had an epiphany of how to make myself happy: 1) make someone laugh 2)help someone else out - you must have a purpose, a meaning a raison d'etre - some reason to get out of bed in the morning - there are so many people out there living the same day over and over again without purpose - volunteering might help you - connect with some kind of group of people you can relate to -

### John Schumacher — 2022-01-07T00:18:14+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-do-you-deal-with-disagreement-differing-political-opinions.26769/post-308449>

> [Tfreeman said:](/goto/post?id=308424)
>
> I have dealt with anxiety my whole adult life.
>
> One form it comes in is when I have a disagreement or read something I disagree with — my body rejects me.
>
> How do you deal with differing political opinions and keep a straight head and body?
>
> How do you deal with the anxiety (and bouts of depression) of illness?

Have you read authors who you found inspiring?

My daily sunrise therapy is a practice of graduate.

I typically, fully exposure myself towards the sunrise. I stand with feet on the moisture on the ground or grass connected to Earth's voltage. I'm positively charged; the Earth's negative charge. Our human myelin sheaths begin in our feet and travel throughout our body into our head(s). These myelin sheaths conduct not just electrical potential but photons. I allow the light to enter my eyes, looking up, then down, and to either side. Spending time in each eye location, allowing the light to hit different aspects of the back of my eyes. I love the feel of the chill of the morning over my body, allowing the chill to move up my spine and into my head. With my palms relaxed at my sides, turned towards the sun, I take a deep breathe through a partially open mouth, then exhale gently. My chest is high, my shoulders rolled back behind me, my feet are hip width apart, my knees slightly bent, my hips directly under me, my lower lumbar is in a natural curve. I typically take 30 strong deep breathes through a partially opened mouth, exhaling naturally. When I've completed 30 breaths or so, I take a powerful inhale and hold it, squeeze the muscles in my pelvic floor, drawing in my belly bottom towards the spine, I move & feel "energy" move up my spine, pushing it up into my head. My focused attention is in the middle of my head while squeezing. When my body's had enough, I let go, gently exhale, allow the "energy" I've pushed into your head to flow up out the top of my head, breathing in deeply and exhaling gently. I then bring my attention to my hands and fingers, then arms, hands and finger, feeling them in the light, then I bring my attention to my feet and toes, then legs, feet and toes -> feeling all the space my body occupies. I allow myself to feel grateful for each breath. Grateful I can see and hear. I pay attention to the morning sounds. Then I move my attention to those in my life whom I am grateful for; my goal is to feel gratitude <- this is healing. It is the Energy-In-Motion (emotion) that has the power to restore. As I inhale, I imagine I'm pulling up through my feet - Earth's energy into my body; when I exhale, I imagine I'm returning this energy back deeper and deeper into the Earth; allowing it to completely fill the Earth. <- I am connected.​

This breathing practice stopped me going under .... at the beginning I was having to do physiological sighs multiple times a day, but it worked.

Now its part of my sunrise practice, outside. Its also an avoiding covid strategy. I also do it just before going into a supermarket without a mask, it makes me feel mentally stronger about not complying. Physically I move forward into the supermarket with more confidence.

At one point I was withstanding pressure about vaccination, moved away from my family trying not to have a full on falling out, faced a bullying landlord, and credit this practice with helping me become mentally stronger.

### Johan Lindøm — 2022-01-09T15:41:56+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/omega-3-fatty-acids-dha-epa-and-ala-are-not-essential.26774/post-308525>

Any one of you have comments???
I smell misinformation or: "halftruth allways leads to a full lie" (or something like it

The following are from [https://matt-blackburn.com/blogs/news/the-clf-protocol](https://matt-blackburn.com/blogs/news/the-clf-protocol)
\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
"Omega-3s

Omega-3 fatty acids (DHA, EPA, and ALA) are not essential for human health and brain development. They are only essential to develop cancer, heart disease, diabetes, Alzheimer's, anxiety, depression, insomnia and accelerate aging.

The public was never told that when the Burrs discovered omega-3s, zinc, selenium and most of the B vitamins had not been discovered yet. The conclusions that they made about their essentiality was based on an incomplete picture (remember the NPK Justice Von Liebig story?) and they ran with it, pawning off toxic oils that were previously used to paint the walls.

Omega-3 fatty acids are highly unsaturated fatty acids (highly unstable PUFAs) which oxidize immediately in a body with heat (you're 98.6 degrees) and oxygen. It doesn't matter how perfectly preserved the fish, krill, algae, or seal oil is. It's complete poison once it enters the body.

Excess iron activates ALOX enzymes (there's 8 of them) which ADD oxygen to PUFAs. Excess aluminum in the body further spreads lipofuscin, as does ultraviolet light.

What if I came into your bedroom where you repair and rest and trashed the place? What if I filled up 70% of your bedroom with garbage? Could you get a good nights sleep if your room was full of trash? No, and your cells can't either. Lipofuscin cakes up the lysosomes of your cell which are responsible for the trending process of autophagy.

Red Pill: Autophagy cannot happen with lipofuscin in your body. In other words, detoxification is impossible.

Lipofuscin is largely a combination of PUFAs, heavy metals and estrogen which clog up your entire body and prevent oxygen from getting to the tissue. Are you starting to see a trend yet? Its all accumulations!"

\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_

This Matt Blackburn is, in my understanding, a halftruths proponent trying to sell you stuff you do not need.... [https://matt-blackburn.com/blogs/news/omega-3s-the-enemy-of-restorative-sleep](https://matt-blackburn.com/blogs/news/omega-3s-the-enemy-of-restorative-sleep). Kind of fun to see it for yourself

What do you think?

**Omega-3 fatty acids (DHA, EPA, and ALA) are not essential???**
**\=================================================**
Let's separate what essential or not essential means.
\------------
What I am saying that
it does not mean short in supply, but these discussions end with conclusions: eat more DHA.
\-----------------------------------------
Air is essential for breathing, but (usually) it is in abundant supply, just as is.
\---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
I have a book by Patricia Kane, who studied these issues, pages of which I posted numerous times,
people sick with neolithic diseases have super high DHA.
What those people are not missing
is more seafood, or at least the DHA that it contains.

...............................
I am not questioning that DHA is needed for life, or that its presence allowed life to transform into higher level.
I am questioning conclusion that we are (desperately) short in DHA intake.

.......
I even see system behind all this.
Laboratory that does DHA analysis, does not provide UPPER limit for DHA.
All kind of omega3 indexes are developed to cloud the picture.
There are likely more of these tricks.

One of the foods in the Eat to Beat Disease book is flaxseeds, because of its effects on immune function, the microbiome, DNA protection, regeneration. Instead of being anti angiogenic it is in the angiogenic list (as in normal angiogenesis, such as in wound healing). Its in rats blah blah but in section 6 of this paper [https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6567199/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6567199/)
**Dietary Flaxseed as a Strategy for Improving Human Health** says

"These data suggest that **another omega-3 fatty acid, ALA, which is enriched in flaxseed**, may have similar functional significance for the brain. When mothers of rats were fed flaxseed during pregnancy, the brains of newborn pups were heavier and contained significantly greater amounts of both ALA **and DHA** \[[52](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6567199/#B52-nutrients-11-01171)\]. In pups given milled flaxseed or flaxseed oil soon after birth, these pups showed higher brain mass, demonstrating the value of milled flaxseed particularly in contributing to early postnatal brain development \[[53](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6567199/#B53-nutrients-11-01171)\]. "

As we know oleic and palmitoleic acids are fragile molecules.

The current method of oil extraction from seeds and grains - [https://openprairie.sdstate.edu/etd/3658/](https://openprairie.sdstate.edu/etd/3658/)

_Use of petroleum-based solvents_ for extraction of oilseeds is still a common practice, despite the potential fire hazard and the toxic water pollution. The rising awareness of chemical activities created immense need for sustainable development schemes and strategies that should address the environmental impact without compromising the yield.​

There is however a search for better extraction methods

I[https://jppres.com/jppres/pdf/vol7/jppres18.441\_7.6.389.pdf](https://jppres.com/jppres/pdf/vol7/jppres18.441_7.6.389.pdf)​

Evaluating antioxidant capacity of acid lime (AL) and sweet orange (SO) seed oils while using DMSO as a potential solvent using ultrasound as the extraction methodology.
​

Even though the grain & grass-seed (flax, sesame) industry is highly funding "health" benefits of these extracted oils, the current model of extraction is really only good for the petroleum industry seeking different oil viscosity characteristics.

Please be aware of the solvent extract method used in the production of oleic and palmitoleic acid molecules, including how they are stored, shelf "life", etc.

I am not saying they are "bad" for you. I just believe most common methods of these extracts may not be "healthy" for humans.

Takk

This film is used as a kind of an challenge of our beliefs in a group on FB. My first reaction after watching the video was the complete rejection of this person "Matt" and his preaching. And this is why we have to conduct our own research. And now I have started a new journey into lipids. I am therefore grateful to have ended up in this situation. It is important to challenge our own understanding. Truth be told, the depth of Jack's writings is extremely demanding. I'm not a doctor and have a lot to catch up on. For me, reading the books Jack recommends is not enough. I need basic knowledge. However, I have been quite obsessed with fat sources for over 10 years. It all started with an interview on Super Humand Radio in the years 2012/2013, with Professor Glen D. Lawrence. I bought his book "Fats of Life". The book was incredibly challenging for me at the time, but I understood the most fundamental thing about fat. After this awakening, I have always eaten enough saturated fat. Proper dosing is key, more is not always better, and the dose can make the toxsin. There are many bodybuilders who think more is better ... and this is a bad belief when it comes to fat-soluble vitamins (steroids and hypertrophy protocols).

But it was only after I started traveling into Jack's world that I understood that food should be food and not elements of food. When I started following Jack on FB in 2018 or 2017, I understood zero. What he wrote appeared to be something from an unknown world. It was only after an interview in a podcast I had followed for a few years, that I turned 180 degrees and managed to put together the puzzle pieces from my search for optimal health. A hunt that had been going on for over 10 years. I had always followed one person at a time, participated in their exercise programs, diet programs and discussion forums, and constantly found new experts when the time was right. And December 2018 a new master appeared. However, this time the information was completely overwhelming. Complete chaos in my head of information !! And my head has hurt ever since.

### Linz — 2022-01-12T16:17:14+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/omega-3-fatty-acids-dha-epa-and-ala-are-not-essential.26774/post-308624>

Johann,

I think context is everything. Eskimos in the cold and dark need far more DHA and the fish available for them are mostly oily fish with a high DHA content. These people use their uncoupling proteins to generate heat.

Perhaps the people accumulating excess are living in artificial warm, over lit environments, consuming DHA with the wrong conformation, or they have a tropical heritage and so their uncoupling proteins are not adapted for high consumption of oily fish species.

Also the structure of the DHA is important. Seafood provides DHA in SN-2 position (planar structure) but supplements don't and the supplements don't contain Se, Iodine etc. I just skimmed a little of the film you linked but I think the minerals in the seafood are critical to keeping the DHA in a useful form and all are needed as nature provides.

DHA breaks down to form anti-inflammatory compounds - resolvins and protectins - which offer protection from unbalanced blue light in the eye. So the DHA that would have been conserved in the past is now being broken down rapidly and used to protect us.

[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2785519/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2785519/)

[https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/some-perspectives-on-fish-oils-and-dha.14227/](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/some-perspectives-on-fish-oils-and-dha.14227/)

I hope this makes some sense.

### Sue-UK — 2022-01-13T12:17:06+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/omega-3-fatty-acids-dha-epa-and-ala-are-not-essential.26774/post-308656>

> We acquire dysfunction as we age, and then a good thing can become a less good thing?

Or does dysfunction cause us to (biologically) age? This makes me think that maintaining youthful levels of SIRT1 could for example extend childbearing age, and/or delay menopause.

[https://www.mdpi.com/2072-6643/12/5/1271](https://www.mdpi.com/2072-6643/12/5/1271)
**Elevated Glucose and Insulin Levels Decrease DHA Transfer across Human Trophoblasts via SIRT1-Dependent Mechanism**
_"The suppressed SIRT1 expression and the resultant decrease in placental DHA transfer caused by high glucose and insulin levels suggest new insights of molecular mechanisms linking GDM to fetal DHA deficiency."_

Then there's omega 3s as an upregulator of the sirtuins

[https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33810216/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33810216/)
Omega-3 Fatty Acids Upregulate SIRT1/3, Activate PGC-1α via Deacetylation, and Induce Nrf1 Production in 5/6 Nephrectomy Rat Model

[https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/23806688/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/23806688/)
**Docosahexaenoic acid improves vascular function via up-regulation of SIRT1 expression in endothelial cells**

### Johan Lindøm — 2022-01-20T08:38:20+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/omega-3-fatty-acids-dha-epa-and-ala-are-not-essential.26774/post-308976>

I found this when I searched Ray Peat. Interesting thread from Jack about DHA:

"Everything Peat says are studies linked to supplemental form of DHA. I advocate seafood not a damn pill. I have told you this many times on the forum over and over. Seafood not a pill. Why? The fish oil used in most studies is not in triglyceride form and is in ethyl ester form which increases inflammation. This means it cannot be in the SN-2 position in our body. And the SN-2 is required to get into the CNS and PNS. What good is the pill or studies that use this. There is another problem. DHA in the TG form or the ethyl ester form outside of its other chemicals photo-oxidizes. This means the light the study is done in is critical. Peat never mentions that how the experiments are done affects the results. He made his living doing these flawed studies as a Phd so he never thought to control for them himself. And HE NEVER thinks about how that lack of light control affect the results, the data and what he believes. I do. The study would have to be done in the cold and dark to have any scientific power AT ALL. There are good quality SN-2 natural triglyceride fish oils, granted eating clean seafood is always optimal over supplementation. Just say the studies are a weak basis of that because they use ethyl ester.

My forum and website are not a magnum opus as some believe, it is preliminary, and not absolute and designed to be subject to change as data and ideas evolve our perceptions of human biology. This was outlined in the Quilt, which is an adaptable document. That was the origin, but the destination is determined by the redox potential of new material brought to bear on older ideas. In this way it becomes a a creative common for the biophysical sciences. In this way I breaks through academia’s and peer reviews current limitations of journals and the scientific mentality of the day. Really hope i'm wrong on this but i saw it posted up somewhere else
I just received this information from a reliable source. I am not aware of his sources, however. So, just a heads up:
“CANADIANS HAVE RUN OUT OF TIME!!!
Next week all the Provincial & Territorial Premiers will be meeting with Prime Minister Justin Trudeau & Health Minister Jean-Yves Duclos for perhaps the most important event in Canadian history. By as early as late next week the Federal Government will break Canada's Constitution Act of 1982 by imposing an unconstitutional mandate that removes the irrevocable Right To Ones Own Autonomy And Anatomy. That mandate means that every citizen in Canada no longer has the right & ability to make their own choices & decisions and that every citizen in Canada must comply with any medical treatment or experiment imposed on them by any level of government. On top of the illegal mandate that will remove your right to make your own decisions regarding your own body and path in life, the Federal Government is also going to impose the Emergency Measures Act. This Act will be applied across all provinces and territories.
The Emergency Measures Act suspends Section 2 and Sections 7 through 15 of the Charter of Rights and Freedoms for a term of up to 5 years before a Parliamentary or Judiciary review is needed for an extension.
This means no citizen will have the freedom of conscience, religion, freedom of thought, belief, opinion or expression. Nor will any citizen have freedom of peaceful assembly & freedom of association. The right to Life, Liberty & Security will be removed. The Governmental authorities can search, seize, detain, arrest any citizen or property without just cause or any legal recourse. Citizens will no longer be protected from cruel & unusual treatment or punishment & any citizen can be discriminated against by authorities based on race, national, ethnic origin, color, religion, sex, age & mental or physical disability.
The Rights & Freedoms that past Canadians have fought for & Canadians today take advantage of will all be gone by late next week. Welcome to the real live Communist Canada.”
\*\*\*For those needing a fast exit plan, we now have extended amd more affordable resources to get visas and other docs while in Mexico. So if you need to get out fast, the rest can be sorted once you’re here. So there’s no reason to be trapped.

# Thread: What’s that smell.... does electricity have a smell?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what%E2%80%99s-that-smell-does-electricity-have-a-smell.26780/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 5
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### 5G Canary — 2022-01-12T17:06:59+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what%E2%80%99s-that-smell-does-electricity-have-a-smell.26780/post-308628>

I am one of those people that can smell everything... I recently shared an article about a woman that could smell Parkinson’s and it was a yeast-like smell. I’ve been smelling a chlorine-like smell for a few years now and finally started connecting some dots....

link...
[Does electricity have a smell? - Drax](https://www.drax.com/electrification/does-electricity-have-a-smell/)

Dr. Rob...

“There is now emerging evidence that electrostatic forces are also at play with the binding of the spike protein to the ACE2 receptor!

[https://nature.com/articles/s41598-020-71188-3…](https://t.co/jyalvo5P78)

Function from Structure is how life tries to conserve both energy and information!

The structures of atoms, amino acids and proteins determine how they play and just as importantly, who they play with.

The Spike protein “plays” with ACE2 b/c of it’s specific structure!

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

The S1 subunit of the spike protein is V-shaped and at the apex of the V is the RBD which has a gentle concave surface with ridges.

The ACE2 receptor is a membrane protein metallocarboxypeptidase. It has a planar shape also with some notable ridges.

[Understanding the role of ACE-2 receptor in pathogenesis of COVID-19 disease: a potential approach for therapeutic intervention | SpringerLink](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s43440-021-00303-6)

The ACE2 binding surface is overall negatively charged (cathode) while the corresponding RBD interface is positive (anode). Therefore electric dipole moments arising from electrostatic interactions can be generated.

[Exploring the Role of Glycans in the Interaction of SARS-CoV-2 RBD and Human Receptor ACE2](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC8156887/)

Both the viral Spike and the host receptor ACE2 are densely glycosylated with asparagine linked N-glycans.

Some of these glycans are located near the RBD-ACE2 interface and are critical to pathogen-host interactions.

For example, the RBD glycan is an FA2 type,as such carries a charge.

There is growing evidence that the glycan at Asn343 on the RBD plays a critical role during viral infection and affects the RBD-ACE2 affinity via long-range electrostatic forces.

[Exploring the Role of Glycans in the Interaction of SARS-CoV-2 RBD and Human Receptor ACE2](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC8156887/)

Indeed, it has been found that the deletion of Asn343 removes repulsive electrostatic forces between the negatively charged FA2-sialated tips and the overall negative ACE2 surface, thereby increasing stability.

The functional relevance of this RBD-Asn343 glycan is reflected by the fact that it is highly conserved in SARS-CoV-2 sequences and it’s removal leads to a 20-fold decrease in infectivity!

It is thought that Asn343 facilitates the transition to the RBD-up (open) Spike conformation, so, although it reduces RBD affinity to the ACE2 receptor it also enhances infectivity by shifting the spike up.

[Researchers Discover Hidden SARS-CoV-2 ‘Gate’ That Opens to Allow COVID Infection](https://ucsdnews.ucsd.edu/pressrelease/researchers-discover-hidden-sars-cov-2-gate-that-opens-to-allow-covid-infection)

The trimeric SARS-CoV-2 S protein has two distinctive states: closed state and open state and they both have totally different secondary structures and therefore produce different IR spectra.

[Structural and functional properties of SARS-CoV-2 spike protein: potential antivirus drug development for COVID-19 | Acta Pharmacologica Sinica](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41401-020-0485-4)

From the S1 to S2 closed state (down), the IR spectra has a 2.57 cm−1 blue shift - Blue shift is a shift towards a shorter wavelength of light (higher frequency), and therefore higher energy.

Whereas, the peak in the open state has a 3 cm−1 red shift.

[AI-based spectroscopic monitoring of real-time interactions between SARS-CoV-2 and human ACE2](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC8256048/)

This is not surprising because the cleavage sites of the RBD contain an unusually high % of aromatic amino acids (15 tyrosines, 2 tryptophans, and 14 phenylalanines) and aromatic amino acids have a “cloud” of pi electrons that are able to absorb UV light ➡️ high energy electrons.

So, in the light of the topology of the structures involved with the SARS-CoV2 virus and their potential for electrostatic interactions, how might St Elmo’s Fire and the Catatumbo Lightning be relevant to the pathogenesis of Covid-19?

As Above so Below!

A Corona discharge involves two asymmetric electrodes; one highly curved (such as the tip of a needle, or a Spike Protein) and one of low curvature (ACE2 receptor).

The high curvature ensures a high potential gradient around one electrode for the generation of a plasma.

Coronas can be used to generate charged surfaces, which is an effect used in electrostatic copying otherwise known as photocopying, whereby the electrical energy is converted mainly into thermal energy.

A Corona discharge is always accompanied by a loss in Power!

So you can end up with:

•Electromagnetic interference
•Purple glow (uv light - photoelectric effect)
•Ozone production
•Insulation damage
•Reduction in nitric oxide

All of which could be argued are involved in the pathophysiology of Covid 19.

If the curved electrode (spike protein) is +ve wrt the flat electrode (ACE2 receptor), it is said to be a positive corona;

A positive corona is a uniform plasma across the length of a conductor. It can be seen glowing blue, with much of the emissions in the ultraviolet range.

The electrons in a positive corona are concentrated close to the surface of the curved conductor, in a region of high-potential gradient (and therefore the electrons have a high energy).

Electrostatic discharges in this area would be expected to generate Ozone.

This “electric odour” was first observed by Dr Van Marum in 1785 when he passed oxygen through an electric spark.

Indeed, the name Ozone is derived from the Greek word “Ozein” - meaning - to smell.

“Nature” has learnt to utilise this highly reactive form of oxygen, as part of it’s defensive mechanism against stressors such as; UVR, bacteria and even viruses!

However, like many things in life, the dose maketh the poison!

And too much ozone can have destructive consequences.

For example, prolonged or inappropriate exposure can lead to Pulmonary Fibrosis.

[A new model of progressive pulmonary fibrosis in rats - PubMed](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/8342914/)

[https://erj.ersjournals.com/content/erj/43/4/1124.full.pdf](https://erj.ersjournals.com/content/erj/43/4/1124.full.pdf)

And, Methylation

[http://www.ag-myresearch.com/uploads/1/3/8/6/13864925/2014\_bind\_epigen.pdf](http://www.ag-myresearch.com/uploads/1/3/8/6/13864925/2014_bind_epigen.pdf)

[Acute inhalation of ozone induces DNA methylation of apelin in lungs of Long-Evans rats - PubMed](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/29947284/)

Amyloid production.

[Oxidative stress caused by ozone exposure induces β-amyloid 1-42 overproduction and mitochondrial accumulation by activating the amyloidogenic pathway - PubMed](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/26197225/)

And even Senescence!

[Ascorbic acid, a familiar small molecule intertwined in the response of plants to ozone, pathogens, and the onset of senescence - CONKLIN - 2004 - Plant, Cell &amp; Environment - Wiley Online Library](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1111/j.1365-3040.2004.01203.x)

[https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/26197225/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/26197225/)

Here's the study

Longitudinal analysis reveals high prevalence of Epstein-Barr virus associated with multiple sclerosis
[https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.abj8222](https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.abj8222)​

Multiple sclerosis (MS) is a chronic inflammatory demyelinating disease of the central nervous system of unknown etiology.
The demyelination in the brain and spinal cord is an immune-mediated process

(1) possibly triggered by a viral infection
(2). Among the putative causal agents, the top candidate is Epstein-Barr virus (EBV)
(3). EBV is a human herpesvirus that after infection persists in latent form in B lymphocytes throughout the life of the host
(4). A causal role of EBV is supported by the increased MS risk after infectious mononucleosis
(5), elevated serum antibody titers against EBV nuclear antigens (EBNAs).​

Multiple Sclerosis Is Likely Caused by a Virus, Finds Study of 10 Million Military Personnel

[https://www.technologynetworks.com/...study-of-10-million-military-personnel-357493](https://www.technologynetworks.com/immunology/news/multiple-sclerosis-is-likely-caused-by-a-virus-finds-study-of-10-million-military-personnel-357493)​

What is interest is they now believe that they will be able to develop a vaccine with antivirals against EBV with the aim of eradicating MS.

_Do you trust them?_

### JanSz — 2022-01-16T22:44:14+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/for-those-that-say-organic-food-is-a-scam.26787/post-308790>

To eat really organic food, we need a time machine to get us to the time when Egyptian pyramids were built.
Sometimes I am thinking that the last time I ate organic food was in 1945.
In Poland, my parents' chickens were roaming freely around many acres, picking up what they were able to find.
One chicken was far away from another.
So, their eggs or their meat must have been organic.
Not really, the fields were covered with factory-manufactured fertilizer.
At the same time, If I had to compare them to organic eggs or chicken today in the USA, there is no comparing.
So, one can say it is all relative.
But I do not think we should even call the organic food available today, really organic. Caricature of organic, yes.
On a somewhat tight budget, spending $$ on today's organic food is fooling oneself.
On a better budget, just eat what you desire, but do not brag that you are eating organic (or better food).

There is a number of oxymorons. Low-fat organic milk is one of them.

.......

Axial Bone Osteogenic Loading-Type Resistance Therapy Showing BMD and Functional Bone Performance Musculoskeletal Adaptation Over 24 Weeks with Postmenopausal Female Subjects

[https://www.longdom.org/open-access...opausal-female-subjects-2329-9509-1000146.pdf](https://www.longdom.org/open-access/axial-bone-osteogenic-loadingtype-resistance-therapy-showing-bmd-andfunctional-bone-performance-musculoskeletal-adaptation-over-24-weeks-withpostmenopausal-female-subjects-2329-9509-1000146.pdf)​

[Effects of a short-term resistance program using elastic bands versus weight machines for sedentary middle-aged women](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/18714245/)

[https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/18714245/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/18714245/)
​

Resistance Band Exercise Training Prevents the Progression of Metabolic Syndrome in Obese Postmenopausal Women

[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC8219266/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC8219266/)
Old people often perceive exercise participation as difficult because of equipment expenses and accessibility, and the results of this study reveal _resistance bands_ and effective alternative to using free weights or weight machines to improve risk factors for MetS.
​

Effect of a 1-year elastic band resistance exercise program on cardiovascular risk profile in postmenopausal women

[https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/29787478/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/29787478/)
Based on the results obtained in this study, it can be said that progressive resistance training with elastic bands has positive effects on body composition and lipid profile in postmenopausal women. Specifically, the benefits are related to a decrease in waist circumference, body weight and CRP values.​

 [](https://stockmarketobservations.files.wordpress.com/2013/01/long-wave-in-economic-life-by-n-d-kondratieff.pdf)[stockmarketobservations.files.wordpress.com/2013/01/long-wave-in-economic-life-by-n-d](https://stockmarketobservations.files.wordpress.com/2013/01/long-wave-in-economic-life-by-n-d-kondratieff.pdf)

So, this guy was an economist and Stalin tasked him to create a system - when he looked at the past, he found everything is a cycle - economic cycles seem to last around 50 years... so he told Stalin that and was executed because if cycles are cycles, one cannot control cycles... but one can learn from them to predict the future... and in using this theory, I believe Martin Armstrong's Socrates computer is so spot on because of this...

# Thread: Biden withdraws vaccine mandate and the collapse of the rule of law...
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/biden-withdraws-vaccine-mandate-and-the-collapse-of-the-rule-of-law.26810/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Penny — 2022-01-26T21:29:18+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/biden-withdraws-vaccine-mandate-and-the-collapse-of-the-rule-of-law.26810/post-309236>

[https://www.armstrongeconomics.com/...=Newsletter&utm\_medium=Email&utm\_campaign=RSS](https://www.armstrongeconomics.com/international-news/rule-of-law/biden-withdraws-vaccine-mandate-the-collapse-of-the-rule-of-law/?utm_source=Newsletter&utm_medium=Email&utm_campaign=RSS)

They have misinterpreted everything for decades to increase their parasitical power....

### JanSz — 2022-01-26T23:31:24+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/biden-withdraws-vaccine-mandate-and-the-collapse-of-the-rule-of-law.26810/post-309239>

> [Penny said:](/goto/post?id=309236)
>
> [https://www.armstrongeconomics.com/...=Newsletter&utm\_medium=Email&utm\_campaign=RSS](https://www.armstrongeconomics.com/international-news/rule-of-law/biden-withdraws-vaccine-mandate-the-collapse-of-the-rule-of-law/?utm_source=Newsletter&utm_medium=Email&utm_campaign=RSS)
>
> They have misinterpreted everything for decades to increase their parasitical power....

This is what is WRONG with our rule of law. The Supreme Court held before that the Constitution is [NEGATIVE](https://www.armstrongeconomics.com/research/rule-of-law/harris-v-mcrae-448-u-s-297-1980/), not positive back in 1980. But that ruling has been largely ignored. In addition, the Supreme Court has held that there is a limitation to the Judicial Power that there must be a “[case or controversy](http://law2.umkc.edu/Faculty/projects/ftrials/conlaw/caseorcontroversy.htm)” according to Article III. That interpretation is what is destroying the United States. Biden and Congress can may any damn law they want. They can literally decree that you must kill your firstborn on an altar before the White House and pray to Schwab, Gates, and Soros when you make that sacrifice. Nobody would have “standing” to run to the Supreme Court to say this is unconstitutional and completely nuts.

**The ONLY person who would have “standing” to challenge this crazy decree is someone they try to prosecute for not sacrificing their firstborn**. Therein lies our demise of the United States. They get to do whatever they want. It is our obligation to take them to court and say this is unconstitutional. In the meantime, they inflict all kinds of chaos and harm and this is why the United States is doomed.

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-irs-will-soon-require-selfies-for-online-access.26813/post-309288>

[https://krebsonsecurity.com/2022/01/irs-will-soon-require-selfies-for-online-access/](https://krebsonsecurity.com/2022/01/irs-will-soon-require-selfies-for-online-access/)

### Dan2 — 2022-02-05T05:50:42+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/the-irs-will-soon-require-selfies-for-online-access.26813/post-309568>

[https://childrenshealthdefense.org/defender/bb-shaq-rips-covid-vaccine-mandates/](https://childrenshealthdefense.org/defender/bb-shaq-rips-covid-vaccine-mandates/)

\[Edited excerpt from
[https://www.foxbusiness.com/politics/irs-facial-recognition-software-taxpayers-ban-legislation](https://www.foxbusiness.com/politics/irs-facial-recognition-software-taxpayers-ban-legislation)\]

"The Internal Revenue Service (IRS) would be barred from using facial recognition software on taxpayers under new legislation introduced Friday in Congress. Rep. Bill Huizenga, R-Mich., authored the bill after learning more about the IRS’ plan to require users of its online tax payment system to provide a selfie to a third-party company in order to access their accounts.

Huizenga raised concerns about the sensitive data being vulnerable to hackers and expressed distrust in the IRS after the agency targeted conservative groups during the 2012 election to see if they were violating tax-exempt status.

Huizenga is not alone in his concern. Democrats and privacy advocates alike raised alarms after the IRS announced its facial ID plans with the third-party vendor ID.me that reportedly has a $86 million contract with the IRS."

p.s.
I know that in order to avoid further thyroid problems I will need to stay on every am sunrise.

Yes, since it is from pigs, it is a natural thyroid supplement.
You can use it to support your lagging thyroid production.
Average body production is about 3 to 5 grains.
1grain=60mg
The tablets you have are 60mg each
Try to stay within 2-3 tablets a day.
\---
Measure your pulse and temperature under the armpit.
Your aim is to get, 36.6C in the morning while you are still in bed, just woken up.
At the same time, you do not want to have an overly high resting pulse.

Thyroid hormones are made from iodine and selenium.
You may be low on them.

Other than seeing sunlight, you must think in terms of supporting good Circadian Rhythm.
How well you do in that respect you may figure by checking your cortisol level at different times of the day.

You may want to get tested. You can get this test over internet.

# Thread: Disulfiram might be protective against lung damage in COVID
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/disulfiram-might-be-protective-against-lung-damage-in-covid.26850/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Penny — 2022-02-11T18:50:53+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/disulfiram-might-be-protective-against-lung-damage-in-covid.26850/post-309944>

[https://principia-scientific.com/de...ptoms/?utm\_source=feedburner&utm\_medium=email](https://principia-scientific.com/decades-old-drug-may-help-protect-against-severe-covid-symptoms/?utm_source=feedburner&utm_medium=email)

"A drug that was approved by U.S. regulators more than 70 years ago may help protect against two major [COVID-19](https://www.theepochtimes.com/t-covid-19) symptoms, according to a new study.

Disulfiram, approved to treat alcoholism, protected rodents infected with COVID-19 from lung injury in the preclinical study done by researchers at Weill Cornell Medicine and Cold Spring Harbor Laboratory.

Certain white blood cells called neutrophils form inside some people suffering from COVID-19, damaging the lungs. No drugs have yet been found to prevent this from happening, researchers said.

Disulfiram, though, dramatically reduced the formation of neutrophil extracellular traps (NET), which cause fluid to accumulate in the lungs and sometimes lead to blood clots.

Researchers dosed the mice with disulfiram a day before and three hours after infecting them with the virus that causes COVID-19. Some 95 percent of those mice survived, compared to 40 percent not treated with the drug.

The new study and a previous one that linked disulfiram with reduced NET formation and improved survival “suggest that disulfiram could be useful in the management of pathologies involving NETs, including lung injuries, sepsis, thrombosis, and cancer,” the researchers said in [the paper](https://insight.jci.org/articles/view/157342), which was published by The Journal of Clinical Investigation on Feb. 8."

One wonders where they got a virus to test with as Yeadon said no one has it...

# Thread: Purple Rain or Reign?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/purple-rain-or-reign.26852/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### 5G Canary — 2022-02-12T03:28:06+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/purple-rain-or-reign.26852/post-309958>

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

A recent visit to Charlotte revealed black lights everywhere. Very strange to see. After doing a little research it appears black lights are showing up in all the major 5G cities. I also noticed they put them in the high schools in our small rural area. An entire high school campus that just opened in 2020 to a quarantined world glows all purple across the entire campus.

The news is claiming all different stories from bad bulbs that changed colors to bulbs with peeling lenses. Officials in Charlotte have also stated they aren’t going to change them now because of the cost. This mixed with an admission they are defective. This make sense? No warranties? Apparently that’s where they draw the line at spending our tax money.

In addition to the street lights turning purple I have noticed a big uptick in the color purple with marketing. Everywhere you look they are showering us in purple. It makes me curious what exactly the color purple and the black lights do to us physically and mentally/subconsciously?

There are a few conspiracy videos on these and the comments are flooded with people from all over the world reporting the same observations.

Just a few...

[https://www.wspa.com/news/why-are-street-lights-across-the-upstate-turning-purple/amp/](https://www.wspa.com/news/why-are-street-lights-across-the-upstate-turning-purple/amp/)

[https://journalnow.com/news/local/a...cle\_0df2eda0-4246-11ec-a688-27cbbbca5fc7.html](https://journalnow.com/news/local/ask-sam-why-do-some-winston-salem-street-lights-look-purple/article_0df2eda0-4246-11ec-a688-27cbbbca5fc7.html)

# Thread: Horror in Mexico: dozens of birds mysteriously died in mid-flight
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/horror-in-mexico-dozens-of-birds-mysteriously-died-in-mid-flight.26853/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### 5G Canary — 2022-02-13T01:42:25+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/horror-in-mexico-dozens-of-birds-mysteriously-died-in-mid-flight.26853/post-309982>

Horror in Mexico: dozens of birds mysteriously died in mid-flight....

I would definitely cross Cuauhtemoc area off the list if looking to migrate to Mexico... yikes!

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

It’s a Mexican state that borders New Mexico, United States.... an Interesting side note it’s home to the Mexican stock exchange and these yellow-headed cowbirds migrated from Canada to various regions of Mexico to spend the winter.

The city of Cuauhtémoc, in the Mexican state of Chihuahua, was the epicenter of an event rarely seen. Captured by the security cameras of a building in the area, you can see the exact moment in which dozens of birds rush to the ground, all at the same time. Upon resuming the flight, much of the flock had died. The video, which began to circulate on social networks and news sites, generated confusion throughout the community and experts. They still could not find an explanation for what happened.

[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cuauhtémoc,\_Mexico\_City](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cuauht%C3%A9moc,_Mexico_City)

# Thread: What are the benefits of evening sunlight? More red light exposure?
