**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### MattD1995 — 2022-02-14T01:01:53+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-are-the-benefits-of-evening-sunlight-more-red-light-exposure.26855/post-310015>

I get my morning sun every day as well my mid day sun for vitamin D. I haven’t heard Jack discuss evening sun much, but I have heard him recommend watching both the sunrise AND the sunset. What are the benefits of sunset? More infrared light? I noticed that sunset leaves me feeling much calmer and more zen then either morning or mid day sun.

### April — 2022-02-15T03:23:15+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-are-the-benefits-of-evening-sunlight-more-red-light-exposure.26855/post-310068>

Yes to red light. There is also an increase in blue then sharp drop in blue signaling sunset for your circadian rhythm. I believe 3hrs after last blue light exposure is when melatonin begins to be released.

### Tim Enright — 2022-02-16T05:45:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/healing-effects-of-am-pm-sunlight.26864/post-310156>

greetings!

somewhere in my travels i read the morning sunlight on the skin provides protection for the midday sun and evening sunlight on the skin helps heal the skin after midday exposure.

i am not having much luck finding the research on this. does anyone know where to find it?

### caroline — 2022-02-16T07:25:45+0200

### crix — 2022-02-16T13:27:56+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/healing-effects-of-am-pm-sunlight.26864/post-310162>

The papers will use somewhat different language to discuss this. Try searching for terms like "near-infrared light pre-conditions skin", "red light protects from uv photodamage", and so forth. This near-infrared light is present in massive amounts in AM/PM solar rays.

<[https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0022202X15402362](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0022202X15402362)\>

What is your preferred way to deal with all this?

..........

### Katie Durham — 2022-02-20T21:17:29+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/this-is-a-fantastic-compendium-of-all-the-things-ivermectin-can-do-for-you.26870/post-310332>

> [JanSz said:](/goto/post?id=310299)
>
> What is your preferred way to deal with all this?

That's easy. Make sure the treatment cocktail includes one or more drugs that pass the blood brain barrier. There are a great many drugs that have been repurposed for Covid, some prescription, some OTC. So it depends what you have available to you and what mechanisms you want covered. Fluvoxamine (an SSRI drug that crosses the BBB) is very promising but I wasn't able to get a prescription for it.

The following are on my list of possible OTC medications for which there are good published studies that they can be effective against some aspect of Covid and that they do cross the BBB, but the formulation might make a difference whether enough crosses the BBB. Curcumin, quercetin, azithromycin, nigella sativa, bromhexine, famotidine, NAC, niacinamide, artemesia annua, CBD. Ivermectin (with zinc) might be enough to resolve the illness, or it might not be able to prevent Long Covid from developing if it can't reach everywhere it needs to.

**1)** atypical lipomatous tumor/well-differentiated liposarcoma; **2)** dedifferentiated liposarcoma; **3)** myxoid liposarcoma; **4)** pleomorphic liposarcoma; and **5)** myxoid pleomorphic liposarcoma.[\[5\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Liposarcoma#cite_note-pmid34191084-5) ([Pleomorphic](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pleomorphism_\(cytology\)) indicates the presence of cells that have abnormal and often large variations in their size and shape and/or the size and shape of their nuclei.)

Mr. Gigi Becali, the owner of Romanian soccer team Steaua Bucharest and former member of parliament, has sensationally announced the club is not allowing vaccinated players to play anymore because they are ‘powerless’ and they lose their strength. He gave examples of several players who were damaged after taking Covid vaccines. Becali declared that people who are vaccinated against the virus die in hospitals, as opposed to those who have refused the jabs. His statement has drawn a furious reaction from the country’s government.

Romania is one of eight countries with a vaccination rate below 60%, with the other consisting of Slovenia, Croatia, Serbia, Hungary, Slovakia, Poland and Russia.

# Thread: Using DMSO Correctly
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/using-dmso-correctly.26916/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Freebird — 2022-03-21T03:23:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/using-dmso-correctly.26916/post-311334>

DMSO is particularly powerful and can readily absorb toxins from materials that it touches.

Does anyone have any specific insights on what MATERIALS are OK to use with DMSO - like with your measuring spoons, etc.?

### Inger — 2022-03-21T21:32:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/using-dmso-correctly.26916/post-311354>

> [Freebird said:](/goto/post?id=311334)
>
> DMSO is particularly powerful and can readily absorb toxins from materials that it touches.
>
> Does anyone have any specific insights on what MATERIALS are OK to use with DMSO - like with your measuring spoons, etc.?

A regular metal spoon is fine, glass is fine, but avoid plastic. Especially rubber type plastic. DMSO dissolves that. My DMSO book says to use a regular metal spoon

MMS/CDS is where you need to avoid metals, because it oxidizes metals. It is different.

### Freebird — 2022-03-22T03:49:34+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/using-dmso-correctly.26916/post-311361>

Thanks Inger! Good to know. And I already happen to have stainless steel measuring spoons so -- one less thing to do.

For making and storing CDS I use glass and for dispensing it I use a plastic syringe.

After 1,5 years of work we put together an ECI - 15 pages summary and 70 pages of legal background debate - which was accepted by EU in 2021 October.
Signature collection started 2022 March 1. and lasts for 1 year, until 1. March 2023.
We need 1 million signatures plus the minimum number of signatures for each EU country ( threshold) in order the case to be placed in front of the EU Parliament.
Please sign and share on your social media platforms you are part of!
Only EU citizens and/or residents can sign.
Thank you!

### Johan Lindøm — 2022-03-26T12:06:57+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/same-plan-in-ukraine-yugoslavia-the-weight-of-chains.26928/post-311567>

The Fog of War: Eleven Lessons from the Life of Robert S. McNamara is a 2003 American documentary film about the life and times of former U.S. Secretary of Defense Robert S. McNamara illustrating his observations of the nature of modern warfare. The film was directed by Errol Morris and features an original score by Philip Glass. The title derives from the military concept of the "fog of war" depicting the difficulty of making decisions in the midst of conflict.

The film won the 2003 Academy Award for Best Documentary Feature and Independent Spirit Award for Best Documentary Feature. It was non-competitively screened at the Cannes Film Festival.

If you wish to support this channel and the effort put into selecting, finding and uploading these valuable historical works, you may do so either directly through paypal or by downloading and using the revolutionary Brave browser via this referral link
[https://www.bitchute.com/video/yy7xg5eGCOR1/](https://www.bitchute.com/video/yy7xg5eGCOR1/)

# Thread: NATO: Countering cognitive warfare: awareness and resilience
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/nato-countering-cognitive-warfare-awareness-and-resilience.26930/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Johan Lindøm — 2022-03-26T13:31:46+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/nato-countering-cognitive-warfare-awareness-and-resilience.26930/post-311571>

The Alliance faces a range of challenges in emerging domains of conflict. These domains can arise from the introduction of new and disruptive technologies. The domains of space and cyber, for example, came out of developments in rocket, satellite, computing, telecommunications, and internetworking technologies. The increasingly widespread use of social media, social networking, social messaging, and mobile device technologies is now enabling a new domain: cognitive warfare.
[https://www-nato-int.translate.goog...sl=en&\_x\_tr\_tl=es&\_x\_tr\_hl=es&\_x\_tr\_pto=op,sc](https://www-nato-int.translate.goog/docu/review/articles/2021/05/20/countering-cognitive-warfare-awareness-and-resilience/index.html?_x_tr_sl=en&_x_tr_tl=es&_x_tr_hl=es&_x_tr_pto=op%2Csc)

### Marko Pollo — 2022-03-31T18:07:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/finally-a-real-privacy-phone.26934/post-311699>

How is this service delivered? Satellite? Towers? Fiber Optic? Coverage area? Thanks.

### DLO — 2022-03-31T18:14:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/finally-a-real-privacy-phone.26934/post-311700>

I'm hoping everyone contributes what they learn here.
They piggy back existing towers but they use machine to machine communication with no servers so no storage. Which also gets by the requirement of a physical simcard all you need to sign up for this phone service is a email address and payments are third party.
This is the principle of designed ignorance. Hence even if the main company is hacked they dont have anyway to log or get any old data.

### Marko Pollo — 2022-03-31T18:30:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/finally-a-real-privacy-phone.26934/post-311701>

I just tried to ask a question in the chat box. Told me they needed my email address because they were so busy, which didn't appeal to the desire for privacy which interested me in first place. Sounds like a great thing but I don't have any large carrier cell service where we are and hate to show all my cards to hear about a product that isn't even available in my locale. Thanks for the quick reply Mito friend from the North. I enjoy your perspectives.

### DLO — 2022-04-16T23:32:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/chicken-and-cows-going-kaput-in-the-states.26943/post-312214>

As you may recall, [ten days ago I warned](https://foodcollapse.com/2022-04-06-he-planned-starvation-grain-deliveries-by-rail-to-be-partially-halted.html) that rail carriers were declaring “force majeure” and halting shipments of grain to dairy herds and other cow herds across America. In that announcement, I also warned that this was an engineered collapse of the food supply, where rail carriers were essentially being ordered to drop certain loads in order to maximize the coming wave of food scarcity and famine.

Now, devastating news from CF Industries — one of the largest fertilizer producers in the world — confirms the engineered food collapse plan is being expanded to include fertilizer shipments.

According to an [April 14th announcement from CF Industries](https://www.cfindustries.com/newsroom/2022/union-pacific-shipping-restrictions), Union Pacific is halting the delivery of fertilizer shipments right in the middle of peak planting season for farmers. CF Industries warns that, “railroad-mandated shipping reductions \[will\] result in nitrogen fertilizer shipment delays during the spring application season and that it \[will\] be unable to accept new rail sales involving Union Pacific for the foreseeable future.”

This means that Union Pacific is essentially dropping fertilizer shipments and grain shipments all across America. Put another way, America’s food infrastructure is being deliberately shut down.

The implications of this are nothing short of catastrophic. It affects not just fertilizer but also DEF (Diesel Exhaust Fluid) which is necessary for all tractors, transportation trucks, construction equipment and other machinery that use diesel engines. As CF Industries explains:

_CF Industries ships to customers via Union Pacific rail lines primarily from its Donaldsonville Complex in Louisiana and its Port Neal Complex in Iowa. The rail lines serve key agricultural areas such as Iowa, Illinois, Kansas, Nebraska, Texas and California. Products that will be affected include nitrogen fertilizers such as urea and urea ammonium nitrate (UAN) as well as diesel exhaust fluid (DEF), an emissions control product required for diesel trucks. CF Industries is the largest producer of urea, UAN and DEF in North America, and its Donaldsonville Complex is the largest single production facility for the products in North America._

Without DEF, you can’t run tractors. And to the “Green New Deal” lunatics who think that halting all diesel engines will magically make the world green (while they absurdly try to suck all the CO2 out of the atmosphere, which will kill all plants, by the way), you’re about to experience the starvation, chaos and violence that comes from shutting down agriculture. Good luck to all.

**Spring crops will FAIL across North America if they don’t get nitrogen**
This engineered halting of fertilizer shipments appears to be timed to severely disrupt spring planting across North America. This is consistent with what we have all observed with Joe Biden’s deliberate shutdown of America’s energy infrastructure which began on day one of Biden’s fake “presidency” when he signed a stack of executive orders shutting down energy pipelines.

From that very first day, Joe Biden and his handlers (Obama) have been meticulously deconstructing America’s food and energy infrastructure, causing shortages and price inflation. Yet as prices and scarcity both continue to worsen, Jen Psaki says it’s all “Putin’s fault” as a convenient cover story.

The truth is that fake president Joe Biden is trying to plunge America into mass starvation, food riots and chaos. The shutting down of energy, food and fertilizer transportation is just one small part of this nefarious plan.

CF Industries president Tony Will reveals how fertilizer is being selectively targeted:

Even more alarmingly, CF Industries warns that, “it is one of only 30 companies to face these restrictions.”
**A perfect storm of black swan events spell FOOD DOOM on a global scale**
If 2020 – 2021 was the “covid” chapter of global collapse, 2022 – 2023 is going to be the “famine” chapter. A convergence of black swan events is spelling out the absolute certainty of global food scarcity and mass famine. Some of those events include:

-   The unleashing of economic sanctions against Russia, halting Russia’s ability to export fertilizer and food crops such as wheat.
-   The Grand Solar Minimum sun cycle is producing lower levels of solar radiation that will reach the surface of the Earth for the next several years, leading to global crop failures (and, historically, the fall of nations and empires).
-   Unbounded money printing by the Federal Reserve, leading to rapid devaluation / collapse of the value of the dollar vs. food.
-   Skyrocketing food inflation, [which the UN’s FAO now puts at 12.6% _month over month_](http://foodsupply.news/2022-04-10-food-inflation-soars-corporate-media-blames-putin.html), means food prices will double every six months at this rate of inflation.
-   US government programs that are paying farmers to destroy crops, deliberately contributing to food scarcity.
-   Skyrocketing diesel fuel prices, which raise the cost of inputs for farming because farms run on diesel equipment. Transportation of crops is also carried out by diesel trucks.
-   Climate change lunatics are trying to _remove_ CO2 from the atmosphere, which will starve food crops and devastate global yields, since CO2 is the key nutrient that plants need to grow (even more than they need nitrogen).

The upshot of all this is abundantly clear:

-   Accelerating food inflation. Food prices will, without question, double by the end of 2022 and may actually go much higher. Food prices will almost certainly double again in 2023.
-   As food prices skyrocket, food riots will break out worldwide. This has already begun in Sri Lanka, Peru and other nations, and it will only spread globally.
-   Later in 2022, food riots will break out in the USA, first appearing in democrat-run “blue” cities and then spreading.
-   In 2023, we are certain to see food rationing and price controls both demanded and enforced by governments around the world, including the US government.
-   Widespread food insecurity will lead to global uprisings and revolutions. Nations will fall. Sri Lanka is already in default on its dollar bonds and facing the toppling of its political leadership, and we’re not even out of April yet.
-   In response to the rising chaos, governments will declare national emergencies and roll out police state controls to try to control the masses. China’s brutal lockdown of 25+ million people in Shanghai is an early preview of things to come on a global scale.

Most importantly, people who do not have alternative sources of food will likely starve. This means you either need to _store_ food or learn how to _grow_ food. Ideally, you’ll have capabilities in both categories. This is what’s going to keep you alive.

# Thread: Raising Emus
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/raising-emus.26948/>
**Subforum:** Feedback/Suggestions
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### April — 2022-04-11T03:43:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/raising-emus.26948/post-311948>

My husband is going to try raising emus for food. I know Jack doesn’t like most fowl as food, but I have never heard him discuss emus. Emu oil is supposed to be one of the foods high in K2. Does anyone know if the emus would still have good K2 content if raised outside of Australia? We live in FL. Does anyone here have any knowledge or experience in this area?

### Marko Pollo — 2022-04-11T19:47:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/raising-emus.26948/post-311974>

Emus have giant talons that can eviscerate a predator. I went on a field trip with my daughter's class a long time ago to an emu farm. The farmer said emus are mean and dangerous. He fed them every day but carried a weapon for protection. He didn't seem like a fraidy cat. You can't turn your back on them. They are also large, which makes them harder to butcher and freeze. Cost is also high as they are kind of a novelty. Space could also be a concern. It is also sold as a low fat alternative to red meat. I love fat and would have to be starving to eat a regular chicken breast. Still, I could be wrong and in your context, the perfect fit.
I know Dr Kruse is no fan of chicken but I believe there is a big dif between a meat bird bred and selected to be raised on grain, for maximum yield, in industrial confinement, which will be ready for slaughter in 6-7 weeks and a heritage breed, raised in an optimum environment, fed decentralized feed(food grown locally, insects and scraps) raised with the goal of optimal nutritional density. I am new to raising meat birds but now have about 50 pekin and Ruen ducks and red freedom ranger chickens. I am eggspecting 50 Bresse chickens in June. They are supposed to have meat marbled like kobe beef. The chickens and ducks are great for the kids and if you lose one, there are many more. Good size to share, barter with or sell. My birds eat every bit of food scraps we produce in our kitchen(excect for chicken bones which the pigs eat or are composted), turn it into great manure and then scatter it over straw for the compost heap.
Lambs or pigs might also be something to consider. I bought some ewe lambs years ago when we were on 5 acres. Freezer was always full, grass was mowed, pasture improved and they gave so much joy. I'm looking for more sheep now.
Good luck and please don't let my warnings change your mind if it is something you are keen on. I think raising animals is a great gift to your children. { "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. ### DLO — 2022-04-15T23:03:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/vaxid.26958/post-312176>

While the United States government has not issued a federal digital vaccine pass, a national standard has emerged and 21 states, the District of Columbia and Puerto Rico offer the SMART Health Card, a verifiable digital proof of vaccination developed through the Vaccination Credential Initiative (VCI), a global coalition of public and private stakeholders including Microsoft, Salesforce, Oracle, the Mayo Clinic and other health and tech heavyweights. Utah was the first red state to offer the SMART Health Card while Arizona, Mississippi and West Virginia are using other third-party digital verification sources for vaccine verification. Every Canadian province has adopted SMART Health Card verification, as has Singapore and Japan.
[https://needtoknow.news/2022/04/a-n...uietly-rolled-out-and-red-states-are-joining/](https://needtoknow.news/2022/04/a-national-vaccine-passport-has-quietly-rolled-out-and-red-states-are-joining/)

Hi all,

I’m able to feel all nnEMF, And all colours. Even materials. And I don’t mean ‘sense’. I mean I can literally feel a physiological change in my fascia, as in a contraction. Or a ‘pull’ within my tissues and skin.

I have a long story or a journey rather to share (which I’ll post under ‘journals’, if I go through with it) It’s filled with (to me) out of this world experiences with nnEMF, my own DC electric current, blue light, colours (different shades of red) and materials. And probably magnetism.
To be honest, I’m a bit hesitant and even scared to let this go into the world. People might say and have said that I’m crazy. Which I’m not. This is the most sane I’ve ever been.

But I also have been holding on to this for the last 2 years. And I’m tired. Tired of feeling misunderstood. And alone. There so much I just want to let out. I’ve shed some tears too.
So..

Am I in a safe enough environment to share ? Cause it does feel like I am.

Leonaero

Hi Leonaero,
How do you do now? I didn't realize I could feel EMFs untill I booked 2 weeks in a shielded house. The shielded house was no good for me. Might have been the light indoors or the shielding or sth else. But being there away from nnEMFs probably for the first time in decades I suddenly realized that the feeling I normally often had in my head was due to EMFs. Ever since I often can relate bodily sensations to nnEMFs. Mostly in my head, sometimes in my belly. Do you consider yourself EHS and did you find relief? What do you feel? The feeling I get is one I also get sometimes when I have not eaten in a while and am maybe low in blood glucose. Although, that often happened in front of a PC which means plenty of nnEMF (LF now) and alien light. ...
Have a good day,
Evelyn

For myself, I felt fatigued and drained all the time. I assumed it was food, but then I got into Jack's stuff and tried to fix my sleeping environment. Turning off breakers and WiFi at night and not sleeping near my cell phone. Work than began to get more painful with being able to sense the energy from the server racks moving through me at times. I got a meter realizing the environment was killing me with everything being maxed out at work everywhere I went. I was cautious of metals in my pockets and on my body and time spent in these places, which helped a lot. I found relief in cold lakes and in nature when I was in Canada, but in winter I crumbled badly.
Working on melanin renovation in El Salvador, which is not perfect, and there are times I get fried being in the wrong spots, but I am way more resilient than I ever was living in Canada. Emf pains are gone, and now it just feels like I have been on an amusement park ride when I get exposed. Current plans are to try and find a cleaner spot here with fewer towers and people to get more relief and do a month or more tech detox in the fall.

Has anyone else seen this and does anyone know anything about it?

I am trying to find out which WHO member states are in cahoots with this and surprise surprise an Australian is one of the chairs of the meeting!

Horrified to think that UNELECTED CRIMINALS and their friends in WHO think its a good idea to get the world to agree to a pandemic treaty where they basically run the world/call the shots worldwide during a pandemic - and even more horrified to think that no one is batting an eyelid about it.

We are leaving Ozcatraz to head across to the other side of the world to get into an environment conducive to health but also an environment that is free, and a country to explore possibly becoming our new home that respects personal freedoms and i would like to understand which ones support the WHO because they won't be ones considered.

# Thread: NEW EHS QUESTIONAIRE please fill in ans share!
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/new-ehs-questionaire-please-fill-in-ans-share.26973/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Pebbles — 2022-04-25T14:44:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/new-ehs-questionaire-please-fill-in-ans-share.26973/post-312476>

Dear all,

the Finnish Electrosensitivity Foundation has awarded a grant to \*Dariusz Leszczynski to research EHS. A call for volunteer EHS participants and a brief description of the project have already been published.

So far, more than 120 EHS sufferers from Australia, Belgium, Denmark, Finland, France, Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Norway, Peru, Poland, Sweden, Switzerland, and the United States have volunteered.

The more volunteers who participate in the project, the more informed and reliable conclusions about EHS can be drawn. If you are a person who suffers from EHS and have been

\- You have been diagnosed with EHS by a doctor, or
\- You have been evaluated by a physician but have not been diagnosed with EHS

and are interested in participating in this EHS project, please contact Professor Leszczynski at: [blogbrhp@gmail.com](mailto:blogbrhp@gmail.com). You can also fill out the attached questionnaire and send it to Professor Leszczynski.

\* Prof. Dariusz Leszczynski is former head of the Radiation Biology Laboratory of STUK, the Finnish Radiation Safety Authority and member of many international commissions.

### JanSz — 2022-04-27T19:30:38+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/serious-stenosis.26979/post-312541>

> [Marilynn Stebbins said:](/goto/post?id=312540)
>
> Thanks for asking .Her back is where she suffers

Who said she has stenosis? On what basis?
Stenosis of what?
Narrowing of what?
......................................
aortic stenosis
mitral stenosis
pulmonary stenosis
spinal stenosis
subaortic stenosis
other

Stenosis is the medical term for a stricture, or narrowing, of a piece of anatomy, and it can be found in many of the bodily systems.

### Marilynn Stebbins — 2022-04-27T19:39:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/serious-stenosis.26979/post-312543>

I need to see if I can get more details. She (mother) is in college now and has had to put off grad school,U of Arizona in the fall, because of her current state of suffering. I will respond ASAP w/ more details. Thanks for asking!! Wondering about a smaller version of Firehawk on sale now for $248 or close .

# Thread: Leptin reset: really 50-75 grams for breakfast? So 10+ eggs?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leptin-reset-really-50-75-grams-for-breakfast-so-10-eggs.26988/>
**Subforum:** The Epi-Paleo Diet
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Tarun — 2022-04-30T09:19:52+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leptin-reset-really-50-75-grams-for-breakfast-so-10-eggs.26988/post-312625>

Hi folks,

Just wanted to double check.

**STEP THREE: EAT WITHIN 30 MINUTES OF RISING**

-   Make sure breakfast is little to no carbs (less that 50 grams)
-   **LOTS** of protein (50-75 grams)
-   **Overweight:** limit carbs to 25 grams
-   **Fit:** less than 100 grams of carbs
-   **DO NOT** count calories

This means the grams of protein in a product, not the weight of a protein-heavy product right? I know it says lots, and I could do it, but just want to verify.

### caroline — 2022-04-30T17:53:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leptin-reset-really-50-75-grams-for-breakfast-so-10-eggs.26988/post-312634>

yep - you are exactly right!.. I used to cook a lamb roast in a crockpot overnite and have that for breakfast - or a beef or pork roast.

I cant do that many eggs!

But 1 egg on top of some sliced lamb is really nice - and then some bacon on the side

### Tarun — 2022-05-01T22:50:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leptin-reset-really-50-75-grams-for-breakfast-so-10-eggs.26988/post-312671>

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=312634)
>
> yep - you are exactly right!.. I used to cook a lamb roast in a crockpot overnite and have that for breakfast - or a beef or pork roast.
>
> I cant do that many eggs!
>
> But 1 egg on top of some sliced lamb is really nice - and then some bacon on the side

Thank you for clarifying! Lamb roast sounds like quite a yummy way to start the day!

### Billybats — 2023-01-05T21:14:35+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/leptin-reset-really-50-75-grams-for-breakfast-so-10-eggs.26988/post-318711>

Hi everyone, It's been awhile since I have been on this site. I have as usual been doing alot of reading and actually finally understanding paleo and keto to some degree. I have a question regarding the leptin reset and the BAB. Why more protein than fat. When you finally reset leptin do you still do BAB. When it is fixed when you are able to do IF would you still keep the BAB but eliminate lunch or dinner. If one can finally get to eat one meal a day would that be midday. Has anyone on here reached a one or two meal a day and how old are you. Just curious. I have been so out of whack from disregarding many health things, I have reached rock bottom and totally ready for real changes. I mainly need the one important question to me answered before I get started which is the one about protein and fat ratio for BAB, and is that with every meal.

Thank you very much. Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!!!!!

# Thread: Preparing for a move -Record Management Questions
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/preparing-for-a-move-record-management-questions.26990/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 6
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Martha Ray — 2022-05-02T04:18:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/preparing-for-a-move-record-management-questions.26990/post-312674>

**We are fixing up our property considering putting it on the market and moving south and west for a number of reasons.** Not sure if move to a new location and home will be better or worse. I need a list of ideas to consider...so many things to take care of. Plus the market here allows for homes to usually sell in 1 day to 1 week and also same where we are moving. Housing shortage. That puts pressure on being prepared to move quickly.. **Lots of considerations.**

**Today I am trying to evaluate 15+ filing bins full** (12 years worth) **of Research**, Notes. Medical Records,Test results and Articles on Health. Most of my papers are Word Documents I have on my desktop computer as well but I've been unable to find a lot of them when I search for them. Not easy to file 'Health' as the body is complex and connected. I mostly file things under condition's but in several boxes I just have them unsorted and unfilled and I keep printing too many things daily. I have used _Microsoft_ _**One Note**_ some but since I usually prefer hard copies I usually just print on paper. **My husband wants me to trash them all as he does not believe they are helpful.** That grieves me and regret all the paper, time formatting and ink I spent making them. I hate them to go to waste but they say most people file things away and never or very rarely ever look at them again. Painful for me to let go of them. I have also been concerned the plastic containers which I have them in are not even healthy. **What Was I thinking? They smell 'VOC' like** **and may have even** **perpetrated** **my papers! Copy/ Ink Jet Print paper may not be healthy either.** I think I might be able out gas papers in the sun... but just don't know what is best for _thousands of papers_. I have a four drawer cabinet in a shed behind our home, a 2 drawer lateral file in my husbands office and a two drawer cabinet in my office but they are also full. Perhaps I can throw away enough to house the more important papers if only i could decide which ones to keep and which ones to toss.

Wondering how others here and how _**Dr. Kruse**_ files or handles or stores any hard copies of all his research papers?

For reading I am a paper person do not like reading computer screens. But most likely it is time to prioritize and let go... I met a **'clutter' consultant** years ago in a parking lot who had his company ads printed all over his vehicle and I ask him about his work. He gave me his card and he told me that many people need help letting go of stuff. **He said if the person** **evaluating their own** **things, household items, papers, stuff touches them, holds them they throw away very little and they keep way more that them should**. Of course he suggested his service but said even an objective friend can by physically holding the item and asking, **'Can you let go of this?**' is much more productive. I am not a hoarder but I am attached to my papers. I am proud of my editing and note taking and perhaps that is a 'payoff' for me. But I am tired of the clutter and of my office smelling like plastic and that chemical like 'new book' smell of paper and ink. Must be toxic, right?

Re My Medical Records ...I had a phone consult with Dr. Osborn last month and when I ask about some past results they told me they would be of _NO value_ unless they were within 6 months and then they outlined $5,000+ dollars worth of tests needful for the data to really get to the root of my health issues. Plus they said all the tests need to be done at one time or within weeks, not months, to correctly evaluate and Dx to help me. I do understand but I was and am still overwhelmed and I still have sticker shock. I told them I'd have to save up for that for some time. I do keep a running spread sheet which includes most of many past my blood test results... not sure that is of value but it gives me an idea of my ranges over time. In the past few years I've not been able to afford much testing and I have no MD or DO practitioner who knows how to code things through Medicare to get them covered. Medicare is covering less and less...so much for socialized medicine.

I remember herbalist **Dr. Richard Schulze taking his patients** **hoards** **of medical records** (which they had brought to their appointment with him) **and dumping them in the trash can then and there!** He had his own protocols to heal them. And I understand and I most likely need that service he provided as well.

Dis-organization and clutter are known to be unhealthy. I feel addicted to my research even though I am not really that great at it and I don't have a good retrievable filing or storage system for when I want to find something. And as much as I study...my rate of forgetting often exceedes my rate of learning. I'm sure I'd be much healthier if I'd apply a fraction of what I know.

Wish like Dr. Kruse teaches that I had already determined the things that are of **high% value, implemented them** and had let the ideas written on the many other papers I've collected over time go .... now I am pressed to decide quickly.

In spite of change and challenges ahead I am hopeful my husband and I will be healthier moving as we have both suffered physically from living in our current environment and our same home 24 years.

**Does anyone else have a similar issue. Any suggestions?**

### Martha Ray — 2022-05-03T03:42:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/preparing-for-a-move-record-management-questions.26990/post-312705>

I also need to know EMF concerns for 'town patio' homes we are going to look at End Unit of 26 homes (13 duplex town home units) in a semi rural area
Population Density for the city is : **262.27** people per sq. mile for the zip code but the house is on the far outskirts barely within the city limits. Really closer to a bordering town with **211.05 people per sq mile. I know little about population density and little to none about how to determine **Tech penetration** . for ****Quantum yield (**Further south and west**)**** This is as far south and west as my husband is willing to move.

I only found this town home today at 10am and it has been on the market 3 days. More offers may come in today. They do already have one other offer and we will see the home tomorrow at 1pm and make an offer tomorrow and they will review the offers at 4PM. So we are under the gun. Stressful but going to trust God that if it is meant to be it will work and if not meant to be we will accept that as well.

After we close on a property we will put our house on the market and hopefully things will go smoothly with that as well.

A gamble to see if we are healthier in that home. Our home was built in 1986 and this town home in 2003.
Our current home Towers and Antennas within a 3 mile radius:
**_62 towers closest .7 Verizon and 422 antennas within a 3.0 mile We back up to a softball field parking and a Community college._
**
Townhome Towers and Antennas **_within a 3.0 mile radius:_****
_9 towers (closest one Registered at 2.0, Unregistered .8 and 71 antennas 1.7 [**Augusta Medical Center**](https://www.antennasearch.com/HTML/individual/antenna.php?unique_system_identifier=1699229&call_sign=WPAC814&location_number=1) **-associated with Augusta hospital is which 2.6 miles and 6 minunets away.**

**No time to research towerss either our current home or this Townhome. Smart meters? Power lines? HOA info etc....do not know what we might offer because of this pressure and no time to research.**_

### Marko Pollo — 2022-05-03T17:34:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/preparing-for-a-move-record-management-questions.26990/post-312711>

Martha, you need meters to see for yourself. If EMF is important to you, don't buy a house that you aren't sure of. Don't let the agents get you in a frenzy. Even in the worst seller's market, it is still your money and you have to live with your decision. The agents will move on to someone else. If you don't get this one, another will come along. Use this time to really compare sold/pending/for sale properties very close to where you want to be, so when one comes up you really like, you can confidently pull the trigger because YOU have decided it is going to work for you. Agents are a tool you can use, but have different incentives and motivations than the buyers and sellers. If you have cash from your last place, you will have an advantage as interest rates climb. Good luck!

### JanSz — 2022-05-03T18:48:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/preparing-for-a-move-record-management-questions.26990/post-312712>

> [Marko Pollo said:](/goto/post?id=312711)
>
> Martha, you need meters to see for yourself. If EMF is important to you, don't buy a house that you aren't sure of. Don't let the agents get you in a frenzy. Even in the worst seller's market, it is still your money and you have to live with your decision. The agents will move on to someone else. If you don't get this one, another will come along. Use this time to really compare sold/pending/for sale properties very close to where you want to be, so when one comes up you really like, you can confidently pull the trigger because YOU have decided it is going to work for you. Agents are a tool you can use, but have different incentives and motivations than the buyers and sellers. If you have cash from your last place, you will have an advantage as interest rates climb. Good luck!

**Don't let the agents get you in a frenzy.
\------------------------**
This looks to me like a good time to get some GBTC.

One of the possibilities, (my way):
Keep enough funds to allow you pay your bills for the next 5 - 7 years.
Buy half and half GBTC and SPY with the rest of your funds.

Stay for a year in El Salvador, see how you feel (in the best place there is).
Do not buy in El Salvador any properties (during that first year).
After a year, stay there or go somewhere else.

////////////////
[@ND Hauf](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/25376/)
Keep this post in mind:
[My Health + My Wealth + My Civil Liberties + My Property Rights = My Freedom Journal | Page 38 | Jack Kruse Optimal Health Forum](https://forum.jackkruse.com/index.php?threads/my-health-my-wealth-my-civil-liberties-my-property-rights-my-freedom-journal.26760/page-38#post-312706)

\[QU OTE="ND Hauf, post: 312706, member: 25376"\]**Monetary Change**

As I research monetary changes through history it appears the ones who were rewarded the most are the ones who walked the critical path with an open mind. To some extent guarded as to not be so open your brain falls out. First principles of what assets, what money, what zip code, what is a good investment, and how does it all play into my N = 1.

Try to assess and think of the unthinkable....

Lay out the critical path then try to layer in a timeline based on outcomes of each fork in the path.

Once it's all laid out, I can embrace the change with eyes wide open....\[/QUOTE\]

### JanSz — 2022-05-07T18:51:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/microbiome-rx.27001/post-312795>

I am using a Luvele yogurt maker.
100F
two quarts of **Ultra-pasteurized** half and half (no heating).
4 tablespoon of inulin (when thinking of 24 hrs time)
since yogurt is coming out really well, the last batch was intended to grow for 3 days.
3 days =72 hours
Thinking of this I added an extra tablespoon of inulin.
Not sure if that is enough inulin.
After 48 hrs I saw on the bottom a little bit of liquid/solid separation
After 72 hrs amount of liquid grew a little.
Afterward I mixed it all well, took half of the cup for the next bath, and transferred the rest to two 32 oz glass containers. One container for each of the two of us. Stored in the fridge.

Dr Davis recommends eating 3/4cups daily.
**3/4 cup=36 teaspoons=12 tablespoons** (to spread consumption over many hours
**32 oz----->>5.3 days** say 5 days
After I finish brewing the previous batch of yogurt, afterward I have two days free of brewing.
Now big question?
how much inulin should I put in to get the best growth?

Reuteri doubles in 3 hours (when in an ideal environment).
What is it?

### Sue-UK — 2022-05-08T11:23:00+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/microbiome-rx.27001/post-312807>

I'm not convinced about concentrating on one bacteria so I'm using a high dose 11 strain probiotic that is supposed to reach the colon and start proliferating there.
[https://www.elixa-probiotic.com/uk/](https://www.elixa-probiotic.com/uk/)
Did the 6 day course as is, and felt the shift on day three. On day seven opened a new pack and opened two capsules into water first thing in the morning, rather than take the capsules. One of the mechanisms that is missing from the capsules that the yoghurt has is the sensory input (or signalling) from the mouth, so I'm next going to mix a couple of capsule contents into a tablespoon of commercial goats milk yoghurt or a plain kefir and eat it like that.

Found this on oxalates

### Sue-UK — 2022-05-08T14:36:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/microbiome-rx.27001/post-312810>

[https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0899900718307081?via=ihub](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0899900718307081?via%3Dihub)
**_Lactobacillus brevis_ DM9218 ameliorates fructose-induced hyperuricemia through inosine degradation and manipulation of intestinal dysbiosis

[https://www.mdpi.com/2311-5637/7/2/74/htm](https://www.mdpi.com/2311-5637/7/2/74/htm)**
Screening and Evaluation of Purine-Nucleoside-Degrading Lactic Acid Bacteria Isolated from Winemaking Byproducts In Vitro and Their Uric Acid-Lowering Effects In Vivo
**
" The current literature proves that the LAB able to reduce hyperuricemia includes L. plantarum, L. brevis, L. gasseri and L. paracasei \[[1](https://www.mdpi.com/2311-5637/7/2/74/htm#B1-fermentation-07-00074),[15](https://www.mdpi.com/2311-5637/7/2/74/htm#B15-fermentation-07-00074),[16](https://www.mdpi.com/2311-5637/7/2/74/htm#B16-fermentation-07-00074),[17](https://www.mdpi.com/2311-5637/7/2/74/htm#B17-fermentation-07-00074)\]. In this study, we found that L. curvatus and P. acidilactici isolated from distillers’ grains might also have the ability to degrade purine and reduce uric acid."

L acidophilus KB27 (5.0 B CFU/day), L rhamnosus KB79 from [https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0202901#sec002](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0202901#sec002)**
Probiotic supplements prevented oxonic acid-induced hyperuricemia and renal damage

[https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33986988/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33986988/)
**_Lactobacillus reuteri_ TSR332 and _Lactobacillus fermentum_ TSF331 stabilize serum uric acid levels and prevent hyperuricemia in rats**

> [https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/15542102/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/15542102/)
> **Consumption of Bifidobacterium lactis LKM512 yogurt reduces gut mutagenicity by increasing gut polyamine contents in healthy adult subjects**

Who and why eats Bifidobacterium lactis LKM512
Since likely it is available only on special orders.

\================================
Dr Davis discussing his yogurt reminded that actually what he is discussing is not the actual (legal) yogurt.
It is just a way of introducing bacteria into the body.

The word yogurt has FDA definition.
As far as bacterial content, that yogurt must have (during its production):
Lactobacillus delbrueckii subsp. bulgaricus and Streptococcus thermophilus.
And to extend shelf life (they are all killed in the end).

[CFR - Code of Federal Regulations Title 21 (fda.gov)](https://www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cdrh/cfdocs/cfcfr/CFRSearch.cfm?fr=131.200&msclkid=00356c1ccf8d11ecae2aef206dbd3525)

[https://www.accessdata.fda.gov/scri....200&msclkid=00356c1ccf8d11ecae2aef206dbd3525](https://www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cdrh/cfdocs/cfcfr/CFRSearch.cfm?fr=131.200&msclkid=00356c1ccf8d11ecae2aef206dbd3525)

### Sue-UK — 2022-05-09T19:05:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/microbiome-rx.27001/post-312843>

> [JanSz said:](/goto/post?id=312838)
>
> Who and why eats Bifidobacterium lactis LKM512
> Since likely it is available only on special orders.
>
> \================================
> Dr Davis discussing his yogurt reminded that actually what he is discussing is not the actual (legal) yogurt.
> It is just a way of introducing bacteria into the body.
>
> The word yogurt has FDA definition.
> As far as bacterial content, that yogurt must have (during its production):
> Lactobacillus delbrueckii subsp. bulgaricus and Streptococcus thermophilus.
> And to extend shelf life (they are all killed in the end).

I doubt LKM512 is the only strain that produces polyamines, but it would be no different than sourcing the specific fermentum or reuteri strains. In the UK [yoghurt](https://www.lawinsider.com/dictionary/yoghurt) means a "coagulated product obtained from pasteurized or boiled milk or concentrated milk, pasteurized skimmed milk and or pasteurized cream or a mixture of two or more of these products by lactic acid fermentation through the action of Lactobacillus bulgaricus and Streptococcus thermophilus. It may also contain cultures of Bifidobacterium bifidus and Lactobacillus acidophilus and other cultures or suitable lactic acid producing harmless bacteria and if added, a declaration to this effect shall be made on the label." The goats milk yoghurt I have has the 4 named ones, and is "live and active." I've also chosen goats milk as goats milk also contains prebiotics in the form of oligosaccharides, and its got more MCTs than cows milk. This also makes it look a better bet than cows milk yoghurt as a delivery system of probiotics.
[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7432599/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7432599/)
**Goat’s Milk Intake Prevents Obesity, Hepatic Steatosis and Insulin Resistance in Mice Fed A High-Fat Diet by Reducing Inflammatory Markers and Increasing Energy Expenditure and Mitochondrial Content in Skeletal Muscle**

### JanSz — 2022-05-10T19:01:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/microbiome-rx.27001/post-312877>

When I use half and half, I remember that it is ultra pasteurized.
So I use it directly.
When you (lucky you), are using fresh milk,
you may want to heat it first to about 180 F (recommended) somewhere.

OTOH, way back then, my mom used to milk cows with her bare hands, usually not sanitized hands.
The milk was then transferred to a large ceramic container, standing next to the oven and waited there for over a week until the butter was made from it.
In the meantime the milk was already sour and delicious, so we would dip in it a cup to drink some.

Published online 2020 Jun 23.

Stress is closely related to the deterioration of digestive disease.
Melatonin has potent anti-inflammatory properties.
The objective of this study was to determine the effect of
**water stress (WS)**
and
**sleep deprivation (SD)**
on intestinal microbiota and roles of melatonin in stressful condition.

### JanSz — 2022-05-17T19:02:16+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/microbiome-rx.27001/post-313048>

Yesterday I started new batch of 64oz half&half and new 10 pills of BioGaia yogurt.

Mistake.
Still do not know how big my mistake is.

To make sure that all is mixed well, I was adding the half&half incrementally, covering the jar and shaking it.
All was nicely mixed
but in retrospect
I should have been waiting for the froth to subside.
Waiting till I see nice liquid on top, rather than the froth.
Today morning I see that the froth lifted the top, including the top cover.
Enough of the frothed stuff spilled out to fill out the water to the brim.
I cleaned all up, added new water, and set it all for the next 24hrs.

The froth I took out have not tasted so good.
....

# Thread: Tan Through Clothing for Kids
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tan-through-clothing-for-kids.27005/>
**Subforum:** Biohacking 101
**Posts:** 4
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### ShellyFM — 2022-05-10T17:57:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tan-through-clothing-for-kids.27005/post-312869>

Has anyone found tan through clothing for kids? My son runs around without a shirt on outside, but my daughter needs something. It would be great to find a clothing line that allows the sun through but is less like a bathing suit and more like tank tops or regular shirts and also has athletic style shorts so they just look like they are wearing regular clothes! Honestly, I would love this for my husband and me as well! Tan through items that look like normal shirts and shorts! We spend a lot of time outdoors in our neighborhood and would like a casual look without a bathing suit look. Is there such a thing already out there?

### Sue-UK — 2022-05-10T19:25:09+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tan-through-clothing-for-kids.27005/post-312879>

kiniki.com does a range of tan thru for adults, but not children. Apart from the usual stuff, I've got a pair of the men's shorts for me, and DH has a couple of ladies beach wraps.  If you sew, or know someone who does, it might be worth looking at the beach wraps and sarongs, and using the fabric to make what you want for your children. They also sometimes have cheaper tan through wraps and sarongs on the sale rail page.

### ShellyFM — 2022-05-10T23:00:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tan-through-clothing-for-kids.27005/post-312895>

> [Sue-UK said:](/goto/post?id=312879)
>
> kiniki.com does a range of tan thru for adults, but not children. Apart from the usual stuff, I've got a pair of the men's shorts for me, and DH has a couple of ladies beach wraps.  If you sew, or know someone who does, it might be worth looking at the beach wraps and sarongs, and using the fabric to make what you want for your children. They also sometimes have cheaper tan through wraps and sarongs on the sale rail page.

I have a Kiniki top and bottom for myself, but was really hoping for items that looked more like clothing. I was thinking of trying the men's shorts. So, glad to hear that works for you!

### SHANNON SELL — 2022-06-29T01:30:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/tan-through-clothing-for-kids.27005/post-313926>

Kiniki is basically printed mesh. Look for printed sheer mesh, lace cover ups or loose weave sweater knits/crochet tops.

you can also get a kiniki beach sarong or wrap and tie it around her body under the armpits, then add a belt around the waist for a cute strapless dress. The cropkini would probably work for a tank style top. The mens shorts are tight and have a draw string so they could work on kids too.

# Thread: Android OS Vs iOS In Terms Of Ethernet
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/android-os-vs-ios-in-terms-of-ethernet.27014/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 7
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Nintendo 1889 — 2022-05-16T17:40:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/android-os-vs-ios-in-terms-of-ethernet.27014/post-313025>

As a techy and IT guy, I've always used android devices, but I'm not married to them.

Are iphones in general better than Android in terms of USB-to-ethernet adaptors, and/or making calls and texts over ethernet?\*

In my research among androids, you have 2 options:

-   USB-OTG adapters (more generally found in tablets, since they largely don't have a cellular network)
-   USB-C to ethernet adaptors

With my android (LG k51 with android 10), I plug in a usb-c to ethernet adaptor and it says "detecting ethernet connection" but it never gets an IP address.

\* With Android, I can make google voice calls over wifi, so it would probably be safe to assume ethernet would work.

I am thinking about going to a store with a router and the adaptor, and testing to see if any phones can get an IP address (it would not be a working internet/WAN connection, I will only checking to see if they can get an IP address).

Another option is Windows phones. They seem to be more open to ethernet adaptors and 3rd party hardware type of stuff.

I'm sure there's lots of other ways to limit emf, I want to start the journey here.

### EWO — 2022-05-16T18:32:14+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/android-os-vs-ios-in-terms-of-ethernet.27014/post-313027>

if you are using internet connection (vs cellular network) to make and receive calls, why not use voip through wired desktop/laptop?

### EWO — 2022-05-17T03:58:07+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/android-os-vs-ios-in-terms-of-ethernet.27014/post-313039>

If you do wire up a mobile phone, I've had better luck with available setups for ios than android. Prefer Belkin or Anker or TP Link adapters. The Belkins have chargers with the Ethernet but my experience with the Android versions of those is that the charging piece of the adapter did not connect reliably. A bonus advantage with ios (IMO) is the easy changes you can make through accessibility settings to the screen color filters and white point reduction. Hope this helps.

### ShellyFM — 2022-05-17T18:37:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/android-os-vs-ios-in-terms-of-ethernet.27014/post-313045>

iOS is doable but still not perfect. Most ethernet adapters we've tried have occasional issues where you have to disconnect and reconnect to get it working again. We've noticed our newer devices handle it better than the older ones. Also, non-Apple adapters sometimes work better. The best we've found is actually using your computer's ethernet connection as a pass through internet connection to the phone with the stock Apple USB to lightning cable. That's been the most reliable. Plus, if you have a Mac, you can get iMessages, some text messages, and phone calls through your Mac with the iPhone on airplane mode. I have a lightning dock by my workstation where I dock the iPhone on airplane mode so the phone still gets internet while I work. MacBook is completely hardwired with ethernet and passes that connection through to the iPhone on the lightning dock. Makes it easy to put the iPhone on the dock and take it off. The only hiccup I've found is you can't send regular text messages (green messages) through the phone or even the Mac when the iPhone is on airplane mode and docked and some text messages (green ones) do not come through when it is on airplane mode. I'm not sure why some work and others don't. iMessages (the blue messages) work just fine sending and receiving, though.

### ShellyFM — 2022-05-17T18:39:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/android-os-vs-ios-in-terms-of-ethernet.27014/post-313046>

Also, the text message (green message) limitations I mention above are also the same when connecting the iPhone directly to ethernet using an adapter instead of the method I described above.

### Nintendo 1889 — 2022-05-25T22:03:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/android-os-vs-ios-in-terms-of-ethernet.27014/post-313167>

Thanks for all of the replies.

> [EWO said:](/goto/post?id=313027)
>
> if you are using internet connection (vs cellular network) to make and receive calls, why not use voip through wired desktop/laptop?

I thought about this, the reason to use a mobile phone is for the Apps which aren't on the web, etc..., it's nice to use a phone for the mobility. I would like to limit EMF exposure, even though I am would not be limiting it 100%.

One nice thing is that with a Chromebook you can run android apps on it using the mouse as the touchscreen input. I was able to use clubhouse with mic and audio on it.

> [EWO said:](/goto/post?id=313039)
>
>
>
> If you do wire up a mobile phone, I've had better luck with available setups for ios than android. Prefer Belkin or Anker or TP Link adapters. The Belkins have chargers with the Ethernet but my experience with the Android versions of those is that the charging piece of the adapter did not connect reliably. A bonus advantage with ios (IMO) is the easy changes you can make through accessibility settings to the screen color filters and white point reduction. Hope this helps.

Twilight for android doesn't have the automatic time of day switching that f.lux does, but it works well. And as of Android 7 or 8, the OS has a blue light filter, if your android oem implemented that feature.

### pfedorow — 2022-06-11T01:21:44+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/android-os-vs-ios-in-terms-of-ethernet.27014/post-313519>

anyone do testing on Calyx os or Graphene? Curious how much of a difference the cleaned up OS does compared to the spyware on the installed Operating systems.

Healthy2015,

Kari is correct. It could be SIBO, MCAS (histamine/cytokine excess), leaky gut, and/or dysbiosis all leading to a wide variety of symptoms - [read this as a quick overview](https://www.advancedhealing.com/mast-cell-activation-syndrome-ibs-dysbiosis-and-sibo/). A [GIMAP w/zonulin](https://www.diagnosticsolutionslab.com/sites/default/files/GI-MAP-Sample-Report_ARs.pdf) is my favorite test for GI conditions. When combined with a good set of labs he can be back to his old self in short order.
This test should be added to any blood work he gets [https://healthresearchfunding.org/tryptase-blood-test-results-explained/](https://healthresearchfunding.org/tryptase-blood-test-results-explained/)

I hope this helps.

Dr. E

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/ahi-tuna-breakfast.27044/post-313539>

Lemon juice
Vitamin Sea garlic/dulce/kelp seasoning
Salt

>
> Hi
> Our son has sun damage around hss eye area and we have tried many things to heal this area (mankuna honey, Kefir, face creams etc) when he was younger he refused to wear a cap when in the sun or have anything on his face which causeds the damage.
> We dont put sun lotion on him but he wears a hat now, on occasions for example this weekend we were at a outside water park so he could not wear anything to cover his face. He is out in the AM and PM sun everyday and is not exposed to bluelight after dark. Any ideas or suggestions on how to repair his face would be really helpful. I have attached an image.
>
> Thank you

Occasional heavy sun exposure is damaging.

Give it a time to heel, a month or more, then start all over (slowly).
Then take a month or more of gradually increased exposures to condition his skin.

Very large portion of sunlight are IR-a wavelengths.
Those wavelengths produce (massive amounts) of subcellular melatonin.
That melatonin is the force that creates MATRIX water.
Matrix water synthesis releases (massive) amounts of energy in our bodies.
That amount of energy is massively larger than the sunlight energy person may produce while on
equator
at noon
on sunny day

I hope there will be some discussion on this topic.

..............
I am assuming that
being naked while outside is definitely beneficial
but
it does not have to be all hours when on bright sunny day
it is ok to be in the shades
IR-A exists in the shades of the trees or gazebo.

...

# Thread: Quercetin Is it a needful supplement
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/quercetin-is-it-a-needful-supplement.27062/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 2
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Martha Ray — 2022-06-29T02:51:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/quercetin-is-it-a-needful-supplement.27062/post-313927>

**I am going through our supplements with a fine tooth comb, most all of them are on the chopping block...thinking I might be better off trashing them all. Quercetin is touted as being useful and we have taken it for some time but I am not sure I can justify using it? We take it when we eat out (**which we normally don't do often))**to offset any possible MSG and other allergens

_Perque_ - Pain Guard Forte 250 tabs Expensive and for that reason alone it is on the chopping block**\- Been buying on Wellevate. It contains a kissy-poo-poo, fancy sounding Mg as C16 and C18 alkyls- and the form Quercetin Dihydrate (water soluble bioflavonoid), OPC (from Actvin a trademark for a form of Grape Seed Extract and some Vegetable fiber (organic croscarmellose) [Croscarmellose Sodium comes from wood pulp or cotton fibers but this says 'Vegetable' fiber. Searching found it maybe Questionable](https://remedysnutrition.com/blogs/news/18289407-additives-to-avoid#safe), may raise blood pressure and dehydrate cells and, or prevent the body from absorbing any of the ingredients. I hate fiber and fillers and extra things thrown in supplements! So is it worth it? As of 6 28 22 I don’t know but it has concerns from me.

**Quercetin** by _Pure Encapsulation_ 500 mg for 2 caps. We have purchased on Vita-cost or Wellevate in the past. Information says, "Quercetin belongs to a class of water-soluble plant pigments called bioflavonoids that cannot be produced in the human body. It is also considered a phytoestrogen... says it is sourced from Fava d’anta tree (Dimorphandra mollis) pods." [https://www.pureencapsulationspro.com/media/pdf\_upload/Quercetin.pdf](https://www.pureencapsulationspro.com/media/pdf_upload/Quercetin.pdf)

Food Research aka BuyFoodResearch.com Aller-Lung
[https://www.buyfoodresearch.com/collections/quercitin](https://www.buyfoodresearch.com/collections/quercitin) Food Research Aller-lung sells 90 tabs for 25. But calls for 1-9 caps as a dose. Not sure smaller dose would protect us from food allergies and toxins eating out.

Anyone know Quercetin?

### Martha Ray — 2022-06-29T02:53:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/quercetin-is-it-a-needful-supplement.27062/post-313928>

**21 Quercetin-Rich Foods That Belong In Your Diet + The Benefits Of This Antioxidant [https://www.mindbodygreen.com/articles/quercetin-foods/](https://www.mindbodygreen.com/articles/quercetin-foods/)**

# Thread: Chinese breakthrough lets human brains beam radio waves
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/chinese-breakthrough-lets-human-brains-beam-radio-waves.27065/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### DLO — 2022-06-30T04:16:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/chinese-breakthrough-lets-human-brains-beam-radio-waves.27065/post-313978>

[https://panatimes.com/chinese-breakthrough-lets-human-brains-beam-radio-waves](https://panatimes.com/chinese-breakthrough-lets-human-brains-beam-radio-waves)
Researchers say new technology could be used for mind-controlled military radar and other devices.
Chinese researchers say they have made it possible for humans to beam radio waves with their brains in a breakthrough that could have uses ranging from health monitoring to mind-controlled military radar.

In an air force laboratory experiment, researchers showed that brainwaves could control and interact with electromagnetic waves remotely.

“Our design provides users with a universal way to manipulate electromagnetic waves using brainwaves,” said Professor Wang Jiafu, leading project scientist with Air Force Engineering University in northwestern Shaanxi province, in a paper published in peer-reviewed journal eLight on June 11.

### JanSz — 2022-07-06T16:13:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/female-hormone-testing-day-21.27070/post-314153>

> [SHANNON SELL said:](/goto/post?id=314149)
>
> Thank you for these charts!! Super interesting.
>
> I am getting DHEAS, Estradiol, Estrogen, Pregnenolone, Progesterone, SHBG, Testosterone, Thyroid, CBC, CMP.

If you are able, as also for

potassium RBC
Free Testosterone
.....
If the test is at Laborp, change Estradiol to (Estradiol Sensitive)
Not sure what your Estrogen means, possibly
Estrogens Total
..........
Thyroid what?

...
About your original question, day 21.

It is about finding your Estradiol and Progesterone situation.
Looking at the charts I posted above.
Assuming average cycle 29.5 days
Progesterone is (statistically) at the maximum (for rather short time).
People often have low progesterone.
\--
If your cycles are near 29.9 then 21 is ok.

.

### Inger — 2022-07-17T23:36:32+0300

> [caroline said:](/goto/post?id=314423)
>
> nope - I have read that tho - Thanks Inger. How are you?????

I am working sooo much....LOL uhhh too much. To little workforce here in Finland as a waitress you drown in work...
But I am very lucky to have work though
In fall I will work less.
Iv spent some days alone on a small island close to where I work, customers to our restaurant own the island and they invited me to stay there always as I want, it has been just amazing.... I can go there when I have a day off or two, they bring and pick me up with their boat.
I am there disconnected from anything. I cant believe they let me use it. It is Nirvana to me!

 100% alone on a tiny island with 2 small cottages. No one else, only animals, nature and me... water, boats passing by.. a well I need to pump water from myself, handcrafted. Ahh.
My avatar is from that island.

Blessings are everywhere, always.. they just come to us, IDK how it happens but it do
Some more pictures;

**Subforum:** Beginners Area

### Martha Ray — 2022-07-15T06:01:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/idea-for-more-vitamin-d-to-raise-level-to-optimal.27092/post-314389>

I am having problems raising my Vitamin D level 'just from sun'. My levels have been in the 50's but I would like them to be in the 70 to 80 range. I've taken supplements in the past but am not wanting to do that now after hearing mixed reviews here, directly from Dr. Kruse and elsewhere online. I'm not big on supplementing hormones and 11 years ago I had a very concerning result when supplementing melatonin... that NO ONE Has been about to Explain..... I've had a number of other mystery issues.

Anyway...I've even done what this video is discussing before but only one or two times- not enought to test. After hearing this again today on this video, **I am interested in giving it a proper trial...**
**Make Your Own Vitamin D Supplements for Pennies
On _You Tube_:**
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YeYR1C7NMUI](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YeYR1C7NMUI)
On Eric Berg DC site:
[https://www.drberg.com/blog/make-your-own-vitamin-d-supplements-for-pennies](https://www.drberg.com/blog/make-your-own-vitamin-d-supplements-for-pennies)
\-----------------------------------------
 [](https://duckduckgo.com/?q=Make%20Your%20Own%20Vitamin%20D%20Supplements%20for%20Pennies%20on%20Eric%20Berg%20site+site:www.drberg.com&t=brave)[https://www.drberg.com › blog › make-your-own-vitamin-d-supplements-for-pennies](https://www.drberg.com/blog/make-your-own-vitamin-d-supplements-for-pennies)
**[Make Your Own Vitamin D Supplements for Pennies - Dr. Berg](https://www.drberg.com/blog/make-your-own-vitamin-d-supplements-for-pennies)**
Feb 8, 2022How to make your own vitamin D supplements: 1. Obtain organic mushrooms. 2. Use the sun in the summer or use a UV light year-round. Take the stems off of the mushrooms and place them on a tray with the gills facing upward (slice button mushrooms lengthwise). Put them in the sun or under UV light from 10 am-6 pm..... **SEE MORE**
\---------------------------------------
**Has anyone here heard of this or has anyone tried it ?
Would this work? Any downside, pros and cons?
Sunning of course along side of your mushrooms.**

### JanSz — 2022-07-15T16:55:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/idea-for-more-vitamin-d-to-raise-level-to-optimal.27092/post-314392>

Organic mushrooms
I rather get wildly grown.
''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''
Usually, I buy dried mushrooms in Polish stores.
Good mushrooms, especially bolete's caps only are very expensive. Last time I checked near $150/pound.

So, when I found these mushrooms at Costco I bought a load of them. About $15 per container.

I think putting them on a tray, and exposing to good sunlight should get you the vitamin D.

### Marko Pollo — 2022-07-18T04:03:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/idea-for-more-vitamin-d-to-raise-level-to-optimal.27092/post-314465>

Costco Frozen sockeye salmon in individual serving packets. Great product caught on small boats. Best salmon species for fatty acids. My recipe follows.
Marinade in: 3/4 cup soy sauce, 1/3 cup black sesame oil, 1 tsp crushed red pepper, fresh garlic, fresh ginger, green onions. Put all ingredients in blender and mix well, slow down blender and add a bunch off green onions very briefly. Cover defrosted salmon fillets with marinade in pie dish or zip lock for 20-30 minutes. Barbeque flesh side down until beautiful grill marks appear. flip and cook a little more. Don't over cook.

# Thread: It's time for me to reach out
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/its-time-for-me-to-reach-out.27093/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 26
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### healingfromwithin — 2022-07-15T20:17:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/its-time-for-me-to-reach-out.27093/post-314394>

Greetings,

I have been searching for answers in regards to my health issues for over a decade, finding some valuable and helpful direction along the way from other sources. But I recently ended up finding my way here and I know I am now in the right place. The principles that the Jack Kruse community follow resonate with me as actual truth - something I haven’t found when searching for fundamental answers elsewhere.

I know the best thing to do is to keep reading up on everything Jack Kruse, and I am hungrily doing that for hours a day. But I am suffering so much - I thought I might be ready now, with some basic knowledge of these principles, to write an initial post asking for guidance.

I’ve been experiencing long-term degeneration of my physical self in the area of my nervous system, which seems to be in a constant state of over-stimulation. I have flashing in my sense of vision. My ears pick up certain midrange frequencies that exist everywhere that seem really amplified - it sounds like morse code and it’s very stressful, makes it hard to fall asleep. I can’t stand being lightly touched or brushed on my skin. I have almost no sense of taste, but my sense of smell is not as bad. I constantly feel like I have “static” in my body, like a slight buzzing feeling.

I am extremely sensitive to stressors of any kind. I periodically find myself “maxed-out” which leads to my whole nervous system going haywire and I become emotionally violent. It feels like a reaction of my nerves that I cannot control, though I try every time for the sake of others around me.

I am seriously dehydrated, undernourished, weak and uncomfortable on every level, thus, my quality of life is poor. Most of my thoughts every day are taken up by wanting to find answers to make the pain stop. So I have been researching and experimenting my way out of this for many years.

Everything seems to be related to the flow of electricity. High inflammation, too many positive ions, too many EMFs etc. I have recently turned off the wi-fi, gotten rid of the smart meter, and found some bad electrical wiring in my current home (I have lived in numerous places over the years).

I am also mindful of my circadian rhythm - getting early morning sun, watching the sunset every night, avoiding blue light as best I can, changing the lighting inside to red before bed time, etc.

What seems to be my most basic struggle that I need help in figuring out is my inability to tolerate basic food, and most importantly, electrolytes. I am so dehydrated. All I’ve been able to tolerate eating for a long time now is sweet potato, carrots, and MCT oil and I can only handle 300-800 calories per day. Every time I try to branch out from this stringency, there’s too much inflammation.

The symptoms largely go away every time I’ve tried keto, but I can never sustain it for more than a couple of days because I can’t eat salts of any kind to stay hydrated. My adrenals / kidneys just feel like they’ll quit.

If I could just be able to get the electrolytes I need, I could start feeling a lot better. But I find that anything with chloride in it makes my nervous system go haywire like I described earlier. I also find that the more quickly absorbable it is (salts dissolved in water), the worse the symptoms. Taking them orally is the worst as my gut seems hyper-reactive to everything I put in it and is likely pretty leaky. I can do a little better with transdermal absorption, but I get the same symptoms. I do soak my feet in a spoonful of magnesium bath flakes every night because getting magnesium has been one of the only avenues of relief for me.

According to hair mineral analysis tests I’ve done routinely for the past few years, I am very low in a lot of my minerals. My potassium and lithium levels are rock bottom.

I struggle the most with sodium. Anything with sodium in it creates a lot of inflammation and leads to the same symptoms. Even 1 grain of sodium makes the right side of my body feel inflamed and gives me muscle cramps. I feel pressure in the right side of my head and get a severe cramp in my right leg.

I am a “challenging” case it seems. People always say, “I’ve never met anyone like you!”

I’m hoping maybe some of you have, though, and that I may be able to find the missing links to these basic issues standing in the way of my recovery for so long!

To anyone who has read this, thank you for taking the time.

Best regards,

Jaden

I am currently 5 days on T3 therapy. There is calcium sulfate as a filler and the little bit of sulfate in my gut is causing a lot of problems (hydrogen sulfide / sulfate reducing bacteria). Hi Inger!

Wow. Just wow.

I looked up Nutrition Detective and think I've finally confirmed a suspicion of vitamin A toxicity. I watched some videos and learned some good truths I needed to hear. For years I've been POUNDING the orange vegetables because 1) they're easier for me to tolerate 2) they've been a favorite of mine since I was little 3) I assumed I needed the vitamin A because it was low on a spectracell micronutrient test (which shows what's INSIDE cells not, in the blood) and I have a good handful of BCOA gene mutations.

But BOY! I looked up a paper with the official warnings for side effects of Accutane (which I now know all vitamin A turns into retinoic acid) and I couldn't believe how many symptoms I have. The rash all over my body, the mental effects, the behavioral effects, the pressure in my head that causes confusion every day, plus my skin has been getting more yellow over time. I also can't go in the sun anymore (which is so anti LWM) because UV gives me a rash and makes my whole nervous system activate. I am quick to anger and often feel like it's coming from my gut area - a stodgy pressure that makes my cortisol surge. I have had the instinct for years that my liver is unhappy...

I've been tracking my food with an online tool for years and I can easily approach 100,000 iu total vitamin A (mostly beta carotene) per day. I'm starving so I'll eat easily 2 lbs carrots at once AND 4 sweet potatoes!

Thank you so much for bringing this to my attention. It's so refreshing to have found a community where people actually have the ability to connect the dots. It's what I've been trying to do for myself for a decade, but every little "micro" community out there is so myopically focused on their own dogma and likes to ignore the big picture. QED looks at EVERYTHING in it's purest, most truthful foundation. I am home...

It's what I've been trying to do for myself for a decade, but every little "micro" community out there is so myopically focused on their own dogma and likes to ignore the big picture. QED looks at EVERYTHING in it's purest, most truthful foundation. I am home...

I am SO glad you decided to look into it!
I did some of the mistakes myself with tons of organs and oysters and peppers, eggyolks etc. And I have now been low vit A and copper for a while and I feel how good it is for me! No one had ever told me too much vit A can be this bad... I am so glad i found that information myself. I got symptoms of dry scaly skin on my legs, yellow palms and teeth etc. Now my palms are so white and also my teeth are so much whiter and my eyes too and I am sooo thankful. I love eating almost only beef now. Feels really really good.
