**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Judd Crane — 2022-07-28T10:31:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/low-emf-beard-trimmers.27110/post-314658>

Anyone aware of low EMF beard trimmers or other solutions for trimming beard?

### ShaneR — 2023-04-22T21:52:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/low-emf-beard-trimmers.27110/post-320662>

Make sure it runs on battery, don't use while plugged into the wall. Discharge from a small battery like that is DC, and very low EMF, compared to other sources in a house (particularly those that run on AC current).
Bigger problems with small appliances like this are the LED lights and more and more are coming with 'smart' capability. So be on the watch for that stuff too when selecting a unit.

### Dr Rohen Kapur — 2023-05-03T06:43:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/low-emf-beard-trimmers.27110/post-320794>

# Thread: Gastroparesis and the Leptin Rx
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/gastroparesis-and-the-leptin-rx.27112/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Kari Dunlop — 2022-07-28T18:40:53+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/gastroparesis-and-the-leptin-rx.27112/post-314667>

Hi there!

Just curious if anyone here is working through gastroparesis? I'd love to know any tips on how you've been navigating eating food. I'd been doing pretty well for a time but now I'm experiencing a flare. Some days water isn't my friend.

### JanSz — 2022-07-28T20:18:36+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/gastroparesis-and-the-leptin-rx.27112/post-314671>

The cause of gastroparesis is usually unknown. Sometimes it's a complication of diabetes, and some people develop gastroparesis after surgery. Certain medications, such as **opioid pain relievers, some antidepressants, and high blood pressure and allergy medications**, can lead to slow gastric emptying and cause similar symptoms. For people who already have gastroparesis, these medications may make their condition worse.

...

### Kari Dunlop — 2022-07-28T23:47:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/gastroparesis-and-the-leptin-rx.27112/post-314680>

Thanks [@JanSz](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/933/). Mine is from Lyme disease and mold illness.

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/thoughts-on-which-system-is-best-for-an-inground-swimming-pool.27116/post-314743>

>

### caroline — 2022-07-31T17:06:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/thoughts-on-which-system-is-best-for-an-inground-swimming-pool.27116/post-314750>

> [Ted said:](/goto/post?id=314743)
>
> You definitely don't want salt, it just breaks down to chlorine. Ozone would be the best and if you can add UV to it, it would be even better.

thanks - we figured salt isn't the way to go....

### DLO — 2022-08-01T17:54:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/thoughts-on-which-system-is-best-for-an-inground-swimming-pool.27116/post-314766>

**Ozone Pool Cons**

-   Requires Chemical Supplementation: As effective as ozone pool systems are, they cannot work alone as ozone does not maintain residual disinfecting properties. As a result, the water needs a chemical supplement like [chlorine or bromine](https://poolresearch.com/bromine-vs-chlorine/).
-   High Upfront Costs: While ozone pool systems allow for less spending on chemical treatment, they require a larger upfront cost for purchase and installation. Additionally, if an ozone generator needs dry air, the ozonator must be situated above ground. If fed through an oxygen-producing system, the ozonator may be installed underground.
-   Ozone Can Be Dangerous: Ozone is unsafe for humans when high exposure occurs, so ozone must be safely contained within the circulation system as intended. It is also worth noting that ozone can build up in covered areas, like beneath a pool cover or in a pool pump room.

### Ted — 2022-08-02T01:02:43+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/thoughts-on-which-system-is-best-for-an-inground-swimming-pool.27116/post-314778>

It's true that you need chlorine, but you only need to "shock it" once a week. You put the chlorine in the evening and sometime around mid morning the next day, the chlorine has evaporated.
I am sure that the cost is higher for ozone system, but if you want to be chlorine free, you have to weigh that.
I don't know much of the dangers. I would hope that if it is installed correctly, there shouldn't be a problem.

# Thread: Grape Balls of Fire! Could your environment play a role in your relationships?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grape-balls-of-fire-could-your-environment-play-a-role-in-your-relationships.27124/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### 5G Canary — 2022-08-05T02:02:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grape-balls-of-fire-could-your-environment-play-a-role-in-your-relationships.27124/post-314864>

If you live in a bad environment you pretty much live in a microwave. Could living in that microwave be affecting your relationship in ways you never could have thought of? Just thinking out loud aren’t testicles similar to the size of grapes? Isn’t your phone and a Wifi laptop a microwave? And if we sleep next to each other in a bad nnEMF’s environment how do we affect each other?

[https://kawarthanow.com/2019/03/14/...nt-university-physicists-research-goes-viral/](https://kawarthanow.com/2019/03/14/grape-balls-of-fire-trent-university-physicists-research-goes-viral/)

Highlights from article...

“When you place two grapes close together in a microwave and heat them, they create a fireball of plasma (one of the four fundamental states of matter, along with solid, liquid, and gas). Plasma is an extremely hot gas of positively charged ions and negatively charged electrons (the Sun is made of plasma).”

“Not only can you create a plasma fireball with two whole grapes touching each other, but you can create the same effect with any spherical objects of the same size that contain water.”

“When two grapes are touching each other, the microwave energy in each is attracted to the other, creating an intense electrical field where the grapes intersect. **_Sodium and potassium molecules in the skin become ionized, freeing electrons and resulting in plasma.”_**

Could a bad environment play a role in ionizing potassium?

“While research into this topic may seem trivial at first, it actually has implications for the field of nanophotonics — the study of the behaviour of light on the nanometre scale (one billionth of a metre).”

“We’re hypothesizing maybe you can change antenna design because the grapes are acting as a concentrator for wireless radiation or cellphone radiation — affecting how we design antennas to help act as a signal booster,”

Just because I thought this was also interesting...

Below is a 101 year old scientist explaining his experiments. He coincidentally passed away this July at 103 years old!

Makes you go hmmm...

Matt... I am calling you out but from a place of love. Your eyeballs are safe but what about your other balls? This picture is literally how I destroyed my health. I sat inside on a couch with bright lights, Wifi laptop, iPhone, and iPad working on my online store. Don’t make my mistake... { "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

### Marko Pollo — 2022-08-05T20:00:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grape-balls-of-fire-could-your-environment-play-a-role-in-your-relationships.27124/post-314879>

In the mid 70s we got our first microwave oven. My mother warned us to never put in an egg as it would explode. Of course I heeded her warning and the next time she left the house I had a cigar box(to protect the oven) with 2 eggs in it cooking on high before she had left the driveway. After 20 minutes on high and no explosions, I took my failed egg bomb to the trash can to hide the evidence. During a last look, an egg exploded, covering me with its flaming molten radioactive yolk. It burned the flesh off of my eyelids and around my eyes. So lucky I did blind myself. So maybe grapes, testes, ovaries, eyes, lymph nodes, heck maybe every cell of our bodies are affected in some way. I think simple videos like this can help start a discussion about emfs having biological effects. There was one I saw with a female doctor who took a blood draw from her own hand and showed how a 900mtz hand held phone had a great instant effect on blood platelets.

### 5G Canary — 2022-08-05T22:27:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/grape-balls-of-fire-could-your-environment-play-a-role-in-your-relationships.27124/post-314882>

Now that’s an eggsplosion! I bet your mom was shell shocked when she found you! Lol!

Definitely curious how the two eggs would have affected each other while touching... would the energy in each make them attracted to the other like the grapes, creating an intense electrical field where they intersect. Guessing the shell of an egg would be different then the skin of a grape? Would the sodium and potassium molecules in the shell become ionized, freeing electrons and resulting in plasma? Which comes back to... Could a bad environment play a role in ionizing potassium?

You probably would love this guy... and yes he did explode the egg at the end! It was eggselent!

# Thread: Starting conversations and seeking advice
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/starting-conversations-and-seeking-advice.27126/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 9
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### SHANNON SELL — 2022-08-05T03:35:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/starting-conversations-and-seeking-advice.27126/post-314866>

How do you discuss light water and magnetism with others who are outside this knowledge? I have not brought up much other than my blue light blockers… maybe my kiniki. Most of this Info is way over my head but I try to plunk along and reread a ton until I “get it”. I am far from being able to teach others about it.

Right now I’m considering moving. And my husband wants me to get advice from friends and family. Because moving is going to be terrible. 6kids, both our families are here all our friends. No help. I would be leaving my tribe, my village, to go to a better place health wise. Which would bring a ton of stress and isolation. My husband thinks it’s pointless too because 5g will take over everywhere eventually.

I just want out of this 5g area though to seek improvement. Advice from loved ones is difficult to gauge as everybody I know just laughs about tin foil hats when 5g is brought up. I don’t know how to approach the subject in a serious manner. I don’t know how to get relevant advice from them.

This is a massive decision and I need advice but I don’t see what else can be done but move. 5g covers a huge area around where we live and the closest we can live 5g-free is going north into Wisconsin and I’m hesitant about going much higher latitude (at42) I’m thinking we need to move to the gulf coast either Texas or Florida..I did throw El Salvador out there as an option! Are there other families on this forum? How do you make a decision like this? How do you talk about the motives for moving with ‘outsiders?’

### Marko Pollo — 2022-08-05T04:45:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/starting-conversations-and-seeking-advice.27126/post-314867>

Hey Shannon,
Trying to sell this mito narrative is imo complete folly. I think you are better off just saying "My doctor said I shouldn't expose myself to the fake flickering light. It sounds crazy but I feel way better when I avoid the fake light." If you can figure out your context, what is really important to you, and just live that way happily, others may come along. If you just struggle to convince others you look like a loon. Even Jack, with all his wisdom, passion, knowledge and credentials struggles to convince the masses what we believe wholeheartedly.
We moved to the country to a place without much cell service. We got lots of resistance to moving from friends who took our leaving as a rejection of their lives. We are much happier here, have made lots of friends and community. When looking for a new place, you might want to find a good reason to move to a place instead of running from an invisible boogy man. For example, saying I want to pursue regenerative agriculture, grow our own food, homeschool might get the focus on finding a great place where you all can be happy instead of waving your arms and yelling about 5g. When you meet your new neighbors, tell them you moved there because you think its the most beautiful place/ nicest community in the world, ignoring the problems you are leaving behind. If you don't truly believe that, keep looking! Good luck

### Laudy Cincotta — 2022-08-05T08:36:54+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/starting-conversations-and-seeking-advice.27126/post-314868>

[@SHANNON SELL](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/24573/) - well done for even considering it, thats a really difficult thing to get your head around.

We kept making excuses for years until it became too hard too stay and had to leave with declining health in May.

For what its worth, best decision we ever made with a little bit of stability and space to breath and work out the next step!

We've met wonderful people along the way, experienced much kindness from complete strangers and with some better health and time in nature we are feeling better and can see clearly now what we need to do.

Just take the first step, it can be a baby one, just go somewhere for a holiday and when you are away from the everyday stuff at home then you can think about the next thing you want/need to do, it will give you some clarity. I know you have little kids but getting to a new place will help, i can speak from experience.

Also my opinion don't worry about anyone. You need to put you, your husband and children first - don't worry what people think, thats what made me sick my whole life worrying about others and never living my life, at 56 this has changed, we always have choices and you need to start thinking of you now.

Others will never understand, they cant because they aren't in your shoes and most don't want to anyway. We had this issue too, my children have been nothing but supportive and have helped to tie up most things back in Melbourne so we can get going sooner yet others in the family especially siblings are morbid and depressed and have said they don't understand why we have to leave with Vince so sick yet and they want to come see him (not that they did in the 14 months since diagnosis) so you have to be good enough for your self and your children. People will drop away and you will find other like minded souls and make new friends.

I also agree with Marco, just tell them something that is within their scope of understanding because they wont understand what we all believe.

The hardest step will be the first one but you will be fine. Wishing you all the best.

### 5G Canary — 2022-08-05T16:03:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/starting-conversations-and-seeking-advice.27126/post-314872>

{ "lightbox\_close": "Close", "lightbox\_next": "Next", "lightbox\_previous": "Previous", "lightbox\_error": "The requested content cannot be loaded. Please try again later.", "lightbox\_start\_slideshow": "Start slideshow", "lightbox\_stop\_slideshow": "Stop slideshow", "lightbox\_full\_screen": "Full screen", "lightbox\_thumbnails": "Thumbnails", "lightbox\_download": "Download", "lightbox\_share": "Share", "lightbox\_zoom": "Zoom", "lightbox\_new\_window": "New window", "lightbox\_toggle\_sidebar": "Toggle sidebar" }

### EWO — 2022-08-05T18:16:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/starting-conversations-and-seeking-advice.27126/post-314877>

At some point, you stop caring what other people think.

Said a different way, you have the capacity inside of yourself to know what you need to heal yourself. When that voice is strong enough, it won't matter to you what others' opinions are. Those others might include spouse, family, friends, and people here. Your journey is yours alone.

### 5G Canary — 2022-08-05T22:29:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/starting-conversations-and-seeking-advice.27126/post-314883>

Wise to remember... you can’t get healthy/wealthy in the same environment that you got sick/poor in. When “they” say you get a cost of living increase to live somewhere... those are the zip codes to run from. Zip code definitely matters!

Most people don’t want to hear the truth because it becomes an inconvenient truth. I personally will never stop singing and you would be surprised how many people laughed at me and thought I was nuts that have come back years later now completely understanding why I’ve been singing.

### caroline — 2022-08-06T20:22:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/starting-conversations-and-seeking-advice.27126/post-314891>

Yes to all of the above ..........so much wonderful advice.

You have to do it for you.......in our experience family didn't understand then - and still don't.

Family and friends seem to want you tethered to your old and tired and sick life.

Nothing you say can change their mind. We went down the health route but even that was not acceptable. We thought that they would surely understand that we wanted to be in a place for optimal health and longevity ..........nope - they did not get it.

You make the decision and then it is all about baby steps ....and slowly slowly it all comes together.

It seems to me that the vast majority of our family and friends didn't want us to improve the conditions of our existence. I am positive they would deny it - but it seems to be the truth.

It is an amazing adventure ......and we are really proud of ourselves -absolutely no regrets. We wanted a better life for ourselves and we had to leave our old life behind and make a new one.

There are several families from this forum who outfitted old school buses as campers and hit the road ......went to Florida.

Imagine a better life for you and your family .....now go get it!

One thing ....Jack has consistently told us that we aren't going to escape 5g

Good Luck and live the courage of your convictions - especially for your children.

### caroline — 2022-08-06T20:30:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/starting-conversations-and-seeking-advice.27126/post-314892>

BTW - one more thing .....I have been hanging around here for ten years and still couldn't really explain the science to anyone!
Jack's science resonated with me from the very beginning and I went with it.

Have I been able to influence others in all this time? ....not really They think I do weird things and have weird ideas.

They do see that I am really healthy and well - but can't seem to connect the dots.

Luckily I met a man who was already on this path - even tho he had never heard of Jack Kruse ...and we are on this great optimal journey together.

We are in El Salvador - pm me if you like.

### EWO — 2022-08-07T00:06:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/starting-conversations-and-seeking-advice.27126/post-314900>

5G ubiquitousness aside, what you get by moving south is light. Within a few months of finding JK's work 7-8 years ago, I headed south from the upper Midwest. No regrets, no looking back.

You will never know unless you try. And no amount of talking to others who don't get it (how could they) is going to substitute for experience.

You are a mom of six, so sick you said you can't move for days. You've also said that you are currently living where there si a support network for you and your family. You've also said your husband would "allow" you to travel for a month but you'd need to find a place for you and all the kids.

If I were you I would lean on that support network, explain you are sick and need to find out if you can feel better in a different environment. You need them to step up and watch the kids so you can focus on your healing.

I'm a single parent of two without support from a coparent or family and I cannot imagine having to take care of 6 while so sick I felt I couldn't move. You will never be good for anyone else until you are good enough for yourself. You cannot give to others (spouse, childrren, family and friends) if you have no surplus.

It's time for you to prioritize you.

# Thread: What brand of earplugs for sleeping?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-brand-of-earplugs-for-sleeping.27135/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 9
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### BrunoB — 2022-08-10T22:55:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-brand-of-earplugs-for-sleeping.27135/post-314977>

Hello good day I have the common orange 3M brand, but they do not cover much noise.
I read that resin ones are better, what has been your experience?
I have these. Thanks

### Laudy Cincotta — 2022-08-11T03:56:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-brand-of-earplugs-for-sleeping.27135/post-314983>

Hey Bruno,

I cannot use those 3M ones either.

I use these beeswax ones, they are such a good natural product.

Made of beeswax, they are malleable which is that you can warm them up by squishing them and they become soft then when you place in your ears they seal really well and noise don't get through them either.

[https://vivarays.com/products/ear-plugs](https://vivarays.com/products/ear-plugs)

Good luck, let me know how you go.

### BrunoB — 2022-08-12T19:24:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-brand-of-earplugs-for-sleeping.27135/post-315013>

> [Laudy Cincotta said:](/goto/post?id=314983)
>
> Hey Bruno,
>
> I cannot use those 3M ones either.
>
> I use these beeswax ones, they are such a good natural product.
>
> Made of beeswax, they are malleable which is that you can warm them up by squishing them and they become soft then when you place in your ears they seal really well and noise don't get through them either.
>
> [https://vivarays.com/products/ear-plugs](https://vivarays.com/products/ear-plugs)
>
> Good luck, let me know how you go.

Hello, thanks for answering, why can't you use the 3m? how do you heat them with water?

### Laudy Cincotta — 2022-08-14T01:34:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-brand-of-earplugs-for-sleeping.27135/post-315027>

Hey [@BrunoB](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/19668/) no problem!

Problem with 3M
1\. Synthetic
2\. Dont block much noise
3\. Fall out all the time

Love Bees Wax
1\. Natural material and naturally anti bacterial
2\. Dense so noise doesnt get through
3\. When warmed up they completely fit any shape ear to block noise and then stay that way when they cool down.

With the Beeswax ear plugs

1.  Before use, completely remove cotton wool.
2.  Soften the plug by vigorous kneading, form it into a ball (no elongated shape!). Use the entire earplug – don't split!
3.  Seal the opening of the ear canal with gentle pressure. Do not insert into the ear canal!

Really good video explains how to use them

Good luck.

### crix — 2022-08-14T01:43:35+0300

### Marko Pollo — 2022-08-16T18:54:56+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-brand-of-earplugs-for-sleeping.27135/post-315080>

### crix — 2022-08-17T15:09:54+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/what-brand-of-earplugs-for-sleeping.27135/post-315091>

> [BrunoB said:](/goto/post?id=315077)
>
> do you try this? thanks

Yep. I've tried a ton of different kinds of earplugs and these are the best I have been able to find. They don't work well for very low frequencies (<200 Hz), but then again, no other earplug can really attenuate those frequencies either.

# Thread: Is it safe?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-it-safe.27136/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 23
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Tom Win — 2022-08-11T12:42:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-it-safe.27136/post-314988>

Is it safe to be on the sun when all those 5G satellites are beaming everywhere on earth?
How to do it safely? Is grounding to earth helps?
Thanks for advice.

### Marko Pollo — 2022-08-15T19:39:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-it-safe.27136/post-315051>

Hey Tom,
I would never quit the sun. I have heard here that when exposed to 5g people can burn more easily, but a person should always be careful not to burn, ever. With that being said, I am a sun maximalist who believes we should all be in the sun all day long with breaks of shade when desired. Recommendations to get 15 or 30 minutes a day are comical. If you have a super solar callous in a good environment and then you feel something is not right after a change of location, you are your own emf meter! In the presence of magnetic emf and sunlight, migrating birds select the light info over emf for navigational purposes. There are also big variations in emf almost anywhere, so using a meter can prevent paranoia or alert to bad levels. Good luck!

### caroline — 2022-08-15T21:07:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-it-safe.27136/post-315057>

> [Marko Pollo said:](/goto/post?id=315051)

> I would never quit the sun. I have heard here that when exposed to 5g people can burn more easily, but a person should always be careful not to burn, ever. With that being said, I am a sun maximalist who believes we should all be in the sun all day long with breaks of shade when desired. Recommendations to get 15 or 30 minutes a day are comical. If you have a super solar callous in a good environment and then you feel something is not right after a change of location, you are your own emf meter! In the presence of magnetic emf and sunlight, migrating birds select the light info over emf for navigational purposes. There are also big variations in emf almost anywhere, so using a meter can prevent paranoia or alert to bad levels. Good luck!

Good thoughts Marco

### 5G Canary — 2022-08-16T15:34:52+0300

### Ronald Waters — 2022-08-19T22:11:24+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-it-safe.27136/post-315147>

> [Tom Win said:](/goto/post?id=314988)
>
> Is it safe to be on the sun when all those 5G satellites are beaming everywhere on earth?
> How to do it safely? Is grounding to earth helps?
> Thanks for advice.

My 2 cents on the 5G subject, is that I can't avoid a satellite signal when outdoors but if nobody is connected to that 5G signal, then there is nothing beaming back and forth. Only worry about the things you can change. If nnEMF is having noticable affect, then I would say change your location. If not, I would still remain prepared to move.
Like a storm, a war is a rapidly changing and unpredictable event. (FED attack on the American economy). I'm still too tied down to property, but I am getting measures in place to make me hyper mobile. Wealth / health / freedom, these three amigos always ride together.

### 5G Canary — 2022-08-20T00:41:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-it-safe.27136/post-315150>

Great advice^^^... mitigation and migration!!

The way I like to explain it and basically how I survive it. I imagine/feel myself surfing through these waves(devices/towers/satellites and crappy environments.) They are the obstacles in my path to optimal but if/when I focus on them I usually crash straight into them. Instead I am conscious of them but I put my main focus on the line. The line is the most ideally surfable portion of the wave. The goal for every surfer is to ride the line for as long as possible. The line needs to be a clear path to Mother Nature. Stay connected with her and you intuitively will be safe from the snake. The snake is when you surf someone else’s line.

Kind of ironic they named it “The Line”... that’s one snake I won’t be surfing!

[@JanSz](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/933/) Did you see an uptick of flies in your neck of the woods? I know we did here this year. They are all different sizes and some are literally the size of a small drone. Those ones in particular have even been trying to bite me even through my clothes. (#%@!) We do successfully use the bags too. We put them way out in the woods so I don’t attract them by the house. The numbers have significantly dropped this week. The bites have been very different this year too... It’s like getting branded with a hot iron! My husband only gets bites from misquotes and I only get bites from the flies.

### caroline — 2022-08-22T18:24:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-it-safe.27136/post-315189>

Everyone please be very aware of ticks and alph-gal syndrome. This is a life threatening mammal allergy.
There are mammal byproducts in so many everyday things we use without thinking.

Many people have been misdiagnosed for years and years.
Many doctors are missing this diagnosis or don't believe it is real.

I will post a link
[Alpha-gal Syndrome | AGI - Alpha-gal Informationhttps://alphagalinformation.org › what-is-ags](https://www.google.com/url?sa=t&rct=j&q=&esrc=s&source=web&cd=&ved=2ahUKEwi8oILo4Nr5AhVASDABHTycAWsQFnoECBUQAQ&url=https%3A%2F%2Falphagalinformation.org%2Fwhat-is-ags%2F&usg=AOvVaw0hKzGy2MQy-crH9ZwchXc9)

### caroline — 2022-08-22T19:19:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-it-safe.27136/post-315190>

> [Tom Win said:](/goto/post?id=315121)
>
> By the way you people know about this right?

### Marko Pollo — 2022-08-23T19:23:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-it-safe.27136/post-315213>

We have significantly less flies, wasps, crickets, all bugs since allowing our chickens and ducks to roam around our house. Guinea hens can eat up to 4000 ticks per day plus snakes! I'm going to order some with my next poultry order. We have some ticks in our area but I prefer not to use poison on my animals, soil, or myself. I check for them but don't stress about it. Stay safe and sane!

Only worry about the things you can change. If nnEMF is having noticable affect, then I would say change your location. If not, I would still remain prepared to move.
> Like a storm, a war is a rapidly changing and unpredictable event. (FED attack on the American economy). I'm still too tied down to property, but I am getting measures in place to make me hyper mobile. Wealth / health / freedom, these three amigos always ride together.

I remember getting so worked up about this stuf that I couldn't stand to see anything that represented EMF to me--that incoherence/disharmony/discombobulation doesn't serve my physical body, my mental or emotional state. It is possible to be aware enough to mitigate, while as you say, letting go of what you cannot change. What you narrowly focus on becomes your reality. We are so much bigger than this body, this mind...connect to THAT and the rest of fades away.

### Tom Win — 2022-08-25T08:54:40+0300

### Inger — 2022-08-25T10:03:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-it-safe.27136/post-315244>

I love the sun and I am out in it anytime and anywhere I can.

I believe it depends a lot on one self, if the sun becomes toxic or not...

On many different levels!

On a physical level I have learned very interesting things about what too much vitamin A does in the body and for the skin.. when paired with sun it can be not so very fun  .
I have gotten sunburns after taking medication(once after removing a teeth and other time it was after a small surgery) that I would never otherwise get. Crazy

Also too much iron or copper makes radiation worse and there are so many things and angels. The skin is a detox organ and whatever your body wants to detox lands on it so frequent showering or salt baths etc helps a lot  if you sweat all day in sun and does not clean your skin maybe it is not so good if you have stuff to detox a lot.

I also believe we will feel it when it is enough, when it starts to feel uncomfortable watch for a shady spot

I am not going to let myself be scared of the sun. But I will listen to my body what it tells me, and keep my ears and eyes open to always learn new things.
We are all so individual it is impossible to give any advice about that, imho. If we can just share experiences, trial and error.. that way we could maybe get a little broader view

### Crimson Funk — 2022-11-09T14:23:54+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/is-it-safe.27136/post-317435>

Just my take: I think that our bodies evolved to look for the signals that are supposed to be there. So even though you get the 5g shit, if you are outside you at least get the signals that you are supposed to get. The alternative is to stay inside, where the right signals aren't really available at all.

I imagine that other factors (diet, sleep, exercise, current Redox and others) would play some sort of role in assisting your body to sort the good signals from the bad.

Hi,
We have been offered a villa in the Canary Islands I have a coupe of concerns..
1\. Solar panels on the roof of an annexe that is joined to the main building. I have measured with the cornet metre and got readings of 0.01 to 0.05 inside the villa.
2\. I can see a phone mast several km away on top of a mountain. The cornet meter reading outside the villa was 0.05 to 0.08.
What are people’s options before we make a decision.
Thank you

### Marko Pollo — 2022-09-03T18:14:58+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/amazon-workers-get-wrist-problems-from-a-wrist-mounted-computer.27149/post-315426>

I have suffered for years what I thought was carpel tunnel syndrome from commercial fishing, which is super common. Very repetitive hard work with high emf from radar, radios, gensets, etc. Even years after changing professions, I lived with chronic pain from the elbows down. I just ignored it. During covid, I spent months working in the equatorial sun with very low emf. I didn't even realize the pain had disappeared. I drove into Bogota and felt the numbness return instantly. I now believe the unease I feel in malls, airports and confined spaces stem from emf. Easy to avoid.

Back to wrist problems - many of the blokes I learnt our trade with when we were in our 20's would leap out of the starting block on the first day with what we called a 'green hand', they couldn't help themselves but start racing, I never fell for that trap so thankfully have never needed a carpal tunnel operation which some of my old work mates had to get done in resent years. Thinking back how stupid it was that there wrists would be all swollen up, but would they stop, no, gotta be a real man and keep going. They paid the price later in life.

> [JanSz said:](/goto/post?id=315465)

> D2 has chromium in it.
> Be careful to not expose it to ClO2 water.
> \============================

Good thought, thanks.
Thankfully I learnt my trade on the old style shears (OSS) I therefor learnt early on that even a humid night could help start off surface rust, so its a habit dry the blade if they get wet. D2 can still rust too, but not as quickly.
Sharping the D2 blades and of the 100% high carb OSS requires different stones, D2 man made carbonized silicon stone take water, can use an oil but the stones tend to clog up, water keeps them cleaner.
OSS natural stones were used, but are no match in cutting D2, this steel is too hard for it.
[https://vintagetoolshop.com.au/products/vintage-turkey-stone-natural-sharpening-oilstone-a205](https://vintagetoolshop.com.au/products/vintage-turkey-stone-natural-sharpening-oilstone-a205).
I used to own 90% Black Turkey stone and a few of- [https://www.classichandtools.com/sharpening/oil-stones/arkansas-natural-oilstones/c295](https://www.classichandtools.com/sharpening/oil-stones/arkansas-natural-oilstones/c295)
Hunting out stones in secondhand shops or where ever became an obsession for some work mates, some fella's could have up to 100 stone, I didn't get that carried away but still had my eye open though.

### Richard Watson — 2022-09-06T02:44:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/amazon-workers-get-wrist-problems-from-a-wrist-mounted-computer.27149/post-315472>

> [JanSz said:](/goto/post?id=315466)
>
> I have VPN.
> When I was looking for your shears, I set my VPN to NZ.
> I still was not able to locate your shears.
>
> You may be missing customers.
> Make sure that it is easier to locate you when googling.
>
> When [@Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) posts anything
> it immediately shows up when googling.
>
> ..........................................

# Thread: Anxiety and Agoraphobia
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/anxiety-and-agoraphobia.27212/>
**Subforum:** Adrenal Rx and Leaky Gut Rx
**Posts:** 10
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### TaylorF — 2022-09-25T18:25:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/anxiety-and-agoraphobia.27212/post-316040>

I have been dealing with anxiety attacks, panic attacks, and agoraphobia for about 5-6 years now. I am doing all I can to improve my brain and redox, but I am still really struggling. What are some ways to hack anxiety? My biggest problem is being home alone, and the fear that something will happen to me if I’m alone, the main fear of dying.

I feel like I’ve tried everything, but maybe there is something I’m missing.

### Kari Dunlop — 2022-09-25T18:59:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/anxiety-and-agoraphobia.27212/post-316041>

> [Taylor Freeman said:](/goto/post?id=316040)
>
> I have been dealing with anxiety attacks, panic attacks, and agoraphobia for about 5-6 years now. I am doing all I can to improve my brain and redox, but I am still really struggling. What are some ways to hack anxiety? My biggest problem is being home alone, and the fear that something will happen to me if I’m alone, the main fear of dying.
>
> I feel like I’ve tried everything, but maybe there is something I’m missing.

Hi Taylor - I'd recommend taking a look at Mark Wolynn's book "It Didn't Start With You: How Inherited Family Trauma Shapes Who We Are and How to End the Cycle". One of my doctors recommended Mark's to me year ago and it helped a lot with my anxiety. The book is a step-by-step guide and will take you through his methodology.

### Marko Pollo — 2022-09-25T20:48:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/anxiety-and-agoraphobia.27212/post-316043>

If i am anxious about something, I like to think about the problem, do every reasonable step to resolve source of anxiety and move on. It could be a plan of how to deal with some situation, paying off debts, taking care of obligations, anything that is nagging at you. Moving on is critical. Think and dream about things you love and look away from the stuff that causes anxiety. If it is a fear of something like snakes, I try to find real statistics to see the true risk and then make a plan of how to avoid them for real, not building fear in my mind. Also breathing exercises and relaxation techniques help me stay calm. Good luck.

# Thread: Does Anyone Know Any OTC Alternatives To Flonase?
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-anyone-know-any-otc-alternatives-to-flonase.27213/>
**Subforum:** Beginners Area
**Posts:** 9
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Martha Ray — 2022-09-26T02:50:56+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-anyone-know-any-otc-alternatives-to-flonase.27213/post-316050>

GP and Emergency Room MD both suggesting **_[Flonase](https://www.flonase.com/?&utm_source=bing&utm_medium=cpc&utm_campaign=OB~CON_FF2~O_PR~FLO_SCT~Brand_KC~BR_MT~PHM_FF4~None_LG~EN_MK~US_SB~Core_FF5~PRD_CU~DTC&utm_term=flonase%20drug&utm_content=AG~Flonase%20Base&gclsrc=3p.ds)_** and **_N[eo-Synephrine](https://neosynephrine.com/)_** for my ears which are blocked not from wax but are full of fluid and they are **blocking my hearing**. I have a history of 10 years of severe ear eczema- extremely dry and cracking skin to wet, weeping yellow fluid, wax build up, swimmers ear, mild to very painful and hot at times. I have no idea of the cause. Doctors I've seen are clueless ! I used to wear earrings but stopped 20 years ago due to possible nickel senstivity.

I feel like the body is trying to protect me but I do not know what in my enviroment or diet that is triggering this...dental, bedding ([_Coyuchi_ organic undyed sheets](https://www.coyuchi.com/300-percale-sheet-set.html?coyuchi_color=1027), [latex mattress](https://cozypure.com/) and down pillows) or home building, household products I avoid chemical cleaning products and nickel in [_Chantal_ cookware](https://chantal.com/collections/id21-stainless-steel) and [_Ginkgo '_Linden'](https://ginkgoint.com/linden/) flatware kitchen tools.

I am food senstive to gluten, nightshades, high histamine, high oxalate, high salicylate and possibly...high nickel foods. Heavy Metal or Nickel detoxing or **_Oxalate dumping_** out of my ears???

Back to MD suggesting _Flonase_ and _N[eo-Synephrine](https://neosynephrine.com/)_ '**Nasal Sprays'** for my ears.
This is not clear to me as I have no symptoms of nasal allergy, congestion, drip or sore throat or drainage. I know the Your sinuses and ears are connected ...when I blow my nose air comes out my right eye. But these nose meds to my ear healing I don't understand??

I bought the OTC meds to try and use them but have not had confidence to use them yet. Drugs, OTC Medications and most supplements rarely agree with my system. I've had many difficult and painful lasting effects from medical substances.

Have used [OMG nasal spray](https://impoweredhealth.com/product/omg-nasal-spray/) formulated by the late Roby Mitchell, MD a.k.a Dr.Fitt in the past but I am down to the bottom of the container and now they have reformulated and I am not sure if the ingredients will agree with me. Considering trying **_Neti Pot_** using a _salaine solution_ ...

I have some dairy -whole Grass fed A2A2 Cream, Keifer and Butters in my diet ...going to avoid all even Ghee if I have too and try to go **OMAD Carnivore** with some water fasting for a bit as my ears did not bother me at all when I did -0- zero carb for 9 weeks last year. Only this time will add back all foods very, very slowly to check for any reaction.

Invited for a free trip to Emerald Isle, NC beach soon.. I checked distances for the rental they rented - EMF much lower number of towers and anntenas and more distance away from them than are at mine at my home..... hoping that will help some. Will have to check where they may have a _smart meter_. The wireless router is not on floor we are staying in and no celing fan above or below us. I stayed there last year and felt well. Will take my new EMF meters and check areas I will be in. I usually feel great at the beach so I am hoping for a reprieve from my pain and hearing loss.

**Would like to know any suggestions.**

### Laudy Cincotta — 2022-09-27T07:46:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/does-anyone-know-any-otc-alternatives-to-flonase.27213/post-316080>

> Invited for a free trip to Emerald Isle, NC beach soon.. I checked distances for the rental they rented - EMF much lower number of towers and anntenas and more distance away from them than are at mine at my home..... hoping that will help some. Will have to check where they may have a _smart meter_. The wireless router is not on floor we are staying in and no celing fan above or below us. I stayed there last year and felt well. Will take my new EMF meters and check areas I will be in. I usually feel great at the beach so I am hoping for a reprieve from my pain and hearing loss.
>
> **Would like to know any suggestions.**
>

Hi Martha Ray, i am not sure i understand your circumstances and please do your own due diligence before using as you seem to have many allergies, however i had an ear infection/moisture in the tropical climate we were in earlier this year due to the humidity and i used this product, [https://au.iherb.com/pr/herb-pharm-...-calendula-st-john-s-wort-1-fl-oz-30-ml/10126](https://au.iherb.com/pr/herb-pharm-mullein-garlic-oil-with-calendula-st-john-s-wort-1-fl-oz-30-ml/10126).

It was really helpful, i have had my sons use it, my grandchildren and anyone who'd listen and they all found some relief from it.

Don't know if its the right thing for what you are facing but hope it may help, good luck.

Went to an ENT doctor today...first time I'd seen him or been to any other ENF for a very long time. I had confidene in my doctors in Houston due to family and friends having good results with them as well as having good results myself. AnywayENT vacuumed out my ears which felt good at the time and told me I had infection in them and prescribed a drug titled NEOMYCIN AND POLYMYXIN B SULFATES AND HYDROCORTISONE ....but he wanted to prescribe what sounded like 'Floxy" the family of drugs which is what has damaged my twin brother. He knew I have bad reaction to taking antibiotics internally but he said that would not apply to topical. He noted the bad Ear Ezcema I have but as far as my ears he assured me he had seen much worse. Not really a comfort. He also said that this drug may not work and then we can try the 'Floxy' one.

One question I had he did not comment on...why would I get this in both ears at the same time? ...makes me wonder if this is the popular viral infection's aftermath or a 5G side effect. I always want to know the root cause.

He did think my mention of using a hair dryer to keep dampness out of my ears was fine but te thought the **Eustachi device** woud be a waste of money..

[https://www.amazon.ca › Eustachi-Eustachian-Tube-Exerciser › dp › B00XQBR6GQ](https://www.amazon.ca/Eustachi-Eustachian-Tube-Exerciser/dp/B00XQBR6GQ)
**[Eustachi - Ear Pressure Relief Device - Amazon.ca](https://www.amazon.ca/Eustachi-Eustachian-Tube-Exerciser/dp/B00XQBR6GQ)**
Unblocks eustachian tubes anytime, anywhere using just a little air. Perfect for Cold and Allergy Season. Flying, Swimming and Diving. Great for kids and adults 30-Day 100% Satisfaction Guarantee + This item: Eustachi - Ear Pressure Relief Device $104.00 ($104.00/count)

Seems that this product is popular in Australia and Canada.

CVS and Target in the United States both carries this for $60. but when I looked at it today ...it said not to use it with an infection.

I hate this n**ot going again my way** pattern. I don't know what I was expecting but I don't want to keep suffering but I do not want to harm myself either. In the insert (in the tiniest print possible) it mentions rare but possible death and can result in hearing loss that may be long lasting. I have been unable to find if this drug has has a black box warning. I suspect they write these insert pages to protect themselves legally. Some of the other side effects are rash, burning and discomfort and I already have those so how do would I know whether or not the drug is causing vs what I already have. Intensity?

I had to order on line the exact brand and formula Laudy mention had helped them but I do have that Mullin & Garlic Herbs Etc. Ear Drops I will try tonight and see if that helps.

I am shell shocked when it comes to pharmaceuticals and when it comes to drugs I do not know when to hold'em and when to fold'em.

I was refering more to the machine not the supplements
DR. TENPENNY INVITES YOU TO EXPERIENCE WHOLE HEALTH RESTORATION

External Counter Pulsation \[ECP\] may be the answer to your unresolved health issues. ECP was FDA-approved in 1954 for the treatment of chest pain (angina) that wasn't responsive to other types of treatment, and for others who were not eligible for stints or by-pass surgery for a variety of reasons. ECP uses pressure cuffs applied to your calves, thighs and pelvis, which pumps synchronized opposite of your heartbeat. This special pumping cycle sends blood back to the heart at the time when it normally gets its blood, increasing the supply and decreasing the amount of work the heart must do to send blood throughout the body. This therapy can reduce your need for medication and increase your ability to be active without experiencing symptoms.

The result is improved blood flow and lymphatic drainage. ECP is non-invasive; it does not require the use of any needles or tubes. It is safe and does not cause pain and feels like a deep tissue massage. Side effects are usually minor.

Our staff will explain the many positive effects of ECP on your overall health restoration.

I was going reviewing my old biohacking purchases and alot I don't use anymore (hydrogen gas, hydrogen water generator, red light nose devices..coldvest...etc..) but found the good old quantlet and remembered how much I was excited by this project of Dr.Kruse and Ruben S.

In this video, the one repetition maximum is done on a chest press machine (220 lbs)and a triceps press machine(170lbs).The subject tries to do one more. He cannot. After this failure, he puts on the device, he is now able to do four reps. His one repetition maximum is thus increased to four.

Therfore, plateaus commonly experienced
By weightlifters are immediately overcome .

# Thread: Sun Gazing
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sun-gazing.27226/>
**Subforum:** Optimal Kids
**Posts:** 3
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### healthy2015 — 2022-10-03T20:38:10+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sun-gazing.27226/post-316267>

Hi
Will it be okay for my 5 year old to do 2 minutes of sun gazing within the first 20 minutes of sun rise?

### JanSz — 2022-10-03T21:38:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sun-gazing.27226/post-316268>

> [healthy2015 said:](/goto/post?id=316267)
>
> Hi
> Will it be okay for my 5 year old to do 2 minutes of sun gazing within the first 20 minutes of sun rise?

Minutes and sun raising depends highly on latitude.
It is better to discuss angle between your eyes and sun against horizontal plane.
**First part of sunrise is all red.** Personally it takes minimal effort to look at the sun directly when it is red.
_If the 2 minutes_ that you are talking about, is within that time, no problem at all.

Later on, when the sunlight gets whiter it is still ok to look at it directly.
When sun gets really bright, personally I do not look directly at the sun, but slightly below it.
\---------------
When standing on the beach in eastern part of USA
or in the land where you have clear 10 - 20 miles horizon,
Good few minutes before actual sunlight, you already know that sunlight is coming, all around you is red.
Draw line going from your feet (or eyes) toward the sun. That is line #1.
Stay in place, do not move.
When you actually see complete sun,
Draw another line (line #2) from your eyes toward the sun, but do that when
the angle between line #1 and line #2 has 30 degree angle.
That is the time when UVB starts showing up. (Vitamin D production starts)

(Small) correction.
As the sun comes up, it travels up and West.
It would be more accurately to rotate line #1 by the amount that sun travels.
\-----------------
From zero to 30 degree is the most valuable time from pov of adjusting
Circadian rhythm
cortisol
melatonin (from pineal gland as a source)
sleep duration, sleep problems

...........

### 8Phoenix — 2022-11-20T03:17:53+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sun-gazing.27226/post-317702>

> [healthy2015 said:](/goto/post?id=316267)
>
> Hi
> Will it be okay for my 5 year old to do 2 minutes of sun gazing within the first 20 minutes of sun rise?

You may also bathe him , with sun charge water
Also give him that water to drink that primes the body to use sun as primary source of energy intake

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sperti-lights.27230/post-316296>

I recently just bought both sperti lights (both amazing deals), in prep for this winter. I am wondering how hard can you really go with these lights. I have the biggest EMR tek light and pair that with my two sperti lights. The vit D lamp has a timer for 5 min (seems lame?) and the tanning lamp 15, however, I want to soak up as much UV as possible. Does anyone have any guidance on this? How long and how many times per day can I do this therapy?

### JanSz — 2022-10-05T18:07:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/sperti-lights.27230/post-316301>

> [Scott klein said:](/goto/post?id=316296)
>
> I recently just bought both sperti lights (both amazing deals), in prep for this winter. I am wondering how hard can you really go with these lights. I have the biggest EMR tek light and pair that with my two sperti lights. The vit D lamp has a timer for 5 min (seems lame?) and the tanning lamp 15, however, I want to soak up as much UV as possible. Does anyone have any guidance on this? How long and how many times per day can I do this therapy?

One way with Red Sperti
Go till your skin tolerance.
I stay naked in front of Sperti.
My navel is touching the middle of it.
Timer on Sperti is 16 minutes.
Every 4 minutes turn 90 degrees.
Eventually do this 16 minutes exposure twice.
I do not use any eyeglasses.

All the time I have long EMR lamp next to me.
start with 5 minutes, observe your skin, increase time slowly.
For my skin this is rather hard thing to do.

So I am using MT-2 injections to get more melanin.

### quantumaroo — 2022-10-11T21:17:51+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/do-i-have-leptin-resistance.27240/post-316489>

I have experienced a couple of days of intense, almost constant hunger.

On the second day, I started to experience some thirst too.

I had my blood sugar tested and it was 6.9 nmol/l a few hours after breakfast. Probably not ideal, but not diabetes levels.

I have been eating a fair amount of carbs over the past few months, and rarely fasting (outside of sleeping).

Today, I fasted from breakfast to dinner (around 9 hours), and my hunger seems to have returned to normal.

Does this sound like leptin resistance?

# Thread: Scientists Have Discovered a New Set of Blood Groups
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scientists-have-discovered-a-new-set-of-blood-groups.27241/>
**Subforum:** The EMF Rx
**Posts:** 1
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### 5G Canary — 2022-10-11T23:43:57+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/scientists-have-discovered-a-new-set-of-blood-groups.27241/post-316496>

[https://www.wired.com/story/new-blood-types/](https://www.wired.com/story/new-blood-types/)

It was back in [1982 that researchers first described](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/abs/10.1046/j.1537-2995.1982.22382224938.x) an unusual antibody in a blood sample that hinted that this mystery blood type was out there. The scientists couldn’t go much further than that at the time, but they knew that the antibody was a clue pointing toward some unknown molecule or structure that prompted the person’s immune system to generate it.

Maybe I am completely off the mark but... I wonder what changed in our environment in 1982?

# Thread: Using A DSL Cable With Your Cell Phone

### Freebird — 2022-10-12T04:30:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/using-a-dsl-cable-with-your-cell-phone.27242/post-316504>

Hi All,

I heard that you can plug your DSL cable into your cell phone (using an adapter) and thereby talk without using the cell signal -- but don' t know much about it.

Does anyone know how this works? Do you have to change a setting on the phone to shut off the cell signal (etc.)?

Thanks.

### JanSz — 2022-10-12T15:33:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/using-a-dsl-cable-with-your-cell-phone.27242/post-316515>

> [Freebird said:](/goto/post?id=316504)
>
> talk without using the cell signal

WhatsApp
talks and transfer files over internet.
**WhatsApp Messenger**, or simply **WhatsApp**, is an internationally available [freeware](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Freeware), [cross-platform](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cross-platform) [centralized](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Centralized_computing) [instant messaging](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Instant_messaging) (IM) and [voice-over-IP](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Voice_over_IP) (VoIP) service owned by American company [Meta Platforms](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Meta_Platforms) (formerly Facebook).
It allows users to send [text](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Text_message) and [voice messages](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Voice_message),[\[12\]](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/WhatsApp#cite_note-12) make voice and video calls, and share images, documents, user locations, and other content.

# Thread: How to Get Rid of Excess Iron in The Mitochondria
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-get-rid-of-excess-iron-in-the-mitochondria.27252/>
**Subforum:** The Cave
**Posts:** 45
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
### Freebird — 2022-10-16T04:40:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-get-rid-of-excess-iron-in-the-mitochondria.27252/post-316687>

... Without Blood Letting...

Many folks are into blood letting, Mercola, for one, recommends ~150 ml per month (I think that's basically for the rest of your life). And he's really big on it.

For some reason, however, I've never felt good about the idea of giving up your blood (other than through natural waste elimination).

Does anyone know of other effective ways to accomplish this goal?

### Inger — 2022-10-16T16:51:31+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-get-rid-of-excess-iron-in-the-mitochondria.27252/post-316690>

I do go to blood donations every 3 months as they need it very much for sick people... and then donating makes me feel great  , it is always fun  and also i dont have my period anymore and then I like to eat quite a bit of red meat. yum

But you can lower your excess iron without donations or bloodletting too for sure, by taking lactoferrin.

Choose a good quality source, made of cows milk, not whey. Bovine lactoferrin.

How Lactoferrin works is, it balances your iron, if you are too low it will increase absorption and of you have too much it will lower it. I take it too since several months. Worth to read up on IMHO.

Also iron is better absorbed from raw meat, so I usually cook my meat lightly most of the time now, to decrease absorption..
I also avoid organs, they are higher in iron.
I dont eat blood sausage anymore either.

If you dont feel well from eating red meat you might have some degree of hemachromatosis, but it would be wise to test ferritin and iron levels by blood test (I had ferritin of 180 2 years ago and that was way too high for my taste, I got it nicely low by donating regularly, last I tested it was 30, perfect. My hemoglobin is always great so far, they test it at every donation) and then you can choose another protein source that have lower iron like pork, fish etc.

If you do red wine, tea, dairy, fiber etc with your high iron meal it will help absorb less.

Also taking good care of your livers health will help the liver function optimally and a healthy liver regulates the iron uptake better.
Lactoferrin helps heal the liver, as do Jacks protocols with avoiding too much screen time etc.

After that, it should be about back to normal.

Freebird....
I am not sure it is a good idea to eat liver if you are concerned with getting too much iron

read this carefully;
[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3690345/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3690345/)

I stopped eating liver completely beginning of this year. Liver is VERY high in copper (and iron! and vit A! You dont want much of that either, it is very toxic). Copper can increases iron absorption.
And you dont want too much copper in todays world, copper is the most conductive element and you will be a walking antenna

That is why I got heart palpations after eating oysters! I could never figure it out! It did not happen in the beginning. But after eating tons and tons of oysters it started to appear. It was not fun. I made myself copper toxic by eating too many oysters. It made me more vulnerable for nnEMF.
I stopped eating them. Did iron detox too. No more heart issues. Yay

I try to always stay open and learning, what I once thought was good, might tomorrow be bad. That is life. It evolves.
We are living in a crazy world full of poisons and nnEMF. No way to escape it, even if we can minimize exposure.
So to be at our healthiest in this wold we might need to do things differently than in the stone age.
That is what I have realized through trial and error

> [Inger said:](/goto/post?id=316962)
>
> How long have you been hacking spirulina Sue, and what are your results so far? I am so curious

I had a craving for it months ago so just went for it but then stopped when the craving stopped. I've got to have a retina exam next month and the drops making the pupils dilate and then very strong light used is horrible and will be damaging in itself - but there's no way to avoid it, I have to get the exam done.

I searched for ways to mitigate the damage and found this
[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6871545/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6871545/)
**Dietary Spirulina Supplementation Protects Visual Function From Photostress by Suppressing Retinal Neurodegeneration in Mice
**
New rabbithole

I don't fear the vitamin A because I'm not eating other vitamin A rich foods, and I think other nutrients I'm after will outweigh the risks. I'm also taking chlorella in the evening before sleep, but I might add some earlier in the day. I've found a source of both that is third party tested for contaminants. I heard on a youtube video that If the spirulina is not dried at high heat it contains superoxide dismutase (SOD) which would be otherwise destroyed, as well as melatonin and chlorophyll which are able to penetrate the inner mitochondrial membrane. (I've got a paper somewhere about animals using chlorophyll to make ATP). Spirulina is also high in phytocyanin which is a light harvesting pigment, which could be why people report increased energy using it.

I started low dose and have moved up to 30 grams a day in split doses during daylight. I think I'll add some chlorella first thing in the morning to mop up toxins released from fat cells overnight, as well as the evening dose.

I think my energy levels are better and my colour perception seems enhanced, I just feel brighter. Another benefit so far is that I'm not so fearful of the exam, next step is to plan what to do/take on the day itself - last time I basically got in the dark and shut down while the effects of the drops wore off, it was like being in shock for 24 hours ..... hopefully not this time .....

For fiber try carrots? Carrots + onion goes well with meat, fish. Also activated charcoal can soak up bile.

With bread I found a major issue to be the added salt. Store bought bread has about 1g of salt per 3 slices. 1.5 years ago I started craving bread like crazy and eating it gave me a drug like high. Then I baked some sourdough without any added salt, ate it, and cravings for bread disappeared completely. And it was easier on the digestion eating bread without salt, the fiber already soaks up a lot of water, but salt makes it double trouble and it can be very dehydrating to eat bread.

The best remedy both before and after eating bread is chugging lots of water to oversaturate it while it's digesting to minimize gut disturbances. Rashes on my skin used to flare up 2-3 days after eating bread or other starchy fibrous plants cooked with salt, eliminating salt plus drinking tons of spring water allowed my skin to heal and I can now eat these foods without the salt and get no flareups, but I still have to follow it up with tons of water. If I eat fiber I try to space it out few days apart because eating it multiple days in a row will compound any issue and prolong the recovery until it all get pooped out.

Same idea with many other plants, like potatoes and carrots you cook them with salt and they become very addictive, cook them without salt and it will be bland and boring, something edible, but you won't be running to get seconds for it, unless you are really hungry.

### Daulatwant — 2022-10-28T21:16:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-get-rid-of-excess-iron-in-the-mitochondria.27252/post-317033>

> [JanSz said:](/goto/post?id=317025)
>
> Speaking (possibly) of iron.
> There is an old, I think (Indian Indian) lady.
> Likely about my age.
> She has bad kidneys, but her biggest problem now is very low hemoglobin.
> Hg=~7 instead of being around 12.
> Any suggestions?
>
> .

Beef/lamb liver can deliver more copper, than zinc. We need a good ratio of zinc/copper to properly utilize iron. Vitamin A is also needed. Muscle meat, seafood, and many other foods have higher zinc than copper, too much zinc can lower copper absorption. Gelatin has high copper and very low zinc. Beef/lamb liver likely has too much iron, so perhaps limiting certain high zinc foods while supplementing gelatin is a better way to adjust the ratio.

[@Inger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1057/) Just found that oysters are very high in zinc along with copper. The zinc may be limiting the absorption of copper. Maybe the issues you got were from too much zinc?

Taurine is touted to be a wonder cure-all for many imbalances in the body. But if someone is taking blood pressure medication, taurine can lower blood pressure, so lowering the dosage of meds may be needed as taurine intake is increased incrementally.

Here is a video on taurine for anemia
[https://yewtu.be/watch?v=fU\_-XrqqbIE](https://yewtu.be/watch?v=fU_-XrqqbIE)

> [Daulatwant said:](/goto/post?id=317001)
>
> For fiber try carrots? Carrots + onion goes well with meat, fish. Also activated charcoal can soak up bile.
>
> With bread I found a major issue to be the added salt. Store bought bread has about 1g of salt per 3 slices. 1.5 years ago I started craving bread like crazy and eating it gave me a drug like high. Then I baked some sourdough without any added salt, ate it, and cravings for bread disappeared completely. And it was easier on the digestion eating bread without salt, the fiber already soaks up a lot of water, but salt makes it double trouble and it can be very dehydrating to eat bread.
>
> The best remedy both before and after eating bread is chugging lots of water to oversaturate it while it's digesting to minimize gut disturbances. Rashes on my skin used to flare up 2-3 days after eating bread or other starchy fibrous plants cooked with salt, eliminating salt plus drinking tons of spring water allowed my skin to heal and I can now eat these foods without the salt and get no flareups, but I still have to follow it up with tons of water. If I eat fiber I try to space it out few days apart because eating it multiple days in a row will compound any issue and prolong the recovery until it all get pooped out.
>
> Same idea with many other plants, like potatoes and carrots you cook them with salt and they become very addictive, cook them without salt and it will be bland and boring, something edible, but you won't be running to get seconds for it, unless you are really hungry.

Nope, no carrots. Too much Beta carotene (vitA). I dont eat carrots, also oxalates in those.
And charcoal also not, I dont want to get constipated . I need to poop nicely and i am not on the loose side, which is when I would use charcoal though. Great stuff but only then I think.

It cant be Zinc because when I eat tonnes of Beef I get no hart palps at all. Beef has very high zink. I am pretty sure it was copper or that in combination with high vitamin A. Or something else?
I need to do some more hacking lol
My feet itched sooo bad first when I tried my moms bread, but now it does not itch anymore. Crazy! I tolerate it just fine. Maybe I had to build a different digestive flora, I have no idea. But I still dont think eating lots of bread is so ideal. So I am not going to do that.

I am feeling great though. Really great so I think I am on the right path

For the readers of this thread:

Lactoferrin from Bovine Milk: A Protective Companion for Life

[https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7551115/](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7551115/)​

Lactoferrin, an iron-binding multifunctional glycoprotein belonging to the transferrin family, is present in most biological secretions and reaches particularly high concentrations in colostrum and breast milk. A key function of lactoferrin is non-immune defence and it is considered to be a mediator linking innate and adaptive immune responses.

Lactoferrin is beneficial in:

-   Protection against Iron Deregulation and Oxidative Stress
-   Antimicrobial Activity
-   Anti-Inflammatory Activity
-   Dermatitis
-   Inflammatory Bowel Diseases
-   Pulmonary Inflammation Disorders
-   Hepatitis
-   Anticancer Activity
-   Obesity
-   Bone Metabolism
-   Dry Eye Disease

[https://www.lactoferrin.co/collections/all?utm\_term=lactoferrin powder](https://www.lactoferrin.co/collections/all?utm_term=lactoferrin%20powder)

​

Maybe Finland has stronger magnetism. Even if I sleep on second floor here. Still on my magnetico, like the last 10 yeras or so.

I am not so very supplement- friendly because I myself have experienced negative stuff with it and a good fiend of mine is really in trouble as she have been oversupplementing for many many years and she cant really let go of it... but she is not able to solve her problems  and imho she might want to drop all the supplements first because maybe the harm is caused by them. ### Inger — 2022-10-29T12:01:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-get-rid-of-excess-iron-in-the-mitochondria.27252/post-317058>

_"... Finland, the country with the happiest people on earth  (true )" -- Wonderful! I didn't know that. I wonder why._

[https://finland.fi/life-society/happinessreport2022/](https://finland.fi/life-society/happinessreport2022/)

"In terms of values, Finnish happiness and Nordic happiness are connected with trust and freedom. People in Finland tend to trust each other, their public officials and their government. This doesn’t mean they obey authority unthinkingly – there are disagreements and dissent, but debates play out in an environment of openness and [transparency](https://toolbox.finland.fi/life-society/country-ranking-transparent-country-2/).

Finland’s repeated success in the World Happiness Report stems from factors that also show up in other reports, indexes and international comparisons. At the time of writing, according to various organisations and surveys, Finland is the world’s [most stable](https://toolbox.finland.fi/life-society/country-ranking-stable-nation/) and [least corrupt](https://toolbox.finland.fi/life-society/country-ranking-least-corrupted/) country, and is first in [good governance](https://toolbox.finland.fi/life-society/country-ranking-governance/) and in [political and civil freedom](https://toolbox.finland.fi/life-society/country-ranking-political-civil-freedom/). It is ranked second in [press freedom](https://toolbox.finland.fi/life-society/country-ranking-press-freedom/), second in [gender equality](https://toolbox.finland.fi/life-society/country-ranking-gender-gap/), third in [children’s rights](https://toolbox.finland.fi/life-society/country-ranking-childrens-rights/) and fourth in [education](https://toolbox.finland.fi/life-society/country-ranking-education/). It tops the [Sustainable Development Index](https://toolbox.finland.fi/life-society/sustainable-development/) and the [Work-Life Balance Index](https://toolbox.finland.fi/themes/functionality-and-wellbeing/country-ranking-work-life-balance/), and places third in the [EU Social Justice Index](https://toolbox.finland.fi/life-society/country-ranking-socially-just-country/). Finland is also the EU country where people express the [most trust](https://toolbox.finland.fi/life-society/country-ranking-trust-in-people-in-eu-countries/) in each other."

What they say above is true.^^^
Love the debate culture here too, you can talk about things very openly, but Finnish people dont do small talk. It is silence or get real.
Finnish people are pretty laid back. And also very honest and genuine. They dont talk much, might look like they are not happy at all on the outside, but this special honesty and being just themselves, not having a high pressure to confirm, it is allowed to be just you.. It is wonderful.
This is a very accepting country.
Kindness.
Trust in each other (we have no locks on the doors in this house and many others dont lock their doors either)
Also closeness to nature.
They are not afraid of nature like Germans are.

The only downside here is, I smile so much every day I am going to get a tonne more wrinkles

_"I am trying to figure how to heal the liver most efficiently right now. That is my focus. I already have healed it quite a bit and no more gallbladder/liver pain. I am so happy " -- The gallbladder/liver came from the copper and iron? Or something else?_
_I'm surprised to hear that. You've had so many health successes, I thought you'd be all clean and shiny on the inside
_
haha.. Yes, I would think too _-_ but unfortunately it does not work like that, I am no Angel my friend  I do so many mistakes, things can work for a while until they dont. So we have to constantly rethink things if any issues appear, always evolving, the world changes, we change, environment change, we age, we overdo things, etc etc.
I want to be soft and changeable. No dogma, always willing to change.
Makes life very fun and adventurous, and when I live like that I have realized nothing ever get really bad, small issues appear and i change my ways and my body repairs itself when I stop doing what was harming me.
It can be something like drinking too much carrot juice, taking codliver oil, eating 100 oysters a week, gorging on liver  etc etc. Or nicotin addiction! I looked at what my nicotine gums contained, and I got shocked, holy moly so much poison and i ate those non stop for 7 years. The body can take a lot, until it cant, and then it tells us. Change something! Our body is absolutely wonderful, a healing machine.

hemoglobin and hematocrit are related.
Hemoglobin is a part of hematocrit because hematocrit is a measure of total red blood cells where hemoglobin is only a component. • Hemoglobin count and hematocrit changes parallelly.

> This is a very accepting country.
> Kindness.
> Trust in each other (we have no locks on the doors in this house and many others dont lock their doors either)
> Also closeness to nature.
> They are not afraid of nature like Germans are.
>
> The only downside here is, I smile so much every day I am going to get a tonne more wrinkles
>
> _"I am trying to figure how to heal the liver most efficiently right now. That is my focus. I already have healed it quite a bit and no more gallbladder/liver pain. I am so happy " -- The gallbladder/liver came from the copper and iron? Or something else?_
> _I'm surprised to hear that. You've had so many health successes, I thought you'd be all clean and shiny on the inside
> _
> haha.. Yes, I would think too _-_ but unfortunately it does not work like that, I am no Angel my friend  I do so many mistakes, things can work for a while until they dont. So we have to constantly rethink things if any issues appear, always evolving, the world changes, we change, environment change, we age, we overdo things, etc etc.
> I want to be soft and changeable. No dogma, always willing to change.
> Makes life very fun and adventurous, and when I live like that I have realized nothing ever get really bad, small issues appear and i change my ways and my body repairs itself when I stop doing what was harming me.
> It can be something like drinking too much carrot juice, taking codliver oil, eating 100 oysters a week, gorging on liver  etc etc. Or nicotin addiction! I looked at what my nicotine gums contained, and I got shocked, holy moly so much poison and i ate those non stop for 7 years. The body can take a lot, until it cant, and then it tells us. Change something! Our body is absolutely wonderful, a healing machine.

Thanks for the lovely write up on Finland. I had no idea about this. Sounds almost Utopian. I'd be really tempted to move to a place like that. Although it might take me awhile to get used to things being so balanced and easy going. Lol. Would be so refreshing though!

### Freebird — 2022-11-09T20:22:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/how-to-get-rid-of-excess-iron-in-the-mitochondria.27252/post-317440>

> [JanSz said:](/goto/post?id=317078)
>
> Her mom has very low hemoglobin.
> hemoglobin and hematocrit are related.
> Hemoglobin is a part of hematocrit because hematocrit is a measure of total red blood cells where hemoglobin is only a component. • Hemoglobin count and hematocrit changes parallelly.
> [View attachment 22956](https://forum.jackkruse.com/attachments/22956/)

FYI: I wrote to Lactoferrin Co. and asked them -- "Is this the apo form of lactoferrin?" (was just curious)
They said:
"It's considered native Lactoferrin, not apo or Halo but in the middle.
It has an iron content of around 12 mg / 100g "

I haven't researched it enough to know if this good, bad or "OK". But it may be helpful to someone in the know.

As far as customer service goes, they are on the up and up.
